| | Team,

Marcy Kaptur’s outspoken advocacy is bringing sustainability and innovation to the Heartland. Provisions of **the new Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act stimulate economic growth** and offer much-needed funding to fix lagging infrastructure.

Securing**$1 billion for the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative** to restore and protect our precious Great Lake Erie and another**$3.5 billion for weatherization** , this bill will:

* _**Replace**_ lead pipes
* _**Expand**_ broadband access for rural and underserved communities
* _**Create**_ opportunities for passenger and commercial rail upgrades
* _**Offer**_ funding for home rehabilitation, boosting property values and neighborhoods

**Marcy has committed her life to providing for the people of this district** , pledging every day to leave no one behind. Her diligence is making sure working families have access to the resources they need.

**Keeping Marcy in Congress is instrumental to the future of our progress, but Republicans’ attacks are mounting.**

**[Our work is not done. We can’t let Republicans take this seat from us! Team, will you contribute $25 right now to help us keep Marcy safe and hit our $1,000 Ohio Fight Back Fund goal by midnight tonight?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux1RjZpUdzq9unkZhE-usId9StDbAuV06x6m5CPQ42PeHf3W2AXatzBndMOsFVvRWWSxumISm3C-ObTmFpyi6cKKQHghtaydJPrzg8ctlQ-iQnQol6JHVKDE501cE4Vn8WIc6m8_ZhkNMoWMOh4DrBcEsvrYuR8kUR6a-nOd0LKjQIEXt9JdhQVZv9tC_uDNB_gMz0NB52TULhMnpMtVLZ2TSObo4-n1kxlXqGPIs1ZzBwRt13DcPS11NnCZfVdmFWvKuL4ZLo8kunnZBOMzRnDvKXT-JIus7LFWlf20dZVOv8pHOnZ6-5bhXsLeHq8CDC7VqCUJ0kKLSJcBmVPaS-XzPaPwS3pZKl3sYUf0Rggpxzc_n7TO017WSwHvcZnPYsw/3h9/a15Dp5tCQ1CG_BCah4w32g/h1/hmFgyqaN_jSemreV-xsY3XTAHbaW1An7MnbZyywDlRk)**

**Protecting our voice and her representation means we have to fight back and show Republicans that we are here to stay. 2022 is our chance to stand up to them, but our work must begin now!**

**[Our work is not done. We can’t let Republicans take this seat from us! \-- Team Kaptur

Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress?**

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Not many campaigns do this in their first week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We don’t take a single dollar for granted.
#
On this grassroots-funded campaign, we don’t take a single dollar for granted.
With less than a year until Election Day, we are putting all the resources we have into rallying support for Beto, reaching Texans where they live, and having as many face-to-face conversations as possible about our big, bold vision for Texas.
If it doesn’t earn votes, it doesn’t have a place in our budget.
Right now we’re focused on building the biggest and best organizing program Texas has ever seen — but we simply can’t pull it off without a foundation of early, strong grassroots support.
[Can you make a contribution of $3 today? Every dollar made today will help us reach our goal of organizing in all 254 Texas counties.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50111?refcode=ema20211122-163708&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163708%2E444211%2EhAD9fl)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50111?refcode=ema20211122-163708&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=163708%2E444211%2EhAD9fl)**
As soon as we launched last Monday, Beto and our campaign team hit the road. Already we’ve held events, listened and learned from folks, and rallied support in:
* San Antonio
* Laredo
* McAllen
* Corpus Christi
* Houston
* Dallas
* Abilene

Not many campaigns travel so far in their first week. You and your fellow supporters made it all possible — and you’re the ones who will decide whether we can keep this momentum going.
[Please, if you want Beto to win this race and get Texas back on track, will you consider chipping in $3 now to help us build organizing programs that reach Texans in all 254 counties?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50111?refcode=ema20211122-163708&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=163708%2E444211%2EhAD9fl)
Together, we will register a historic number of new voters, defeat Greg Abbott, and elect a leader who listens to, learns from, and serves all the people of this state.
Keep fighting,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211122-163708-footer&t=22&refcode2=163708_444211_hAD9fl&akid=163708%2E444211%2EhAD9fl)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=163708%2E444211%2EhAD9fl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=163708%2E444211%2EhAD9fl)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Xi forced Biden to meet for a virtual summit in the middle of the night that only benefitted the Chinese.

The summit was completely pro-China and Biden didn’t get his way on even one agenda item.

After Biden claimed that things were ‘strictly business’ between them and that they were not ‘old friends’, Xi opened the summit by greeting Biden as an “old friend.” The summit was completely pro-China and Biden didn’t get his way on even one agenda item. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: A split-second decision saved hundreds of lives
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
As a soldier, I was trained to take out terrorist threats -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I am in the world. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3e987a43bdbb4de5ac6be067f8aba8f1&_e=9WrWJ9CBNpEDA66okr7FO3O2w0tVpWgKpfVNSzMu-CHsI8_sdsSNEcelOxzUniWw_0toUzwt6H8CaRt_L0A3yL_twQU_7Ho1Rg3O2mTNClm4D-XscqPq0qdTsjSd9YnYVvOlogEbR8lGv8R3JyQXuDMnOX_sMQFPcVCYfvuUctK_BT0H6P4H8gKPUWqxEgYSZ_5gGi-KzFntcYTdh63xTfc_SyZmIs9rxZ4xXoF4zMzG6PvR2-kLL6qliaG-DIroX5gKoKkesrN4bI6RwWELTF3wM2gEvnPluMXK613RSjLzWj3lmZb3lJ4OCm9gq-oq8Qtf2MM10TDU-O8DqX8hAdxWSBgn1KBFMZojt3-CVu-edFE_AggM6Stzpr4Y082GCIMs_pB25yneFWy8vtssA0cI_7TL-H3MMHj00L4z-m8YvDQDEg8evgoi26kQ3aeB_rjK6heoZhYsH3oclUzNjQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3e987a43bdbb4de5ac6be067f8aba8f1&_e=9WrWJ9CBNpEDA66okr7FO3O2w0tVpWgKpfVNSzMu-CHsI8_sdsSNEcelOxzUniWw_0toUzwt6H8CaRt_L0A3yL_twQU_7Ho1Rg3O2mTNClm4D-XscqPq0qdTsjSd9YnYVvOlogEbR8lGv8R3JyQXuDMnOX_sMQFPcVCYfvuUctK_BT0H6P4H8gKPUWqxEgYSZ_5gGi-KzFntcYTdh63xTfc_SyZmIs9rxZ4xXoF4zMzG6PvR2-kLL6qliaG-DIroyrQA2ZscnyBG3U3c7hiqGQkZeL-4xqQnjZ8ifCY5XSLMN6vbakck4gvCc-Fb7rvSjks3hcD16jMtS0rrGGjjQBvEvXiRHLpEY5Bx1sAFpO-W2SU9QlGOMMG-dgLyA3sF9DX96N7aOK-9dqfWPl88pN7UdS1af9BwHoUDHpHHwqZ4Ib9zE5LlJOQpW0P1gvjvbt-iT5b1pDPJbnGHp9i6yA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3e987a43bdbb4de5ac6be067f8aba8f1&_e=9WrWJ9CBNpEDA66okr7FO3O2w0tVpWgKpfVNSzMu-CHsI8_sdsSNEcelOxzUniWw_0toUzwt6H8CaRt_L0A3yL_twQU_7Ho1Rg3O2mTNClm4D-XscqPq0qdTsjSd9YnYVvOlogEbR8lGv8R3JyQXuDMnOX_sMQFPcVCYfvuUctK_BT0H6P4H8gKPUWqxEgYSZ_5gGi-KzFntcYTdh63xTfc_SyZmIs9rxZ4xXoF4zMzG6PvR2-kLL6qliaG-DIrovGRnkeY3V9yZX4_h6gLmKLe-qsYCsdiSbfEyX9y_1Viw_26UmnVDKIZcawGqYjYXe26_QFY_9qCiHsmJXuL6AA9GP0-w2DqX9_AhPVR7zp1NXEfbMZvND_AUpaSjOuTI5wR7XAwLKAjlFjltvOqhCdjBz8D7TvWNBNxV8Ir6-TcOfPsg8fEEQXrOVgzFGHBmEl8TXoF0ZNes8FF6bi-TxA%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3e987a43bdbb4de5ac6be067f8aba8f1&_e=9WrWJ9CBNpEDA66okr7FO3O2w0tVpWgKpfVNSzMu-CHsI8_sdsSNEcelOxzUniWw_0toUzwt6H8CaRt_L0A3yL_twQU_7Ho1Rg3O2mTNClm4D-XscqPq0qdTsjSd9YnYVvOlogEbR8lGv8R3JyQXuDMnOX_sMQFPcVCYfvuUctK_BT0H6P4H8gKPUWqxEgYSZ_5gGi-KzFntcYTdh63xTfc_SyZmIs9rxZ4xXoF4zMzG6PvR2-kLL6qliaG-DIropEX1feG2ouK5sOyzF_MqleF8WGq9I45V8cnbkx2WNDwiwfLFNpSj99iZScg3_818T9dEJoO8OBxvN7JNGA-Jlm6b67DUoLZUnbkn037rxKSJrdFJ12TDEJdIjjJsMa2u0ZYBvlgWkI-O1slTprFq7cYgPLc6F8Rxq4y53kQNARZVnRHJWCjEY-aT0bJmM4EcPTkqNqFnJQMgwpWDu3hPiw%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3e987a43bdbb4de5ac6be067f8aba8f1&_e=9WrWJ9CBNpEDA66okr7FO3O2w0tVpWgKpfVNSzMu-CHsI8_sdsSNEcelOxzUniWw_0toUzwt6H8CaRt_L0A3yL_twQU_7Ho1Rg3O2mTNClm4D-XscqPq0qdTsjSd9YnYVvOlogEbR8lGv8R3JyQXuDMnOX_sMQFPcVCYfvuUctK_BT0H6P4H8gKPUWqxEgYSZ_5gGi-KzFntcYTdh63xTfc_SyZmIs9rxZ4xXoF4zMzG6PvR2-kLL6qliaG-DIro3X0p6bkE8K69scl_gqyPFDMsn9URuUYGrDYVPgL-II3VdfM-7W8_ZpCZZDQfqus6u2J5D3mB3r47E5XBzn4UEgopy1ivpRa9qBDXXdMPJZjqCPHqbQYlkXFDbX3uABd6KAAJ1ZiD6lA_tMqgGMfU47u_Z7Iua-Tswpj6Fj8Yxm9RlE021Tfqffn3rDwzE6FEdypuS1EwtrEDGPorA6daeg%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3e987a43bdbb4de5ac6be067f8aba8f1&_e=9WrWJ9CBNpEDA66okr7FO3O2w0tVpWgKpfVNSzMu-CHsI8_sdsSNEcelOxzUniWw_0toUzwt6H8CaRt_L0A3yL_twQU_7Ho1Rg3O2mTNClm4D-XscqPq0qdTsjSd9YnYVvOlogEbR8lGv8R3JyQXuDMnOX_sMQFPcVCYfvuUctK_BT0H6P4H8gKPUWqxEgYSZ_5gGi-KzFntcYTdh63xTfc_SyZmIs9rxZ4xXoF4zMzG6PvR2-kLL6qliaG-DIrojm6TwuYbZLLfp-ECaqStncX2PHw1HrgGv5AwwRaaNqONbNnQM5ykSeijj6PXMeSlFAD8CGfNh7eCGth_4JwqVDocHdXKQiIENlFoUu4JtBYaRlw0awsa9NfkzHU9JE6U7EVOfcpNbrAWZAnPCbW11D4yqgmjukciOMkwHT-OVTNICXmbMk7w-EiY0dkJ--68I0YJD8c60V1bjOuWjzybMA%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. My husband, John McGuire, has dedicated his life to service and has served America well. From his life as a Navy SEAL to representing the people of Virginia’s House District 56 as their delegate, John has always been reliable. _**Well after a lot of prayers, John is ready to take the next step, running to represent the people of Virginia's 7th District in Congress!**_ [**SUPPORT MCGUIRE FOR CONGRESS**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=af1df8833cd1403e9d18e034e78e1709&_e=2kq3ja_XHumo-KQONV7jUYNkHUL55yQJi8Y7Iehfw5pYxx8CbJVR4zfxJ-KWotLsDqg1bIjIfra4qik_QJL4kIUXEV5jQc16yU5-UZVI-Y4f1QOYaBTsSjA4F6bsr0EaJUqBXI0Vl0b4duUGsSF4PhWp5EaTeOGaIp8dOy4KsheaMDP1bjD_lh3vQSJB_bCLdW9LyK0o40bR8EDiZztiu6Q8jtsh-SkBFcIdkSaGarw7HvUMaWfBq-GO8tVLXJ4Qc4ZONWzP5iEGHOzPQWtL8ebmx47m43VpKjX0nfSlcH3PbjqHjSbbwRQjN9x2SYDguLkGjdBokmc9Eqf05fV6K17-96ksD7vA4xgSy57G9-XoluojVyGq_0_kWn2IUxYSGYJl-3W8XvF-Qu2pzcH391OR6U7Oja502tTnToaQ8PVY3VMpWMeSkKTOrs48unKWdcK5q5hW43VwWUexlkY2jipWB8OsF5GrpjkTYTnIcuuuleKQ9AEdia59hPX240XX)

I’ve seen over the years what a selfless leader John is...he consistently puts the needs of others before his own and never asks for anything in return. Throughout his time as a state Delegate, he worked tirelessly to ensure that each and every person in District 56 had their voice heard. When he commits his mind to a task he will not stop until that task is completed to the best standards.

[**Would you consider joining our team?**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=af1df8833cd1403e9d18e034e78e1709&_e=2kq3ja_XHumo-KQONV7jUYNkHUL55yQJi8Y7Iehfw5pYxx8CbJVR4zfxJ-KWotLsDqg1bIjIfra4qik_QJL4kIUXEV5jQc16yU5-UZVI-Y4f1QOYaBTsSjA4F6bsr0EaJUqBXI0Vl0b4duUGsSF4PhWp5EaTeOGaIp8dOy4KsheaMDP1bjD_lh3vQSJB_bCLdW9LyK0o40bR8EDiZztiu6Q8jtsh-SkBFcIdkSaGarw7HvUMaWfBq-GO8tVLXJ4Qc4ZONWzP5iEGHOzPQWtL8ebmx47m43VpKjX0nfSlcH2T7SxB3_c4vSsjknvaJx99GiM2bDHsDvLHnx8fQkOEN0OdCLMYiQoDICxuKftAm0Nzu69X3m17Y0js8QODK1smlIDWyYW4bezp0sDUgN_G43UnVCg7QrNWvTw79b19e_TYP7pLZKjJ98OPX2NfDv_TY2Vy_4oJPiqPX8T9uTbgYFOMd6ln2ifkAiDOjgqjousjhF91soEuMDTfgF8TN2ic) [**JOIN TEAM MCGUIRE FOR CONGRESS**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=af1df8833cd1403e9d18e034e78e1709&_e=2kq3ja_XHumo-KQONV7jUYNkHUL55yQJi8Y7Iehfw5pYxx8CbJVR4zfxJ-KWotLsDqg1bIjIfra4qik_QJL4kIUXEV5jQc16yU5-UZVI-Y4f1QOYaBTsSjA4F6bsr0EaJUqBXI0Vl0b4duUGsSF4PhWp5EaTeOGaIp8dOy4KsheaMDP1bjD_lh3vQSJB_bCLdW9LyK0o40bR8EDiZztiu6Q8jtsh-SkBFcIdkSaGarw7HvUMaWfBq-GO8tVLXJ4Qc4ZONWzP5iEGHOzPQWtL8ebmx47m43VpKjX0nfSlcH2mQLDcID5vvjgC48mkF-LsMvzUeCa9d5MuhSWVnmJW5GWKGQggRLBtZeCQ8yKuBDoYQOvl0shPH5FHMrBCWoGrAXKOxcDUDzskEzxcLlSB1Lu4jrJFUQA4ey66I9klsE3Nqv_V-OTfaAPV1jNm5nk6PGGZBZ8yi6UmAb6MuNdVcMkigKp10W3sfkjmq7S8j_PCSFPRUEqQ-GITdc-HmUgR)

[**Will you join me in supporting my husband, John McGuire, to represent VA 7 in Washington DC?**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=af1df8833cd1403e9d18e034e78e1709&_e=2kq3ja_XHumo-KQONV7jUYNkHUL55yQJi8Y7Iehfw5pYxx8CbJVR4zfxJ-KWotLsDqg1bIjIfra4qik_QJL4kIUXEV5jQc16yU5-UZVI-Y4f1QOYaBTsSjA4F6bsr0EaJUqBXI0Vl0b4duUGsSF4PhWp5EaTeOGaIp8dOy4KsheaMDP1bjD_lh3vQSJB_bCLdW9LyK0o40bR8EDiZztiu6Q8jtsh-SkBFcIdkSaGarw7HvUMaWfBq-GO8tVLXJ4Qc4ZONWzP5iEGHOzPQWtL8ebmx47m43VpKjX0nfSlcH1ubYJCx0fi5vMG8ILXeovzc42UZp-PTg-8FDbjQn6OGYQm7ebbnk_33MjmbrFHlweq6S3cD3NTZRNPe-gvJ1_b6_VFVA6qTDzvospz4W-K5ICnJFY5T2wW8Ililcyowry_08Z1buCzGUSOBSUydgMGFuydm2lWz4kR4nO5Ve8cUBmtFX0jehnicYHdgzdI5-_Fr3AaUDLP2iz5-Pf_a90W)

name: Team Morgan Harper
subject: Will you stand with Morgan Harper?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is the single most effective way to support our campaign.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211122-407-footer-ak&t=2&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)
In a second [**we’re going to ask you to commit to a recurring monthly donation**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15484?t=3&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)**** — the single most effective way to support our campaign.
**Just a $5 donation per month right now (the price of a tea 🍵, coffee ☕️, or boba 🧋) can make a huge impact — even more than a donation of $1,000 or more a month before our race.** We’ll tell you how.
**Committing****to a monthly recurring donation NOW:** A recurring contribution of just $2, $5, $7 — or anything you can — allows us to plan out bigger and better campaign efforts _right now_ and that translates to a bigger overall impact on our movement. The earlier we receive campaign resources, the sooner we can reach voters across the state of Ohio. We need time to change hearts and minds and ensure that _everyone_ in Ohio knows Morgan’s name. We can also recruit and train more volunteers and hold more events.
**Larger donations LATER:** While still helpful, larger single donations are unpredictable and hard to plan around. The closer we are to the election in 2022, the more condensed our timeline is to get the word out to voters, build rapport, and get folks to show up to the polls to vote for Morgan.
The big idea is that consistency and timing are key to winning this election.
Morgan is up against big-name establishment opponents who can depend on their coffers of million-dollar corporate donations to run ads and reach voters.
On the other hand, we’re a scrappy, grassroots movement and we need to carve a space for ourselves in voters' minds as early as possible. **That’s why monthly recurring contributions, no matter how small, are so impactful.**
[_**Can you start a monthly contribution of anything you can to our campaign right now? We’re quickly approaching the 2022 election year, and your monthly contribution will make a huge difference in our campaign finances.**_ ](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15484?t=4&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)
**[Start a monthly donation](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15485?refcode=em20211122-407&t=5&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)**
Thank you for everything,
Team Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15501?t=6&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

P.S. If you can’t make a recurring contribution at this time we completely understand. Thank you for being a supporter, and for being with us in this movement. [**_If you’d like to make a one-time donation, please click here to do so._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15501?t=7&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211122-407-footer&t=8&refcode2=407_90090_Ifuc1n&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=407%2E90090%2EIfuc1n)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Why We Have to Expand
body:
| Peter -- Tickets are going fast for our Christmas Dinner Event on December 8th. We have to expand seating capacity already. Which is great! **But there's still time to register.** This event will be fun, informative and inspiring. I will present our accomplishments for the year and give you a personal preview of our fights for 2022. Then Kyle Hooten of Alpha News will host a panel discussion with the heroic nurses leading the vaccine mandate resistance in Minnesota. We'll even have Nurse Anna (aka NoJabNurse), the patriotic-flag waving nurse you've seen at all the rallies! To cap things off, Liberty Champion, Rep Erik Mortensen, will give you an inside look of how the Swamp functions in St Paul. You won't hear any other legislator talk like him. Don't miss out! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_2_0&n=1) _Walz and the Political Class are preparing to take more of our liberties away in 2022. They want us to fail and not be organized._ That's why it's important for us to gather ourselves, toast to our accomplishments in 2021 and prepare our army of patriots for the upcoming battles. **Tickets are $50 and includes dinner and a chance to win a non-Biden approved AR-15. Want to make a bigger impact, reserve a table for $1,000 and invite 7 friends to hear our important message.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_2_0&n=2 "REGISTER NOW") [REGISTER NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_2_0&n=2)
---
I'm thrilled to meet with you in person on December 8th and introduce you to our growing team of young liberty professionals.
Our team is thankful for all your support over the past two years. And I think you'll love to hear about the fight we have in store for the Political Class in 2022!
So please join me and the team for an action packed night. Register now, which includes dinner, for $50. Or get a sponsor table for you and seven other guests at $1,000 and help the cause even more!
## **WHEN: Wednesday, Dec 8th (Doors open at 5:00pm)**
## **WHERE: The Mermaid, Mounds View**
## **[YES, I WANT TO REGISTER FOR THIS AWESOME EVENT AND ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN AN AR-15](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_2_0&n=3)**

clean_body: | Peter -- Tickets are going fast for our Christmas Dinner Event on December 8th. We have to expand seating capacity already. Which is great! But there's still time to register. This event will be fun, informative and inspiring. I will present our accomplishments for the year and give you a personal preview of our fights for 2022. Then Kyle Hooten of Alpha News will host a panel discussion with the heroic nurses leading the vaccine mandate resistance in Minnesota. We'll even have Nurse Anna (aka NoJabNurse), the patriotic-flag waving nurse you've seen at all the rallies! To cap things off, Liberty Champion, Rep Erik Mortensen, will give you an inside look of how the Swamp functions in St Paul. You won't hear any other legislator talk like him. Don't miss out! Walz and the Political Class are preparing to take more of our liberties away in 2022. They want us to fail and not be organized. That's why it's important for us to gather ourselves, toast to our accomplishments in 2021 and prepare our army of patriots for the upcoming battles. Tickets are $50 and includes dinner and a chance to win a non-Biden approved AR-15. Want to make a bigger impact, reserve a table for $1,000 and invite 7 friends to hear our important message. | "REGISTER NOW" I'm thrilled to meet with you in person on December 8th and introduce you to our growing team of young liberty professionals. Our team is thankful for all your support over the past two years. And I think you'll love to hear about the fight we have in store for the Political Class in 2022! So please join me and the team for an action packed night. Register now, which includes dinner, for $50. Or get a sponsor table for you and seven other guests at $1,000 and help the cause even more! WHEN: Wednesday, Dec 8th (Doors open at 5:00pm) WHERE: The Mermaid, Mounds View See you on Dec 8th! Jake Duesenberg -=-=- Freedom Email · United States

name: Michael Bennet
subject: “the accidental senator”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ][IMG]

Hello,

In a moment, [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6073?t=1007&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]I will ask you to split a contribution between my campaign
and Tim Ryan’s. But first, can I explain something?

In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for
Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans
called me the “accidental senator.” Even a national political website
greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.”

To say the least, I was not an obvious choice.

And it’s true, I didn’t come from politics. I had never even run for
office. But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people
from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses,
where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with.

So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate,
fighting for the state and country we loved. And that’s exactly what we
did.

But now our Democratic Senate majority is in jeopardy. All Republicans
have to do is flip one seat to retake power, and it’s clear they have
their sights set on Colorado. To make matters worse, we’re way behind our
fundraising goal for the month.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6073?t=1008&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on
you to split a contribution between my campaign and Tim Ryan’s to help us
reach our fundraising goals so we can protect and expand the Senate
majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6073?t=1009&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6074?t=1010&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6075?t=1011&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6076?t=1012&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6077?t=1013&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6073?t=1014&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Other Amount

Tim and I are depending on grassroots folks like you to help us win our
critical races, so I mean it when I say we can’t do this without you.

Thanks,

Michael

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1527%2E3611125%2EqIiHNL

subject: Strong Leadership is Needed to Implement Idaho First Policies
disclaimer_text: paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us
body:
| |

| NOVEMBER 22, 2021
---
[Strong Leadership is Needed to Implement Idaho First Policies](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODI1MDEwMjg1NzkwODk1MDIzJmM9ZDRhNSZlPTAmYj04MDQzMDE2OTcmZD13OXQzajZr.cob7YTvoxg5qSIO5o8ume8sFOEVVXKv5lU10aI3tA-g)
---
| | | [](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODI1MDEwMjg1NzkwODk1MDIzJmM9ZDRhNSZlPTAmYj04MDQzMDE3MDAmZD15M24xcjh2.7eEnHoEu7r4yOTjSZq7UgRsat80IAgVfuTUz7njWXBM)
---
| |
---
| We don't choose who comes to Idaho, the United Nations does. And the "vetting" is anything but acceptable. Our current Governor is taking more refugees into Idaho than 8 other states combined. It's reckless and a betrayal to our workforce in Idaho. We guarantee housing for other people and treat our own people like second-class citizens. Enough is enough. As your next Governor I will BAN it.
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
After another 19-hour day I have to say that it’s hard to put into words my deep disappointment with Idaho’s Senate for failing to deliver ANY solution to this crisis. It’s a deep betrayal to working Idahoans. To see tears in people’s eyes as they related their stories of losing their jobs over the (not allowed to say), was heartbreaking for me. One gentleman tonight was a Navy Veteran who has worked with the same employer for 24-years and is now being let go. This is no way to treat people. This betrayal by our Republican leadership in the Senate is beyond shameful. But we the people have had enough. It’s our time now. We’re going to tear this state government from the special interest groups which dominate it. Then we’ll forge a government FOR THE PEOPLE!
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Principles above politics
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODI1MDEwMjg1NzkwODk1MDIzJmM9ZDRhNSZlPTAmYj04MDQzMDE3MDMmZD1kNW43cTRt.3PWJI9XNcXv4USzgPUaLZIVmOPWhcfiMWcFvNN0y_V0)
---
| |
---
| |
---
## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. [Read Full Refugee Resettlement Policy Summary here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODI1MDEwMjg1NzkwODk1MDIzJmM9ZDRhNSZlPTAmYj04MDQzMDE3MDYmZD1wNXkwaTdz.9bIL7i6tr8eYHezjXk4hz4JZdpBb6lgb3MFK4Fg-Kyc)

|

[Make a contribution](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODI1MDEwMjg1NzkwODk1MDIzJmM9ZDRhNSZlPTAmYj04MDQzMDE3MTImZD1tNmU2cTBt.IpVrrfZGH12UxEFaW7nE0fK61rJlC8rNAXh9VTSEXEw)

| NOVEMBER 20
---
Meridian, Idaho
Such a fun afternoon at our flag waving event! So much support from the community. Thank you to everyone who could attend!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| NOVEMEBER 19
---
Boise Rescue Mission
Thank you so much for everyone’s support to the Boise Rescue Mission’s Thanksgiving Food Drive sponsored by KIDO Talk Radio's (107.5FM/580AM). We were able to raise enough money to buy 67 turkeys!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| NOVEMBER 19
---
Oakley, Idaho
Students AND teachers want school choice. It’s a no brainer. Time to have a Governor who will champion that cause. Thank you for hosting me at Oakley City Hall.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| NOVEMBER 15
---
Buhl, Idaho
Buhl wants a leader who will tackle reckless refugee resettlement. I’ve committed to putting an end to guaranteeing housing for refugees while kicking nurses and teachers out of their homes.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |

| If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow **Patriots.** Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can’t volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Ring ring! It's the Fettermans calling to say THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John and Gisele are both so THANKFUL for your support this year.
#
Derek,
John + Gisele Fetterman are both so THANKFUL for this team’s support this year.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37595?refcode=em20211122-3566&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3566%2E434096%2EtSIIb-)
_"We are both so thankful!"_
They're _seriously_ grateful for all your dedicated support, Derek.
**That's why, in the spirit of the Thanksgiving holiday, they'd like to give you a phone call soon to personally say thank you for being in their corner.**
[**_So Derek, if your budget allows, will you donate your first $5 to support our campaign to flip Pennsylvania blue? John and Gisele are planning on personally calling a handful of grassroots donors who chip in before the month is out to say thank you._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37595?refcode=em20211122-3566&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3566%2E434096%2EtSIIb-)

In gratitude, 🦃
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ

name: Eli Bremer
subject: I Don't Believe It...
body:
Just when you thought it couldn’t get worse
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-y/)
---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-j/)
| | | This can’t be real....
**President Biden wants to give $450,000 to each person who arrives ILLEGALLY at our border.**
This administration has already made it clear they have no interest in enforcing our laws; now, they want to incentivize breaking them.
**_[We need new leadership in Washington. If you think this is insane, can you contribute to my campaign to bring common sense back?](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-t/)_**

---
[DONATE $200 NOW](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-i/)
[DONATE $100 NOW](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-d/)
[DONATE $50 NOW](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-h/)
[DONATE $10 NOW](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-k/)

**To put it in context, families of 9/11 victims were given less than half of that sum.**
This is all happening while our prices are soaring and American families are struggling to make ends meet. Where is the help for the struggling American families that follow the rules?
This administration has truly outdone itself this time. We need change, top to bottom. _[We can’t afford to have President Biden in office, nor can we afford people like Michael Bennet who mindlessly support his every move.](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-u/)_
**[Together we are going to get this country, and Colorado, back on track.](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlgtl-ykykmujid-o/)**

subject: Pingree votes to tax, spend, and raise energy prices!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Ed Thelander cares about Maine and is ready to help. | | | |
---
| | |
#### Good News For Maine
---
|
---
| Folks,

I'm running for Congress because I believe Congresswoman Chellie Pingree has been a disaster for Mainers.

**Just last week, Pingree voted for a MASSIVE DC tax & spend bill that will hurt the people of our state. In fact, Pingree votes with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time! The Pelosi-Pingree-Biden agenda is wreaking havoc, and it’s time for a change.**

I did not spend 21 years as a Navy SEAL to watch the Democrat party fundamentally change our country. I will not stand by as our country goes down the tubes due to the reckless arrogance of today’s politicians.

With her latest vote, Pingree is delivering a terrible Christmas present for folks in our district: huge tax hikes, massive spending increases which will fuel runaway inflation, and higher energy costs as Maine moves into winter.

We need a representative in Congress who will fight for working people, not stick us with the bill for their ridiculously expensive social experiments.

I strongly oppose her vote, and I would ask that you spread the word to your friends and neighbors. I’ll fight for you and your family, just as I always have.

Ed Thelander
.
---
| [But now I need you to join my fight to send Chellie Pingree packing: could you please click here and donate to my campaign against Pingree?](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=99ea343120&e=f8a0a76a2b "But now I need you to join my fight to send Chellie Pingree packing: could you please click here and donate to my campaign against Pingree?")
---
| I'm running to make your lives better, and I need resources to do it.

Many thanks for your support.

Ed Thelander
Candidate for Congress in Maine's First Congressional District.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Warns 14 Counties in Five States to Clean Voter Registration Lists or Face Federal Lawsuits
body:
The NVRA requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 22, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26307&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctMTQtY291bnRpZXMtNS1zdGF0ZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Judicial Watch Warns 14 Counties in Five States to Clean Voter Registration Lists or Face Federal Lawsuits](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26307&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctMTQtY291bnRpZXMtNS1zdGF0ZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** The NVRA requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. Among other things, the NVRA requires registrations to be cancelled when voters fail to respond to address confirmation notices and then fail to vote in the next two general federal elections. In 2018, the Supreme Court confirmed that such removals are mandatory (Husted v. A. Philip Randolph Inst., 138 S. Ct. 1833, 1841-42 (2018)). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26307&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctMTQtY291bnRpZXMtNS1zdGF0ZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26347&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tdHJhdmVsLWV4cGVuc2VzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[Judicial Watch: Records Show Secret Service Travel Costs of $2,252,600.50 For President Biden](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26347&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tdHJhdmVsLWV4cGVuc2VzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** “The costs of presidential travel and security is of obvious public interest,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “It is frustrating that after years of litigation through two presidential administrations, the Secret Service and Air Force are still stonewalling the costs of presidential travel.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26347&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tdHJhdmVsLWV4cGVuc2VzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26324&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24taW52ZXN0cy02Ni01LW1pbC10by1zdHJlbmd0aGVuLXZhY2NpbmUtY29uZmlkZW5jZS1hbW9uZy1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[Biden Administration Invests $66.5 Mil to “Strengthen Vaccine Confidence” Among Minorities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26324&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24taW52ZXN0cy02Ni01LW1pbC10by1zdHJlbmd0aGVuLXZhY2NpbmUtY29uZmlkZW5jZS1hbW9uZy1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** In the next few months the Biden administration is doling out $66.5 million to community organizations and “minority-serving institutions” that will help “strengthen vaccine confidence” among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities. The allocation is part of a broader, $143.5 million initiative launched by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) this month to “address barriers to COVID-19 vaccination.” Under the plan an HHS offshoot called Health Resources and Services Administration that aims to “achieve health equity” will keep disbursing funds throughout the fiscal year to expand “community-based efforts” to vaccinate minorities. “We have seen great progress in vaccination rates in recent months, but we know our work isn’t done in addressing misinformation and ensuring equitable access in underserved communities,” HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra said. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26324&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24taW52ZXN0cy02Ni01LW1pbC10by1zdHJlbmd0aGVuLXZhY2NpbmUtY29uZmlkZW5jZS1hbW9uZy1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26346&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2hlcmlmZi1zdWVkLWZvci1yZXBvcnRpbmctaWxsZWdhbC1hbGllbi1jcmltaW5hbHMtdG8taWNlLWNvbXBvdW5kaW5nLXJhY2lhbC1kaXNwYXJpdGllcy1pbi1wb2xpY2luZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Sheriff Sued for Reporting Illegal Alien Criminals to ICE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26346&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2hlcmlmZi1zdWVkLWZvci1yZXBvcnRpbmctaWxsZWdhbC1hbGllbi1jcmltaW5hbHMtdG8taWNlLWNvbXBvdW5kaW5nLXJhY2lhbC1kaXNwYXJpdGllcy1pbi1wb2xpY2luZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** In a distressing sign of the times, the official elected to enforce the law in a major U.S. County is being sued for transferring illegal immigrant criminals to federal authorities. Collaborating with the feds—rather than releasing illegal alien offenders back into the community—compounds racial disparities in the policing, immigration, and criminal justice systems, in which black and Latinx communities are disproportionately targeted for arrest, detention, and deportation. At least that is what the leftist civil rights group that filed the lawsuit this week claims. The scary part is that the local law enforcement agency will probably lose the legal battle because the entire state is a sanctuary for illegal immigrants and official measures have been enacted to protect the undocumented from deportation. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26346&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2hlcmlmZi1zdWVkLWZvci1yZXBvcnRpbmctaWxsZWdhbC1hbGllbi1jcmltaW5hbHMtdG8taWNlLWNvbXBvdW5kaW5nLXJhY2lhbC1kaXNwYXJpdGllcy1pbi1wb2xpY2luZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch pushes five states to clean voter rolls, or face federal lawsuits ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctanVzdC10aGUtbmV3cy12b3RlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Just the News The most recent report and datasets from the states were released in August, and the letters notify officials that the states' reported data indicate that the counties in question removed an "absurdly low" or "impossible" number of inactive voter registrations. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctanVzdC10aGUtbmV3cy12b3RlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---
### [Biden Delaware trips cost taxpayers about $3M in Secret Service alone ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26349&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tdHJpcHMtM20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) The New York Post “The costs of presidential travel and security is of obvious public interest,” said Tom Fitton, the president of Judicial Watch, which acquired the records under the Freedom of Information Act.
Fitton noted that the records are incomplete and said “it is frustrating that after years of litigation through two presidential administrations, the Secret Service and Air Force are still stonewalling the costs of presidential travel.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57177&L=26349&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tdHJpcHMtM20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---

clean_body: The NVRA requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 22, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == The NVRA requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. Among other things, the NVRA requires registrations to be cancelled when voters fail to respond to address confirmation notices and then fail to vote in the next two general federal elections. In 2018, the Supreme Court confirmed that such removals are mandatory (Husted v. A. Philip Randolph Inst., 138 S. Ct. 1833, 1841-42 (2018)). == ---|--- | | | | = | = “The costs of presidential travel and security is of obvious public interest,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “It is frustrating that after years of litigation through two presidential administrations, the Secret Service and Air Force are still stonewalling the costs of presidential travel.” = ---|--- | | | | = | = In the next few months the Biden administration is doling out $66.5 million to community organizations and “minority-serving institutions” that will help “strengthen vaccine confidence” among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities. The allocation is part of a broader, $143.5 million initiative launched by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) this month to “address barriers to COVID-19 vaccination.” Under the plan an HHS offshoot called Health Resources and Services Administration that aims to “achieve health equity” will keep disbursing funds throughout the fiscal year to expand “community-based efforts” to vaccinate minorities. “We have seen great progress in vaccination rates in recent months, but we know our work isn’t done in addressing misinformation and ensuring equitable access in underserved communities,” HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra said. = ---|--- | | | | | In a distressing sign of the times, the official elected to enforce the law in a major U.S. County is being sued for transferring illegal immigrant criminals to federal authorities. Collaborating with the feds—rather than releasing illegal alien offenders back into the community—compounds racial disparities in the policing, immigration, and criminal justice systems, in which black and Latinx communities are disproportionately targeted for arrest, detention, and deportation. At least that is what the leftist civil rights group that filed the lawsuit this week claims. The scary part is that the local law enforcement agency will probably lose the legal battle because the entire state is a sanctuary for illegal immigrants and official measures have been enacted to protect the undocumented from deportation. ---|--- | | | == Just the News The most recent report and datasets from the states were released in August, and the letters notify officials that the states' reported data indicate that the counties in question removed an "absurdly low" or "impossible" number of inactive voter registrations. == == The New York Post “The costs of presidential travel and security is of obvious public interest,” said Tom Fitton, the president of Judicial Watch, which acquired the records under the Freedom of Information Act. Fitton noted that the records are incomplete and said “it is frustrating that after years of litigation through two presidential administrations, the Secret Service and Air Force are still stonewalling the costs of presidential travel.” == Judicial Watch When it comes to investigating government corruption, Judicial Watch is on the forefront. One of the organization’s latest investigations looks at the COVID crisis, where it is seeking to uncover potential conflicts of interest that might have affected or might be affecting the work of Dr. Fauci’s agency, the National Institutes of Health. = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

body:

| | We email you every day about the WORST Republicans.

But team, we need to know exactly what our best grassroots supporters think... **So we’re asking for 1,000 responses by midnight:**

**FIRST:** Republicans echoed and amplified Donald Trump’s Big Lie.

**THEN:** Far-right Senators REFUSED to hold Trump accountable for his violent Jan. 6 coup attempt!

**NOW:** MAGA Republicans are proposing -- and passing! -- hundreds of voter suppression bills all across the country DESIGNED to rig the rules in their favor.

To defeat these anti-Democracy Republicans, we need an unified effort _right now._

**So please, be one of the 1,000 Democrats we need to respond to our[ANTI‐REPUBLICAN FLASH POLL](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/anti-gop_flash_poll/?refcode=VPP_20211122_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=947%2E878179%2EUFJMMb) by midnight.**

name: Marco Rubio (personal)
subject: I only have 10 min..
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I have 10 minutes of free time this morning, Peter.
|
---
| | | I have 10 minutes of free time this morning, Peter. It may not seem like much time, but I've been working long hours to defend conservative values in the Senate, and openings like this in my schedule are rare.

So I just had to take advantage of these 10 minutes to update you on this...

Right now, my opponent is 2 points away from me in the race that will decide control of the Senate. Listen, I hate to think about this but Florida's last Senate race was decided by 0.2% and I was just rated as one of the most vulnerable Senators. Peter, the stakes are higher than ever.

That's why I need each and every person who sees this to join my team. I'm so thankful for everyone that stepped up so far and joined me in the fight to take back the Senate, but we need everyone on board. And that includes you -- Peter.

I'm almost out of time and I have to run to my next meeting here shortly, so I hate to end this email so suddenly, but if you believe in conservative values and want to take back the Senate, will you give $18 today? Here is the best link to give at:

**[http://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/only-10-minutes](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58847356:6xoHq52NN:m:1:3298722022:532CC4BE2F59BBB8FAF4C3E137DA847B:r "http://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/only-10-minutes")**

Thank you for your support!

Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58847357:6xoHq52NN:m:1:3298722022:532CC4BE2F59BBB8FAF4C3E137DA847B:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58847357:6xoHq52NN:m:1:3298722022:532CC4BE2F59BBB8FAF4C3E137DA847B:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: ACQUITTED ⚖️
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58847351:JHsS552Ns:m:1:3253819041:EE62CCCBDB61C9D7EE05C961186D1F9A:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58847351:JHsS552Ns:m:1:3253819041:EE62CCCBDB61C9D7EE05C961186D1F9A:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58847351:JHsS552Ns:m:1:3253819041:EE62CCCBDB61C9D7EE05C961186D1F9A:r)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse

name: National Republican Polling
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3pru02o33nj51etivaqevevhk398l661ccuvfg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmaoj6c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zajurtc61fdmepva1gm37k0b8jid8tc3ga010ge0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmaoj6c9h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvsq7pkncfa1ugkh839n313q5ris7lfqhjik54mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmaoj6c9h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2nihkh8j9ns64e9n17ip6v7kbv82fme4mdvrdm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmapj4s9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi8bp588q6imruu3c48qekkmkibl20fe21a95cag_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmapj4s9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsnofvm44rd1ntnb3nqck155kti885pg0qk155k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmapj4s9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Connie Weiss
subject: No End in Sight on High Fuel Prices
body:
The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zes0kjaoa3e6haqn8gsoaabg3dmnc93u0m84hllo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmaoj6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf7crmmgo6cc30ehhr0tb0etjr0sj0s3im9o35e1q36oj4eaqbfddhmhpr8d32m3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo75ddjcup7aphksapm8ptgmlin49fg)

| | | |
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt930go2foi245d3e8j94jec1n5bn0km8idni3to_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhmaoj6c3h2bs)
No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: They're voting away our liberties, check this out Peter
body:
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,

The subject line of my email to you today may have you thinking I'm talking about leftist liberals voting our liberties away (after all, that is 100% an accurate statement).

But would it shock you if I was actually talking about Republicans?

What if I told you that it's been happening right here in our district all along?

I'll come back to that in a moment...

The cold hard truth is this: In order to further President Trump's Save America & America First agenda, we must make sure we have proper Republican representation for Congressional District 8.

Personally, I do not want to see another moderate Republican Congressman vote our liberties and money away.

This is why I will represent one of the most conservative districts in Texas with real conservative values.

Back to what has been happening in our district...

Can any of my opponents that have been teaming up with these moderate republicans, (as well as ambitiously grooming themselves for years to run for office), truthfully say that?

But please, Peter, don't take my word for it.

I'd like to invite you to check out the liberty scores (voting records) of the Republicans who have been representing you.

Seeing is believing.

name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Get Involved!
body:
Support Geoff Diehl for Governor
| | | | |
---
---
BE A DELEGATE FOR DIEHL
---
| | |
---|---
|

On May 21, 2022, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold its state convention in Springfield, MA. At this event, Republicans across the state will vote for which candidates for statewide office best represent their values.

We are so honored by the outpouring of support Republicans have shown to the Diehl campaign. We hope that YOU will become a delegate for Diehl. How do you do this?

1. Check your Voter Registration: You must be a registered Republican by December 31, 2021 in order to be eligible. You can find your voter registration(and change it to Republican if you'd like) here: [Check My Voter Registration](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YcPAzA-iG7JUdKl4RWniOU6nUobCC-R6G-ptrG8r06vTBr7KaqijyKoP49se2-S_RKV5Cx540Wo-Uo3QoLXQt4j7JBGdHzbams9cAJ9A_UX-bsYo_wM5yv7IhISwzxavAREfKAEeMsk4Gj3hsatAPMDn54MgbThdRGWzK1lpjZsmqRKrAfcjH4yRJnYVAxU1GxVLyMa0LXCT7ud34D3pCw==&c=QG8ExZSZE7lyWE-azZsikLHM-9qs4GLhDJIyKsy0nOVMEOJjXfiP2w==&ch=7fBKP2Ctznp50hoH0suc8KQF-9I6UAKCVFad5j-ffRswN55AbAU4hw==)

2. Join Your Local Republican Town Committee: These groups will hold meetings in February of 2022 to select the delegates from their town to the state convention. To find the contact information for your local committee, check out this link: [List of Republican Committees](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YcPAzA-iG7JUdKl4RWniOU6nUobCC-R6G-ptrG8r06vTBr7KaqijyKuwA28YWFD3Dj1nJJjKR3MQxSBUg3THdpzl8-zYNPXifh8gmK32H19tyqw7B3V8EqYWHG2MgVa6WZ5wl7TgUedgO5XoX808lrdZRDhdhj_Y&c=QG8ExZSZE7lyWE-azZsikLHM-9qs4GLhDJIyKsy0nOVMEOJjXfiP2w==&ch=7fBKP2Ctznp50hoH0suc8KQF-9I6UAKCVFad5j-ffRswN55AbAU4hw==), and select "Local Party Committees/Republican" from the drop down menu.
|
---
|
---
| JOIN THE DIEHL CAMPAIGN TEAM
---
---
You can also get involved in supporting Geoff for Governor by spreading the word to your contacts around the state to follow his campaign, and joining in the movement.
The Diehl website allows voters to subscribe for campaign updates, see upcoming events, groups to join and volunteer, and, there's even a Spanish version of the site for our Spanish-speaking friends who want to learn about Geoff's campaign.
Check out the website here:
---
| [Diehl for Massachusetts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YcPAzA-iG7JUdKl4RWniOU6nUobCC-R6G-ptrG8r06vTBr7KaqijyPqaSii5_Kyzc6685Hs2mTw9NgBXzCpJcH_5h9ATyGGUh1r61AG1tE7jL4Uu5gw9uux6tATceAR7S9VrV2WOnSDXpwSRAr36dA==&c=QG8ExZSZE7lyWE-azZsikLHM-9qs4GLhDJIyKsy0nOVMEOJjXfiP2w==&ch=7fBKP2Ctznp50hoH0suc8KQF-9I6UAKCVFad5j-ffRswN55AbAU4hw==)
---
| |
---
---
| DONATE TO DIEHL
Contributions to the campaign help us spread our message further across the state. Please donate if you are able:
By check: Diehl for Massachusetts, 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606,
or
Online: [Donate to the Diehl Campaign ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YcPAzA-iG7JUdKl4RWniOU6nUobCC-R6G-ptrG8r06vTBr7KaqijyJPqC98kcLD72LCqEJQXQby5XKkrmUo3ljMvyurl3rkb-DckGlJU-WbOu73PT-IEpPRm1HCyQL61geSXqpaVANIf8dbdNtZpbIRlSBDDK4NXl6hIcPO-EEUAdKKQYlFgDw==&c=QG8ExZSZE7lyWE-azZsikLHM-9qs4GLhDJIyKsy0nOVMEOJjXfiP2w==&ch=7fBKP2Ctznp50hoH0suc8KQF-9I6UAKCVFad5j-ffRswN55AbAU4hw==)

---
| |
---
|
---
|

|
---
| | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: DOJ Treats Parents as Terrorists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
We knew Attorney General Merrick Garland was an incompetent partisan, but new whistleblower evidence says Garland may be a crimi
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| |
---
We knew Attorney General Merrick Garland was an incompetent partisan, but _**new whistleblower evidence says Garland may be a criminal, too**_.

In October, we learned that the Biden White House conspired with woke special interests to sic the FBI on concerned parents and brand them **“domestic terrorists.”** Amid the public backlash against this abuse of power, Garland told Congress the Justice Department would never weaponize the Patriot Act to tyrannize parents in this way.

But now, a whistleblower inside DOJ has come forward with hard evidence contradicting Garland’s sworn testimony. **Documents show the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division (!) has indeed opened investigations, at Garland’s direction.** They are categorizing parents’ free speech with an FBI “threat tag.”

**[Please help the Freedom Caucus stop the lies now!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh2s3mj8gcrv17flos95hkmlagf9i4683noaq1c0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhm1o76c1h2bs)**

This is tyranny, plain and simple. That’s why they’re hiding it. That’s why Garland lied about it. The same people who opened our borders and ignited a national crime wave is cracking down on moms and dads defending their kids from racist propaganda and sexual predators.

Conservatives in the House Freedom Caucus are doing everything they can to unearth the truth and fight Garland’s abuse of power. But until we can win back the House, we cannot issue subpoenas or compel testimony, or finally reform our politicized Justice Department.

**[That’s where the House Freedom Fund comes in.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5k80oqec848ljtbk69r1f4pa35i59935r120nqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhm1o76c1h2bs)**

When – not if – Republicans win control of Congress next year, it won’t be enough to have another Democrat-lite majority. To make America great again, _**we need to take the fight for America to the Left.**_

Only principled, fighting conservatives can be trusted to finish the fight against Joe Biden’s socialist bullies. And only HFF will call out the Republican candidates not worth supporting. In the primaries, in the general election, and then in 2023, we will fight for you.

[**Click here to see our candidates.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1m9lbvjida0n1ersitsed6dl8imihpvdlqnv0e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhm1o76c1h2bs)

[**Click here to support our cause.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr7hrm3nm0914nhoirgn74focoichbi6frutdje8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdhm1o76c1h2bs)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing to much to fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,
Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

clean_body: We knew Attorney General Merrick Garland was an incompetent partisan, but new whistleblower evidence says Garland may be a crimi | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- | | We knew Attorney General Merrick Garland was an incompetent partisan, but new whistleblower evidence says Garland may be a criminal, too. In October, we learned that the Biden White House conspired with woke special interests to sic the FBI on concerned parents and brand them “domestic terrorists.” Amid the public backlash against this abuse of power, Garland told Congress the Justice Department would never weaponize the Patriot Act to tyrannize parents in this way. But now, a whistleblower inside DOJ has come forward with hard evidence contradicting Garland’s sworn testimony. Documents show the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division (!) has indeed opened investigations, at Garland’s direction. They are categorizing parents’ free speech with an FBI “threat tag.” This is tyranny, plain and simple. That’s why they’re hiding it. That’s why Garland lied about it. The same people who opened our borders and ignited a national crime wave is cracking down on moms and dads defending their kids from racist propaganda and sexual predators. Conservatives in the House Freedom Caucus are doing everything they can to unearth the truth and fight Garland’s abuse of power. But until we can win back the House, we cannot issue subpoenas or compel testimony, or finally reform our politicized Justice Department. When – not if – Republicans win control of Congress next year, it won’t be enough to have another Democrat-lite majority. To make America great again, we need to take the fight for America to the Left. Only principled, fighting conservatives can be trusted to finish the fight against Joe Biden’s socialist bullies. And only HFF will call out the Republican candidates not worth supporting. In the primaries, in the general election, and then in 2023, we will fight for you. Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing to much to fight for conservative leadership in Washington. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund | FREEDOM CAUCUS CANDIDATES | END OF THE MONTH COUNTDOWN | | "The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) | House Freedom Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision, Peter ✔️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58848986:JtN4jU2DN:m:1:3253819041:6E612F4F419F7ECDF2BD498263983E89:r)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58848986:JtN4jU2DN:m:1:3253819041:6E612F4F419F7ECDF2BD498263983E89:r "please rush an
emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58848986:JtN4jU2DN:m:1:3253819041:6E612F4F419F7ECDF2BD498263983E89:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58848986:JtN4jU2DN:m:1:3253819041:6E612F4F419F7ECDF2BD498263983E89:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58848986:JtN4jU2DN:m:1:3253819041:6E612F4F419F7ECDF2BD498263983E89:r)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58848986:JtN4jU2DN:m:1:3253819041:6E612F4F419F7ECDF2BD498263983E89:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION to **29910************************************

Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58848986:JtN4jU2DN:m:1:3253819041:6E612F4F419F7ECDF2BD498263983E89:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbggpbpj467v639qt68uitqhluptiipqskdpatsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdjm0or4c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8imodoumkm76du1a5fti1jmqfqmtl8asfhnphpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdjm0or4c1h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5gor1dp1difhsm5cpc5f781bm9hrekm740h9d4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdjm0or4c1h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
