clean_body: Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup | | | | | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | Warm Regards, Larry P. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of Nov. 22nd: Stop the communist nominee & more!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* National: Stop the “Build Back Socialist” bill and oppose the OCC nominee in the Senate!
* National: Encourage House GOP’s probe into 2020 election grants
* Local: Sign up for our candidate training – new price of only $39!
* Recommended Reading & Listening
* Reminders about school board webinars and defending doctors

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**National: Stop the “Build Back Socialist” bill and oppose the OCC nominee in the Senate!**
**Stop the “Build Back Socialist bill in the Senate**
After the 13 traitors in the GOP passed the so-called “infrastructure” bill in the House, it paved the way for the “Build Back Socialist” Reconciliation bill to pass, and pass the House it did.

The last line of defense is now the Senate, and Sens. Manchin and Sinema are the only two Senators standing in the way of this passing. This is a precarious place to be, but it is the reality.

We must all call both of our Senators and demand they vote no. It’s especially important if you live in West Virginia or Arizona, but it’s important for everyone to do this.

**Stop the OCC nominee, Suale Omarova!**
The nominee for Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) is the most radically radical nominee for that position every in our history. For instance, she wants to eliminate private banking, and make the federal government the only bank around.

Read this: [Why Americans need to speak up and speak against OCC nominee Saule Omarova](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9odW1hbmV2ZW50cy5jb20vMjAyMS8xMS8xOS93aHktYW1lcmljYW5zLW5lZWQtdG8tc3BlYWstdXAtYW5kLXNwZWFrLWFnYWluc3Qtb2NjLW5vbWluZWUtc2F1bGUtb21hcm92YS8_bWlkPTQ0NjA3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=r5wyuToFZbaogWRPCyrIZg).

She is a communist, a proud communist, and she must be defeated.

When you call your Senators, you can give them both of these messages in one phone call and save yourself some time.

[**Find your Senators’ phone numbers.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZmluZC1zZW5hdG9ycz9taWQ9NDQ2MDcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Tj588a_5vB6drdW_LLxPDg)
|
---
**National: Encourage House GOP’s probe into 2020 election grants**
Read this article first: [GOP demands probe into why Democratic operatives got federal grants to turn out 2020 vote.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvbm92LzE5L2dvcC1kZW1hbmRzLXByb2JlLWZlZGVyYWwtZ3JhbnRzLWRlbW9jcmF0aWMtb3BlcmF0Lz9taWQ9NDQ2MDcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=77tHP2HeBJjnaalg6VaJlw)
** **
Then, call your GOP Representative (and if you don’t have a GOP Rep., call Kevin McCarthy’s office), and encourage them to continue down this road, and to not let up. Too many times, a letter is sent, or a hearing occurs, but nothing comes out of it. No one is held accountable and nothing changes. Thank them for beginning this inquiry, and encourage them to do more about it.

You can find your Rep.’s phone number [here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQ0NjA3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=3Ql0yR0BL77vVLrY73GYQw), and for those calling Kevin McCarthy, his phone number is (202) 225-2915. For McCarthy, you will likely need to leave a message because high profile elected officials tend to make everyone leave a message, rather than have someone answering phones.
|
---
**Local: Sign up for our candidate training – new price of only $39!**
Even if you don’t know if you want to run for school board or city council, etc., attending our one-day training will help you decide, and if you decide to run, **you’ll be equipped to win.** You might also be a person who is going to help someone else run for office – this training is for you as well! [**Sign up today!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvY2FuZGlkYXRlLXRyYWluaW5nP21pZD00NDYwNyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ztzvKBhIMsGTMntkjWqHRA)

Also, some really exciting news! A very generous donor believes this is such a worthwhile cause that the cost of the training has dropped from $79 to just $39! That $39 just allows us to break even on the cost of the venue and the food and beverages provided.

Think about how amazing it was last Tuesday when so many patriots won local elections, beating out long-time, corrupt incumbents. That is how we take back our country – and that means [we need patriots to step up and get trained](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvY2FuZGlkYXRlLXRyYWluaW5nP21pZD00NDYwNyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ak_FQmcW_c9GbKvmvPMGWA).

Again, you don’t have to be 100% committed to running yet. Sign up – it’s only $39 – go to the training, and see what you think when the day is over.

Lastly, do you know someone who has expressed interest in running for local office? Or, are there people in your life that you just know should run? Send them this email! **Tell them to[get signed up](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvY2FuZGlkYXRlLXRyYWluaW5nP21pZD00NDYwNyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=UtwrRYx6fQOX4_iVlrGx1g) and help save our country!**
|
---
**Recommended Reading**
Penn Wharton Budget Model: [Assessment of the spending in the “Build Back Socialist” bill.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9idWRnZXRtb2RlbC53aGFydG9uLnVwZW5uLmVkdS9pc3N1ZXMvMjAyMS8xMS80L21hY3JvLWVmZmVjdHMtb2YtYnVpbGQtYmFjay1iZXR0ZXItcmVjb25jaWxpYXRpb24tcGFja2FnZT9taWQ9NDQ2MDcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1EPnwYIr5QoBiXnCLSKgzg) Short summary of the article:
1. Penn Wharton produced a new report yesterday, indicating that says that if all of the provisions of the bill (except green energy tax cuts) are made permanent, new spending would increase by $3.98 trillion over 10 years. That’s more than TWICE what Biden has been saying.
2. Penn Wharton says this level of spending would increase the federal debt 25.2%.
3. The report also says that this monstrous bill would reduce GDP 2.8% compared with current law by 2050.
4. So, more spending, massively more debt, and a reduction in productivity.

|
---
**Reminders about school boards and defending doctors**
* You can watch all of our school board webinars at your convenience. The first one [**here**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9nby9yZXBsYXkvMTMva3l3a3pmcmhrcmkyczE_bWlkPTQ0NjA3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=X58Gs_eB5kb-oVWQsz3Kwg)**,** and the second one [**here**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZXBsYXkvMjYvMzN3cHlmbG5iOTNmeHdmcnc_bWlkPTQ0NjA3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=m6n6Z-XhQQvjAetWkYbKhw)**.** The third one about the NSBA is [**here**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9saXZlLzM5L3pnMWwyYXgzZjE3ZnlsenNnMzk_bWlkPTQ0NjA3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=pI-6Oy_IrOmj2UvZKko7hA)**.**
* If you haven’t yet contacted the medical boards and associations to reprimand them for threatening doctors who prescribe medicines like Ivermectin, **please do so this week!** [**Use our guide**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzI3LTJhYjIxYzJiODM0NzQ2NmZhNjQ5ZWQwOTJjODA1MWFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1NUT1AtTWVkaWNhbC1NYW5kYXRlcy1Db250YWN0LU1lZGljYWwtQm9hcmRzLWFuZC1Bc3NvY2lhdGlvbnMucGRmP21pZD00NDYwNyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=dWXybINBracf-rwmK_f6Tw) to help you know who to contact and what to say when you email or call. These doctors are risking their careers for us, the least we can do is send an email or make a call on their behalf! A doctor in Washington has had his license suspended for treating Covid patients; a doctor in Idaho has had a complaint filed against him with the state medical board – trying to take his license – specifically for prescribing Ivermectin for Covid patients. It is happening, and these doctors will not be able to help us if we do not help them.

|

National: Encourage House GOP’s probe into 2020 election grants Local: Sign up for our candidate training – new price of only $39! Recommended Reading & Listening Reminders about school board webinars and defending doctors See below for details! Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | National: Stop the “Build Back Socialist” bill and oppose the OCC nominee in the Senate! Stop the “Build Back Socialist bill in the Senate After the 13 traitors in the GOP passed the so-called “infrastructure” bill in the House, it paved the way for the “Build Back Socialist” Reconciliation bill to pass, and pass the House it did. The last line of defense is now the Senate, and Sens. Manchin and Sinema are the only two Senators standing in the way of this passing. This is a precarious place to be, but it is the reality. We must all call both of our Senators and demand they vote no. It’s especially important if you live in West Virginia or Arizona, but it’s important for everyone to do this. Stop the OCC nominee, Suale Omarova! The nominee for Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) is the most radically radical nominee for that position every in our history. For instance, she wants to eliminate private banking, and make the federal government the only bank around. Read this: . She is a communist, a proud communist, and she must be defeated. When you call your Senators, you can give them both of these messages in one phone call and save yourself some time. | National: Encourage House GOP’s probe into 2020 election grants Read this article first: Then, call your GOP Representative (and if you don’t have a GOP Rep., call Kevin McCarthy’s office), and encourage them to continue down this road, and to not let up. Too many times, a letter is sent, or a hearing occurs, but nothing comes out of it. No one is held accountable and nothing changes. Thank them for beginning this inquiry, and encourage them to do more about it. You can find your Rep.’s phone number , and for those calling Kevin McCarthy, his phone number is (202) 225-2915. For McCarthy, you will likely need to leave a message because high profile elected officials tend to make everyone leave a message, rather than have someone answering phones. | Local: Sign up for our candidate training – new price of only $39! Even if you don’t know if you want to run for school board or city council, etc., attending our one-day training will help you decide, and if you decide to run, you’ll be equipped to win. You might also be a person who is going to help someone else run for office – this training is for you as well! Also, some really exciting news! A very generous donor believes this is such a worthwhile cause that the cost of the training has dropped from $79 to just $39! That $39 just allows us to break even on the cost of the venue and the food and beverages provided. Think about how amazing it was last Tuesday when so many patriots won local elections, beating out long-time, corrupt incumbents. That is how we take back our country – and that means . Again, you don’t have to be 100% committed to running yet. Sign up – it’s only $39 – go to the training, and see what you think when the day is over. Lastly, do you know someone who has expressed interest in running for local office? Or, are there people in your life that you just know should run? Send them this email! Tell them to and help save our country! | Recommended Reading Penn Wharton Budget Model: Short summary of the article: 1. Penn Wharton produced a new report yesterday, indicating that says that if all of the provisions of the bill (except green energy tax cuts) are made permanent, new spending would increase by $3.98 trillion over 10 years. That’s more than TWICE what Biden has been saying. 2. Penn Wharton says this level of spending would increase the federal debt 25.2%. 3. The report also says that this monstrous bill would reduce GDP 2.8% compared with current law by 2050. 4. So, more spending, massively more debt, and a reduction in productivity. | Reminders about school boards and defending doctors You can watch all of our school board webinars at your convenience. The first one , and the second one . The third one about the NSBA is . If you haven’t yet contacted the medical boards and associations to reprimand them for threatening doctors who prescribe medicines like Ivermectin, please do so this week! to help you know who to contact and what to say when you email or call. These doctors are risking their careers for us, the least we can do is send an email or make a call on their behalf! A doctor in Washington has had his license suspended for treating Covid patients; a doctor in Idaho has had a complaint filed against him with the state medical board – trying to take his license – specifically for prescribing Ivermectin for Covid patients. It is happening, and these doctors will not be able to help us if we do not help them. | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | **

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: we need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. And I have a proven record that shows progressive values are good for business:
1. I brought together the public/private partnership to build the Bucks Arena and the Deer District surrounding the arena.
2. As part of the agreement, I led the workforce development efforts to make sure that people often left out of major construction work got a chance to expand skills, find jobs, and build wealth.

**While others just talk about raising wages, I turned my words into actions.** I led negotiations for a historic project labor agreement that included provisions to hire women and minorities that are often underrepresented among union workers, and we also ensured a $15 minimum wage for all arena workers once it was built.

I've put progressive values into action, and now I’m running to unseat Ron Johnson and strengthen our Senate majority. And I’m asking for your support today.

Alex Lasry

GOP legislators drew new district lines with minimal public input — and now, they’ve passed maps aimed at securing their supermajorities in Raleigh and granting Republicans _at least_ 9 of our 14 congressional districts.
**Their maps even got an _F RATING_ for partisanship from the Princeton Gerrymandering Project.**
Most disturbingly, the maps blatantly target Black voters in an attempt to diminish their political power.
Peter, what do you think? Was this redistricting process fair?

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: BREAKING: AOC Isn’t Happy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58850089:JrI-TU2NA:m:1:3103520637:74976564DF161FE7E2D0E736A3A9D423:r "Headline") Peter, Liberals in Congress passed a bloated and ridiculous "infrastructure" bill, earmarking $1.2 trillion of your money for their pet projects. Unfortunately, for AOC, the bill didn't go far enough, and she is heartbroken. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58850089:JrI-TU2NA:m:1:3103520637:74976564DF161FE7E2D0E736A3A9D423:r "AOC")I voted against this bill because it is terrible for the American people. **I want to SAVE America from Joe Biden 's out-of-control spending, and for that, I am called a monster.** But when AOC voted against this bill because it only spends $1.2 Trillion of your money on liberal policies, she is applauded as a "hero." After all, the bill failed to account for her "Green New Deal" and fell shy of hobbling the American economy beyond repair. For those acts, she is applauded for her courage. **_Do you see the difference?_** I spend every day in Congress standing up to AOC while the media lifts cheers on her insults to America. **[But I need to know if you support my efforts and want to keep AOC unhappy. If so, will you join my team with $25, $50, or $100 and help put an end to the socialist spending coming from Washington?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58850090:JrI-TU2NA:m:1:3103520637:74976564DF161FE7E2D0E736A3A9D423:r "But I need to know if you support my efforts and want to keep AOC
unhappy. If so, will you join my team with $25, $50, or $100 and help put an end to the socialist spending coming from Washington?")** **_If it were up to me, AOC would always be unhappy._** **_AOC is happy_** when your child is being forced to learn Critical Race Theory, and parents are labeled "domestic terrorists" by the FBI if they object. **_AOC is happy_** when your 15-year-old daughter is told she doesn't need your permission to get an abortion. **_AOC is happy_** when her policies send our nation into bankruptcy. **When she is _unhappy_ , it is good for America.** Sadly, she is very popular here in Congress, and my struggle against her has only increased the attacks against me from her friends in the media and the other radical progressives in Congress. However, **[I believe defeating socialism is my calling, and I will continue to take a stand against it if you show your support with an IMMEDIATE donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58850091:JrI-TU2NA:m:1:3103520637:74976564DF161FE7E2D0E736A3A9D423:r "I believe defeating socialism is my calling, and I will continue
to take a stand against it if you show your support with an IMMEDIATE donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45.")** Once again, freedom-loving Americans have to stand up to a media darling with bad ideas. I am not afraid of hurting her feelings; I am more concerned with saving our nation. **[Again, when AOC is unhappy, it is good for America! If you agree, I hope you'll support my efforts with $50, $100, or even $500 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58850092:JrI-TU2NA:m:1:3103520637:74976564DF161FE7E2D0E736A3A9D423:r "Again, when AOC is unhappy, it is good for America! If you agree, I hope you’ll support my efforts with $50, $100, or even $500 TODAY!")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58850089:JrI-TU2NA:m:1:3103520637:74976564DF161FE7E2D0E736A3A9D423:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. AOC and the mean girls in her Jihad Squad can say all the mean things they want. I'm not in high school anymore, and I won't stop fighting to keep Americans free from their socialist agenda. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me keep AOC unhappy.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58850093:JrI-TU2NA:m:1:3103520637:74976564DF161FE7E2D0E736A3A9D423:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will
donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me keep AOC unhappy.")** Thank you.
---

name: John Gibbs
subject: Fire this RINO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbs for Congress_**
body:
Dear Peter,

My name is John Gibbs, and I'm running for Congress with President Trump's endorsement to unseat Nancy Pelosi's pet RINO Peter Meijer who voted to IMPEACH President Trump.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r)

**Never-Trumper Peter Meijer championed the impeachment hoax and put Nancy Pelosi first.**

I am America First and America always.

**I proudly served in high-level roles in the Trump administration, including working under Dr. Ben Carson**.

President Trump also appointed me to the 1776 Commission, where I helped lead the fight to _stop racist critical race theory from poisoning the minds of America's children_.
[_**SUPPORT JOHN GIBBS - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r) My life story is the American dream.

I'm the grandson of black sharecroppers and the first in my family to go to college.

**I've served overseas as a Christian missionary spreading the Gospel, and I saw firsthand how exceptional our nation truly is.**

But right now, America's liberty, culture, and faith are under attack like never before.

Ousting Never-Trumpers like Peter Meijer that roll over for the left is step one in taking our country back.

But I need your help.

**[That's why I'm asking you to stand with President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 -- whatever you can most afford -- right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r)

Joe Biden's socialist spending shot inflation through the roof, imposing a massive tax increase on every American. Gas prices surge, and grocery store shelves sit empty.

**Joe Biden's locked up political prisoners in solitary confinement for committing misdemeanor crimes on January 6.**

Joe Biden's open border policies rolled out the red carpet to a record wave of illegal aliens invading America.

**Democrats employ cancel culture to threaten jobs and ban you from social media if you question their dangerous ideology or support Donald Trump.**

Crime is out of control as Democrats praise BLM and Antifa rioters while fighting to defund the police.

America as you and I know it will cease to exist if the left gets its way.

**When the chips were down, Never-Trumper Peter Meijer cast his lot with Nancy Pelosi and the fake news media by voting to impeach Donald Trump.**

I stand with the Constitution, conservative patriots, and the America First agenda.

That's why President Trump endorsed my campaign.
[_**SUPPORT JOHN GIBBS - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r) **[Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign to oust Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r)?**

Michigan's third congressional district deserves a conservative that fights for conservative values.

**Peter Meijer is Nancy Pelosi's favorite Republican.**

I am a proud Trump-supporting America First conservative that served at the tip of the spear in fighting for President Trump and his MAGA agenda in the Trump administration.

**[Donald Trump endorsed my campaign and I hope you will join President Trump in supporting my fight to oust pro-impeachment Never-Trumper Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r).**

Unlike Peter Meijer, I'm not looking to win popularity contests on CNN or MSNBC.

If elected to Congress, I lead the fight to:

***** BUILD the wall and defund lawless sanctuary cities;**

*** SUPPORT election integrity by banning the mass mailing of unsolicited ballots and ballot harvesting while also pushing for a complete forensic audit of the 2020 election;

***** STOP illegal and immoral government and corporate vaccine mandates;**

*** OPPOSE all unconstitutional gun control. "The right to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed" means what it says; and

***** DEFEND the unborn by supporting 100 percent Pro-Life legislation.**

Joe Biden's stunning incompetence is on display for all to see.

From surging gas prices to dead American heroes in Afghanistan to labeling parents as domestic terrorists, Joe Biden's failures threaten our freedoms, security, and prosperity.

Stopping Joe Biden's socialist agenda starts with firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House.

But it also means conservatives have to elect a conservative majority that fights for our values and beliefs.

When Peter Meijer voted to impeach Donald Trump, he picked Nancy Pelosi's side.

**[So please chip in a contribution of in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900 to my campaign for Congress today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59197384:s8NbVbHNn:m:1:2365227053:0BD05D1F8DC327B82EC2BF2575B8DF62:r)

Donald Trump's endorsing my campaign for Congress 100 percent.

Please join Donald Trump in supporting me and help elect a true America First conservative and send Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer packing.

Sincerely,

John Gibbs

---

How has Gov. DeSantis hurt Florida’s economy?
* When Floridians needed a helping hand to get through the pandemic, he _**opposed**_ stimulus checks, tax cuts, and funding for local governments.
* He provoked partisan fights by trying to ban mask requirements and threatening to withhold pay from school officials who’ve implemented them!
* He refused to distribute over **$820 million** in federal funds designated for food assistance to Florida’s children.
* He’s waging war on the cruise ship industry, which supports tens of thousands of jobs across our state. He’s also ignored the “red tide” algae bloom that’s driving off visitors to our coasts.

**Let me say this as plainly as I can: Gov. DeSantis is bad for our economy. He’s thinking about presidents, polls, and primaries -- and do you know who he’s not thinking about? **

_Floridians._

**[That’s wrong in my book, and it always will be. I’m running for governor of this great state to put people over politics, and I need your help to do it. If you can, pitch in to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38920643/317621610/-1801980782?refcode=20211123_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjY0OTdiZC02NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_BAic3XJEqqHy6UKOwRjrp34wSBc_1_ZyPE53vlGzuo=)**

Thank you,
Charlie Crist

Ron DeSantis’s partisan fights and single-minded focus on his own presidential ambitions are hurting our economy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = How has Gov. DeSantis hurt Florida’s economy? When Floridians needed a helping hand to get through the pandemic, he opposed stimulus checks, tax cuts, and funding for local governments. He provoked partisan fights by trying to ban mask requirements and threatening to withhold pay from school officials who’ve implemented them! He refused to distribute over $820 million in federal funds designated for food assistance to Florida’s children. He’s waging war on the cruise ship industry, which supports tens of thousands of jobs across our state. He’s also ignored the “red tide” algae bloom that’s driving off visitors to our coasts. Let me say this as plainly as I can: Gov. DeSantis is bad for our economy. He’s thinking about presidents, polls, and primaries -- and do you know who he’s not thinking about? Floridians. = Thank you, Charlie Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

subject: I'm nervous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
After missing October's fundraising goal, it looks like I'm on track to fall short in November, too.
| | |
---
I'm nervous, friend: GOP megadonors are pouring millions into Florida, while grassroots donations to my campaign have _plummeted_. And after missing October's fundraising goal, it looks like **I'm on track to fall short in November** , too.
With our End of Month deadline rapidly approaching, I can't emphasize enough how important it is that I make up this difference immediately. **[Please, can you rush $5 or more right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38921233/317623638/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1720-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2ZkYzc3MC02ODRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMDiPO-AMZm0-7FzhWEmLp1efvisSgEU4kLdFldrG34=)**

_Here's the truth: I know I can defeat Marco Rubio._ The Cook Political Report has increased my chances of winning in Florida, and recent polling shows this race in the margin of error.
But I'll be blunt: ** I can't win if I fail to hit my grassroots fundraising goal again this month. **And with experts saying Florida's Senate race will determine Senate control, missing this goal could have disastrous consequences – and we could hand the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell.
**I am counting on top supporters like you, friend, to help me get my fundraising back on track before midnight.[Will you rush a contribution of $5 or more now to help me flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority from Mitch McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38921235/317623640/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1720-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2ZkYzc3MC02ODRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMDiPO-AMZm0-7FzhWEmLp1efvisSgEU4kLdFldrG34=)**

name: Madison Horn for US Senate via madisonhorn.com
subject: Biggest deadline yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Madison is running to be the first woman Senator from our state because she wants to stand up for everyday Oklahomans who have long been ignored by self-serving politicians.

But she can’t make real change if she doesn’t get elected first. As a first-time candidate, we have a lot of building up to do. And in just a few weeks, our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline is taking place.

We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. subject: You've Been Identified
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
While a lot of people talk a big game, I know what it takes to put America FIRST and actually WIN for the conservative cause.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2x2b1--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
| | | | OFFICIAL GOP COMMUNICATION
---
| **\- From the Desk of Mike Pompeo -**
70th Secretary of State I wanted you to make sure you knew about our new organization - CAVPAC - which is focused on pushing back against the radical Left and doing everything in our power to Champion American Values.

When President Trump asked me to become his Secretary of State, I knew it would be an incredible opportunity to make a difference in the lives of so many Americans and to advance the conservative agenda. And that’s exactly what I did.

As a member of the Trump Administration, we secured the border, stood up to Iran, stopped China from stealing American jobs, and stood tall in defense of religious freedom. As President Trump’s top negotiator, I traveled the globe to make the world respect the United States again. We talked the talk and walked the walk.

Now, our nation stands at a crossroads. I have no intention to sit on the sidelines and let the Democrats ruin all the progress we made. It’s absolutely critical to the future of our great nation and the Republican Party that we double down our efforts to protect American values. **That’s why I’ve started a new organization with one mission: Champion American Values. **
---
**You’ve been identified as a top patriot and ally in our fight, so I’m extending you an EXCLUSIVE Founding Member opportunity.**
**[CHIP IN $500 TO BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2x2b1-1m1rk-4qqlpo0/ "CHIP IN $500 TO BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER >>>")

If you know me, you know I’m not one to back down in the face of attacks from the radical Left or the mainstream media. With the radical Left imposing their anti-police, pro-tax, big government, socialist agenda on the American people, it’s more important now than ever that we unite to elect conservatives who are willing to stand up for religious freedom, pro-life values, the Second Amendment, a stronger military and the America First agenda.

With CAVPAC, I’m dedicating as many resources as possible to electing principled conservatives all across the country who are willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden. We must take back the House and Senate for Republicans, but I can’t do it alone._**Can I count on you to become a Founding Member in our fight?**_

---
| | [JOIN THE FIGHT - DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2x2b1-1m1rp-4qqlpo5/)
---
With you on our side, I’m confident we can champion American values and take back both the House and Senate. _**[Make your Founding Member donation to help me show the Left that we’re a force to be reckoned with >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2x2b1-1m1rq-4qqlpo6/ "Make your Founding Member donation before Midnight to help me show the Left that we’re a force to be reckoned with >>>")**_

Never Give an Inch,

name: Letitia James
subject: Do you think we should BAN assault weapons?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38925638/317640181/1072827243?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk143-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQwNDFiYi02ZTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpnHioJmhvVLpI6CE9zs360zx8nXHX-138EgTu1hTM8=&emci=5d2e5887-9d49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=454041bb-6e4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369504)
Peter,

I'm coming to you today with an urgent request to make your voice heard and end the gun violence epidemic in our nation.

Assault weapons are used in some of the deadliest mass shootings in our country – and what's worse, **2021 is on track to be the deadliest year** for gun violence in recent memory.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38925639/317640182/1072827243?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk143-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQwNDFiYi02ZTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpnHioJmhvVLpI6CE9zs360zx8nXHX-138EgTu1hTM8=&emci=5d2e5887-9d49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=454041bb-6e4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369504)
As we fight tooth and nail to pass an assault weapons ban, the gun lobby is doing everything they can to put a stop to this critical progress and let our gun violence epidemic continue unabated.

I have always fought to hold the gun lobby accountable, pass gun control legislation, stand up to banks that fund the makers of assault weapons, and divest NYC's largest pension fund from gun retailers. And I vow to use my office as New York's governor to put an end to the scourge of gun violence once and for all.
But to pass this ban and prevent gun violence, we ALL need to get involved. **That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter: I need 1,500 more people to voice their thoughts on banning assault weapons and combating our country's devastating gun violence epidemic. So please, will you let us know where you stand before midnight tonight?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38925640/317640183/1072827243?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk143-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQwNDFiYi02ZTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpnHioJmhvVLpI6CE9zs360zx8nXHX-138EgTu1hTM8=&emci=5d2e5887-9d49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=454041bb-6e4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369504)
Thank you for being on my side in this crucial fight.

Letitia James

clean_body: | | | Peter, I'm coming to you today with an urgent request to make your voice heard and end the gun violence epidemic in our nation. Assault weapons are used in some of the deadliest mass shootings in our country – and what's worse, 2021 is on track to be the deadliest year for gun violence in recent memory. As we fight tooth and nail to pass an assault weapons ban, the gun lobby is doing everything they can to put a stop to this critical progress and let our gun violence epidemic continue unabated. I have always fought to hold the gun lobby accountable, pass gun control legislation, stand up to banks that fund the makers of assault weapons, and divest NYC's largest pension fund from gun retailers. And I vow to use my office as New York's governor to put an end to the scourge of gun violence once and for all. But to pass this ban and prevent gun violence, we ALL need to get involved. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter: I need 1,500 more people to voice their thoughts on banning assault weapons and combating our country's devastating gun violence epidemic. So please, will you let us know where you stand before midnight tonight? Thank you for being on my side in this crucial fight. Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

I want to make sure you read his note because you gotta know how Indiana Democrats have been crushing it this year. We’ve traveled everywhere - 55 counties to be exact - holding more than 63 events about how Democrats have delivered a better future for Hoosiers. We’re talking vaccines that have allowed us to return to normalcy and infrastructure investments that’ll transform our state and economy. Only Democrats made this possible. Personally, it’s been a privilege being on the road selling this good news to Hoosiers across the state. I drove more than 10,000 miles in five months because I believe we are truly making a difference for our neighbors, friends, and families. And, whether I was in large communities like Evansville or small ones like Angola or my hometown of Tipton, I can tell we’re getting fired up and ready to bring about some **_necessary_** change to Indiana. [Chip in a little bit right now by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38927747/317648877/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFmMDk1MC03MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QETi4uAS6a4ZxDcxSkoWfUnPOcm1-ZcbzjxE-Qhedc=) I’m ready to drive another 10,000 miles next year, because it’s time we end the extreme partisan grip the other side has on the Hoosier State. The Republicans’ agenda is built on power, division, misinformation, and manufactured distractions -- they seek to divide us while we seek to bring people together and move our country forward. The 2022 elections will be about jobs, public education, and a better future -- and Democrats have delivered on all of it. We just need to spend more time spreading the good news. [So, let’s get to work. Please chip in and help us make sure every voter knows Democrats are the ones who have their backs. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38927748/317648878/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFmMDk1MC03MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QETi4uAS6a4ZxDcxSkoWfUnPOcm1-ZcbzjxE-Qhedc=) Thank you, friend, Drew Anderson Communications Director PS - Please send me ice cream shop recommendations. Just like Joe Biden - I love some vanilla soft serve during a road trip. \--- Good afternoon! Earlier this year, we made a promise to Indiana Democrats — and all Hoosier voters — that we would start showing up everywhere to listen to folks, tell how common sense and popular policies can create a better future for our state, and push back against partisan extremism. Indiana Democrats delivered on this promise and we haven’t stopped sharing how Democrats are delivering for families. Last week, we just wrapped up our _fourth_ tour in _five_ months. In total, we’ve visited **55 counties** in the Hoosier State -- and you helped power our work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38927749/317648879/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFmMDk1MC03MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QETi4uAS6a4ZxDcxSkoWfUnPOcm1-ZcbzjxE-Qhedc=) Congressmen Andre Carson and Frank Mrvan have led on and supported transformative measures in Congress like the American Rescue Plan and [The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38927750/317648880/-722644037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFmMDk1MC03MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QETi4uAS6a4ZxDcxSkoWfUnPOcm1-ZcbzjxE-Qhedc=&emci=bd97c348-674c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=dc1f0950-734c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535). Because of this work, more vaccines got into Hoosiers’ arms, more than $350 million was provided to the state to expand broadband access, about $540 million is being used to alleviate the state’s childcare crisis, and every single county and nearly each municipal community - large and small - has received relief that’ll help Hoosiers build back better from COVID-19. Statehouse Democrats have delivered for Hoosiers too. The Indiana Black Legislative Caucus passed criminal justice reform and thanks to the American Rescue Plan, the state’s public schools were provided funding not seen in over a decade, educators received a much-needed pay raise, and the state’s READI program is delivering economic opportunity across Indiana. Indiana Democrats delivered at the statehouse and in Congress, but we also wanted to celebrate these accomplishments with Hoosiers in every community. **It’s time to show Hoosiers directly what Democratic values are and what our policies do -- instead of being labeled through misinformation, disinformation, fake news, and conspiracy theories promoted on the other side.** We’re neighbors, friends, coworkers, family members, and Hoosiers -- and it’s imperative we fight back and show we care more about the well-being of all families rather than fulfilling partisan agendas. So, what did we do? Indiana Democrats got to work. And thanks to our county parties and leaders like Joe Donnelly, John Gregg, Baron Hill, Jill Long Thompson, Eddie Melton, Fady Qaddoura, Shelli Yoder, Robin Shackleford, Mike Andrade, Maureen Bauer, and Phil GiaQuinta, Democrats hit the road and held 63 field events in more than 55 counties. This includes:
* 24 American Rescue Plan tour events
* 19 American Jobs Plan tour stops
* 5 Redistricting Tour press conferences
* 15 Small Town, Indiana community events

Folks, Indiana Democrats got back to work in 2021. But, we’re just getting started because there’s so much more work to get done ahead of the 2022 state and midterm elections, the 2023 municipal elections, and the 2024 gubernatorial and state elections. We must work overtime to elect Democratic leaders in every community possible. We must create this better future for Hoosier families, because we know what alternative is in store for our state if we do not step up. Hoosiers have seen what the other side has offered -- and it’s nothing but extreme politics. Not one Indiana Republican supported the American Rescue Plan, The Jobs Act, and the once-in-a-generation jobs and infrastructure investments for our families. Instead, the Indiana Republican Party endorsed misinformation, conspiracy theories, and extreme partisanship -- just for partisan gamesmanship focused on power, control, money, and self-interest. Instead of joining Democrats, Hoosiers saw Republicans like Todd Young, Victoria Spartz, and Jackie Walorski vote NO on these laws. They campaigned on conspiracies that just don’t exist in Indiana. And, they heard these elected officials describe bread and butter issues they’ve campaigned on for years -- like broadband internet and infrastructure -- as “socialism”. You read that right. Republicans are calling basic utilities and services they campaign on and even use as “socialism” because...partisanship. These Republicans have become too extreme and too partisan for Indiana, and throughout the 2022 campaign, it’s absolutely essential for Democrats to make sure voters in all 92 counties know Republicans abandoned them when it mattered most. When it was time to deliver COVID-19 relief, Democrats delivered while Republicans downplayed the deadly virus. When it was time to pass transformational infrastructure investments, Democrats delivered while Republicans ignored you. **[We need you to chip in a little bit right now by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38927751/317648881/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFmMDk1MC03MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QETi4uAS6a4ZxDcxSkoWfUnPOcm1-ZcbzjxE-Qhedc=)** This is what we must run on for 2022 (and beyond). We cannot let our foot off the gas just because of our work this year. It’s time we dig deep and campaign in every county, in every community, and for every Hoosier vote. We accomplished a lot this year, and we have a lot to be thankful for, but we’re just getting started. [We hope you'll join us on the road next year to help Democrats create a better future for the families we love and the state we call home.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38927752/317648882/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFmMDk1MC03MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QETi4uAS6a4ZxDcxSkoWfUnPOcm1-ZcbzjxE-Qhedc=) Sincerely, Mike Schmuhl Chairman - Indiana Democratic Party Indiana Democratic Party
115 W Washington
INDLPS, IN 46202
United States | | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Olivia
subject: Disappointed we haven't received your reply, Peter 📧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852793:6speLU2NV:m:1:3253819041:85CE15059ABBB9EFAAF68F5BB038AACC:r)
Please choose one of the following options:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852793:6speLU2NV:m:1:3253819041:85CE15059ABBB9EFAAF68F5BB038AACC:r) | **[YES: I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852793:6speLU2NV:m:1:3253819041:85CE15059ABBB9EFAAF68F5BB038AACC:r)** **[NO: I STAND WITH THE DEMOCRATS >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852793:6speLU2NV:m:1:3253819041:85CE15059ABBB9EFAAF68F5BB038AACC:r)**
---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852793:6speLU2NV:m:1:3253819041:85CE15059ABBB9EFAAF68F5BB038AACC:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia
_Republican Headquarters (Team Scalise)_

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I am so sorry, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
| |
---
| | | Patriot -- I hope you have a great Thanksgiving.

I'm sorry to reach out right now. Please know that I hate writing this -- I'm only doing so because what I have to say is important.

Here's the deal. Thanksgiving directly lined up with my End of Month deadline, and it throws a giant wrench into our budgeting.

My math shows because of this lost day of reaching out to supporters and contacting potential donors, my team is about $47,000 off from hitting our goal.

**$47,000, Patriot.**

This money could go directly to opening more field offices, contacting more voters, financing our day-to-day operations, developing a robust research and data team, and doing everything we can to ensure Florida doesn't fall under the control of Schumer and Pelosi.
**And that 's why I'm reaching out today, Patriot. ****[Will you PLEASE chip in whatever you can today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58855139:J-1jrU2Ns:m:1:3299561967:B0C8E645303CC9A31EC45193FB3E5A1A:r "Will you PLEASE
chip in whatever you can today?") Our grassroots operations are literally financed by folks who give $25, $50, or even $100 here and there because they believe in something bigger than themselves. They believe that when we all work together, we can make a difference.**
Please, Patriot., will you help me make a difference?

Thank you,
Marco Rubio
---
| | | [MAKE A DIFFERENCE WITH MARCO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58855139:J-1jrU2Ns:m:1:3299561967:B0C8E645303CC9A31EC45193FB3E5A1A:r "MAKE A DIFFERENCE WITH MARCO")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58855140:J-1jrU2Ns:m:1:3299561967:B0C8E645303CC9A31EC45193FB3E5A1A:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Patriot, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58855140:J-1jrU2Ns:m:1:3299561967:B0C8E645303CC9A31EC45193FB3E5A1A:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio
---

name: Blue Iowa Polling
subject: you've been selected!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |

| Peter,

I know it feels like the midterm elections are a long way off — believe me, it feels like that to me, too. But Republicans are already working to unseat me, and that means we have to start now to be ready for whatever they throw our way. [_**Can you rush a contribution to my re-election campaign right away to ensure I have the resources to defend myself against Republican attacks?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38928138/317651736/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211123-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE4NmYyMC03NjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0wQ7ty-NsBrrazKNcF7xN8838NdNnpe33SpapyvC8Q=)

Republicans are preparing for 2022 now because they think they have a real chance of beating me and flipping PA-07 red. name: Anne Maher
subject: Happy Birthday Peter Franchot!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Over the past few months, I’ve had the pleasure of meeting so many of Peter’s friends and supporters on the campaign trail. But if I haven’t had a chance to meet you yet, I’m Anne Maher, Peter’s wife of 41 years.
For the Franchot family, Thanksgiving is a special holiday, because in addition to spending cherished time with our children and grandchildren, it also happens to coincide with Peter’s birthday, November 25.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=20.22https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=20.22https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=20.22]Peter is fired up and ready to go win the Democratic nomination for Governor in June 2022. As you already know, my husband is widely considered to be the frontrunner in this race. A recent poll has shown that he’s leading the Democratic field by a wide margin, and he’s already won the endorsements of well over 100 elected officials. But in order to sustain his momentum, he needs the support of friends like you to help him continue bringing his message to every community in our state.
To honor Peter’s birthday, would you consider making a contribution to his campaign today? There would be no better birthday present than helping Peter raise an additional $3,000 to help meet his fundraising goal for the month of November!
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday]I couldn’t be more proud to be by Peter’s side as he fights to bring bold, transformative change to Maryland. Over his decades of service to our state, I’ve seen firsthand his commitment towards securing a brighter and stronger future for our communities. He understands that Marylanders deserve responsive, respectful, and results-oriented government, and that’s exactly what he will deliver as Governor.
Anything you can give to support Peter is greatly appreciated. I know that my husband is humbled by the trust and confidence that you have placed in him. As Maryland’s next Governor, he will never let you down.
Take care, and Happy Holidays to you and your family,
Anne
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfbirthday?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

Folks,
Over the next few days, my team and I will be sending you a few more emails than usual -- but please don’t ignore them, we have a good reason.
Before I get into the specifics, let me just ask up front: [**Will you rush a donation to my campaign today? I have a critical end-of-month deadline in just a few days, and we’re still $10,000 short of our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38928457/317653764/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211123_FR_EOM3Emails_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMThhZGQ2Yi03NjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9PPwJPOnbFyxhoMcBd4ZPxNEoUfuZeZpHgr-LCB2xw=)

Thanksgiving and the first night of Hanukkah are in just a few days, which means folks will be taking needed breaks from their emails to spend time with friends and family.
But the end of the month is also in just a few days, _and we’re still short of our monthly goal._
This is our last end-of-month fundraising goal before next month’s FEC deadline, and, yes -- that means we’ll be publicly reporting our fundraising numbers.
In light of Republicans winning up and down the ballot in Virginia earlier this month, our numbers need to send a message that our grassroots campaign is as strong as ever.
[**Will you help my team and I reach our goal? name: Rep. Vincent Dixie
subject: The Next Decade of Tennessee Politics is on the Line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38929422/317658689/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTViNGY2Ni03ODRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_ASciGYjoH7OinS-rXF-T7qFH2obblt5WRewRZKhF4=)
Dear Peter,

The next decade of Tennessee’s politics is on the line. If you have been following the political news, you know redistricting is happening across the state – without the public able to address the process. The redistricting process should be transparent and involve as much citizen participation as possible.

[I do not want 2022 to be a repeat of what happened after the 2010 U.S. census. Before the 2010 census, we had 49 Democrats in the House. Today, we only have 26....](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38929423/317658690/496136080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTViNGY2Ni03ODRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_ASciGYjoH7OinS-rXF-T7qFH2obblt5WRewRZKhF4=#)

Maps were due last week to the redistricting committee and The House Democratic Caucus is working diligently to ensure what happened last redistricting does not happen again. We must not let Tennessee's GOP gerrymander discourage electoral competition and illegally grow their supermajority.

[But we cannot do this alone. Can you chip in today to help us stop unfair and unconstitutional redistricting?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38929424/317658691/496136080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTViNGY2Ni03ODRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_ASciGYjoH7OinS-rXF-T7qFH2obblt5WRewRZKhF4=#)

We the people means we choose who is elected, not elected officials choosing their voters.
Thank you,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
State Representative, District 54
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38929425/317658692/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTViNGY2Ni03ODRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_ASciGYjoH7OinS-rXF-T7qFH2obblt5WRewRZKhF4=)

subject: Joe Biden’s “Turkey Tax”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/356b78962e6a0811/33d51ec58f7f0c53c3d6b838967d376c/37283)

Friends, Have you done your Thanksgiving dinner shopping yet?

If you have, then you’ve felt the pinch of Joe Biden’s “Turkey Tax” at the register.

**This runaway inflation crisis and the supply-chain crisis are BOTH hitting home as we enter the holiday season. Prices are UP and store shelves are increasingly EMPTY...**

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/356b78962e6a0811/69db764993058b42c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
The deranged Democrats think that spending $1.75 trillion in wasteful federal spending will somehow get us out of this.

_These far-left radicals are economically illiterate and they are DESTROYING our country!_

We must stop their inflation bomb spending bill. And we need to TAKE BACK our country in 2022 to end this tax-and-spend insanity.

[ **Rush critical support to fuel our fight at Team Sandvig >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/356b78962e6a0811/e8b6157b1cf7751cc3d6b838967d376c/37283)

Together, I know we can win this race, win a new Republican majority, STOP Joe Biden, and get our great nation back on track. \- Nate

subject: UF or FSU?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

I promise you that when I’m Governor, I’ll be a voice and partner for all Floridians...

Even if you’re rooting for Florida State this Saturday.

My time at the University of Florida helped shape who I am today. I’m an incredibly proud alum, and I’ll be cheering my heart out for the gators this Saturday.

And I need to ask, team: which side are you on?

Click here to vote in the year’s most important poll and tell us if you’re cheering for UF or FSU on Saturday. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/HWNLDQPd3UCdSGkgQmZQag2]

Go Gators 🐊

name: Dr. Bob Lorinser
subject: Democrats can't leave rural voters out of the political equation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Too many voters feel forgotten and flown-over. It's unacceptable and why I've joined partners with the URD to re-engage Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. **Dr. Bob receives United Rural Democrats' first 2022 House endorsement** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38930501/317663146/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ4OGRkNC03YjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvePSoxDR3W_WttdDLuvz4koyViALIp0kC-olz0tsNs=) **_"We are super excited to have someone from northern Michigan to represent northern Michigan. Dr. Bob is the perfect candidate, as he stands for what are truly Upper Michigan values. Most Democratic organizations won't step foot anywhere near northern Michigan. We do and do it proudly. When we see a great candidate, we go all in, no matter where they are. Dr. Bob for Congress!" - URDMI_** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38930506/317663151/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ4OGRkNC03YjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvePSoxDR3W_WttdDLuvz4koyViALIp0kC-olz0tsNs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38930507/317663155/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ4OGRkNC03YjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvePSoxDR3W_WttdDLuvz4koyViALIp0kC-olz0tsNs=) Good morning, Friend In case you missed it, the United Rural Democrats has endorsed Dr. Bob in his run for U.S. Congress. The United Rural Democrats (URD) has traveled across the country and listened to countless Americans who feel left out. More often than not these folks live in rural America. The URD has built a coalition of over 600 county parties in over 40 states and has chosen Dr. Bob Lorinser as its first 2022 US House endorsement. "Our first endorsement for US House in 2022 goes to Dr. Lorinser in Michigan’s 1st Congressional District," said the United Rural Democrats. "Northern Michigan / the U.P. needs a Congressman that will fight for them in Washington and get stuff done. As a rural medical administrator, we know he’s the man for the job." "It's no secret Democrats have had difficulty engaging rural voters lately," said Dr. Lorinser. "Too many people in rural Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula feel forgotten and flown over. With better policy and grassroots organization, in partnership with the United Rural Democrats _,_ we're going to change that." Lorinser expressed gratitude for the endorsement and says the partnership is a good fit. Dr. Bob intends to advance policy that promotes access to quality rural healthcare, housing affordability, vast infrastructure improvements, energy reliability, and the expansion of rural broadband. **If you support Dr. Bob fighting for rural issues in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, we need your support. Last week’s vote
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38930972/317665120/1246233592?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.23_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWQ1YmNmMS03ZDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2sYtd1fulgOHbQRxDKlAmbI1YarbLCGE53OLOf2UnaU=) Hi Peter,

President Joe Biden recently signed the bipartisan infrastructure bill into law, which will make a measurable difference in the lives of nearly every Iowan. It includes improving power and water systems, expanding broadband access, repairing roads and bridges, and creating good-paying jobs.

**Despite the historic infrastructure investments this bill will bring to eastern Iowa, my opponent shamefully voted against it.**

Important votes like this are why it’s necessary to have someone in Congress who represents Iowans and prioritizes their best interests --- not bows to party bosses and the Washington elite. That’s why I’m running for Congress in Iowa’s second district, Peter.

[**If elected, I will ensure that every vote I take will be made with EVERY Iowan in mind. But to do that, I need your help. It includes improving power and water systems, expanding broadband access, repairing roads and bridges, and creating good-paying jobs. Despite the historic infrastructure investments this bill will bring to eastern Iowa, my opponent shamefully voted against it. Important votes like this are why it’s necessary to have someone in Congress who represents Iowans and prioritizes their best interests --- not bows to party bosses and the Washington elite. name: Josh Hawley
subject: This Is Living Podcast Episode 5: Bringing Up Boys
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=3b3979d4cf954c928187fc0064862e08&_e=5IPAtSWTYQ11qXMoGt7NFZG0Lkr0gHbiO7krvnW6kpr6yTpIM0nRdxlNk8x_ZoJA3RUrwbrk70cWY2NC93PjJcWdFcPfnbA6dY-pWR-N81Hid4lw6y0WYqMornjkp7SgKMjJ2iza_LMGZAreuVw4icYJRaFIs58YY144viEFPQGZuHwpSMrX5s4Nr_Styfk7dSj82hA8DVQYP0ePVjlgbsTS0FdHM6iFTYV2bjTKR8LK-uucr8-Ly40vmQIkzNrpt_UUczEP1vCUwdurZER84pSKPwPp12f7BAb81aLDP4MQlZ7bHlhIr40LeSY_juFaJmSJqjxYXLY_q_HSlEwZR7A6IpOp9n18lq6Lo9EbSTUD8nolw4HLpBpwBBEjbh-tfNJ1Yej_Wsrsy8Q_QdGaUO0uLJXO807xJBURZYRybMU%3D) | |
---
In this episode of This Is Living, we do a deep dive into the parenting of our two boys, Elijah and Blaise, and the challenge of raising boys to men in today’s culture. It's a challenge to raise kids, but raising boys is particularly difficult. Our mission is to raise our boys to be good men and followers of Jesus. It is a critical time for boys as a whole in our country.

The world wants boys to be different than they were created, and that is not how God made boys. Boys require active engagement, and there is something bold and beautiful about the zest and exuberance that boys approach life with.
Listen to this week's episode and hear more about how we unpack the unique pressures of raising modern men who are adventurous, courageous, and excited about participating in God's greater plan for their lives.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=3b3979d4cf954c928187fc0064862e08&_e=5IPAtSWTYQ11qXMoGt7NFZG0Lkr0gHbiO7krvnW6kpr6yTpIM0nRdxlNk8x_ZoJA3RUrwbrk70cWY2NC93PjJcWdFcPfnbA6dY-pWR-N81Hid4lw6y0WYqMornjkp7SgKMjJ2iza_LMGZAreuVw4icYJRaFIs58YY144viEFPQGZuHwpSMrX5s4Nr_Styfk7Kya_xlNQ8nCtcIrl3fBDOY9kautsj7QWWbLkDT45g6e2gft0y25uESV4cgHXT-pzCtk7edLcSCUBzJAGe0axNHQbkVL5zXjFxnSNp5690P2rx0V-pv8wzq8AQYoC3YpwjuXcdMY2f8ET5YdUkF-Bz4T0e_GCx2xx7cS1YTnBUsUllBBYjf2FMDd1taDyfEtwJq8Bh45PS8pC9GXyyv8S2HqBHE1Bo3Sl7YqKehUlj94%3D)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38931743/317668432/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWI1NmVjYS03ZTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQiquazMP2M0VpDDmRKsmaNInwahRb5s_HgXa3HLtDs=)
Friends — this is NOT the news we were hoping to share. We are just one week away from our November fundraising deadline and we are only **halfway** to our 10,000 contribution goal. Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this. But we recently found out that Republicans have the best shot they’ve had in forty years to take back the Congress, which could lead to Mitch McConnell being installed as the majority leader, and unravel all the progress we’ve made. So we really can’t afford to fall short. Our fundraising must stay on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies will take notice and double down on their efforts to take back the majority. [_**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $10 donation to Defend the Senate today? clean_body: | = Friends — this is NOT the news we were hoping to share. We are just one week away from our November fundraising deadline and we are only halfway to our 10,000 contribution goal. Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this. But we recently found out that Republicans have the best shot they’ve had in forty years to take back the Congress, which could lead to Mitch McConnell being installed as the majority leader, and unravel all the progress we’ve made. So we really can’t afford to fall short. Our fundraising must stay on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies will take notice and double down on their efforts to take back the majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your support ahead of this month’s deadline. **"It almost doesn't matter who the Republican candidate is, they're going to do pretty well." _\-- The Hill_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, I want to send you a quick but important message about redistricting. And why your $10 donation today is so important. In a few weeks, California will finalize new congressional maps, so let me be the first to tell you what this means for our race.
* Based on the drafts we have seen, I’ll need to introduce myself to tens of thousands of new voters between now and next June — just 6 months away.
* Last cycle, I faced a Donald Trump-style Republican who raised over $4.2 million in an attempt to defeat me.
* And with right-wing media launching a coordinated campaign of attack to discredit me, and by extension our attempts to hold Trump accountable for his abuses, they are sure to target me again.

_Plain and simple, we need your support to win in June._ And it’s not going to be easy. We need to prepare for a tough race in a national environment where the GOP is breaking fundraising records that could very well put the House Majority within Kevin McCarthy’s grasp. **So today, I’m asking you to begin making a monthly contribution to our campaign – here’s why: Budgeting for a campaign where we need to hire organizing and political staff, plan for mail and television ads in the expensive Los Angeles media market, and so much more is hard enough. But knowing that we can count on a certain amount each month gives us the ability to chart our campaign expenditures every step of the way.** | | [MAKE A MONTHLY $10 CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38932241/317669938/1213653884?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=true&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWE1NGI1ZC03ZjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRxvxGoN7vo__xROpWSFvwkOKLJJSzojTtro7VR4nc4=)
---
If you’re wondering why California isn’t rolling out partisan redistricting maps like many other Red states, let me explain. Because it’s vital to understand why your support is so imperative.
California’s Prop. 11 in 2008 created the California Citizens Redistricting Commission, which drew new maps for every district in 2011 for the very first time. It’s a model for states across the country.
But in 2011, that model led to Republicans pouring in millions of dollars, seeing a once-in-a-decade opportunity to beat Democrats — as some of us were forced to run against each other, introduce ourselves to new voters, or deplete our campaign accounts fighting back against Republican attacks.
With Donald Trump and Fox News constantly attacking me and our work, that places a massive target on me and our campaign. Right-wing mega-donors are eager to funnel money to any candidate willing to trample our democracy if it serves their interests.
And now that I know I’ll most likely be facing numerous opponents, we don’t have the luxury to sit and wait to prepare for next November.
We have to prepare to respond to the TV and radio ads attacking my character, the attack mailers with false smears, and the lies and conspiracy theories that were the calling card of my last GOP opponent — tactics my next opponent is sure to repeat.
I’ll never stop defending our democracy, and this election is crucial to that effort. It’s why Trump’s cronies are determined to remove me from office — and from standing in their way.
**Will you consider making a _monthly donation_ to ensure we’re ready for the tumultuous months ahead? I promise this is critically important, otherwise, I wouldn’t be asking.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
