name: Britainy Beshear
subject: Shh, don't tell Andy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I'm reaching out because next Monday is a very special day -- it's Andy's birthday! Andy has been working hard to help Kentucky recover from COVID-19, invest in our schools, expand access to affordable health care, spur record breaking economic development and more. And on top of all of that, he finds time to be an incredible father, loving husband, and (maybe most of all) a devoted dog dad to Winnie. I'm so proud of the progress Andy has made for our Commonwealth, so I wanted to do something to make his birthday extra special this year. Hey Peter,

I'm reaching out because next Monday is a very special day -- **it's Andy's birthday!**

Andy has been working hard to help Kentucky recover from COVID-19, invest in our schools, expand access to affordable health care, spur record breaking economic development and more. And on top of all of that, he finds time to be an incredible father, loving husband, and (maybe most of all) a devoted dog dad to Winnie. I'm so proud of the progress Andy has made for our Commonwealth, so I wanted to do something to make his birthday extra special this year.

I want to surprise Andy with 2,000 grassroots donations from supporters like you before his birthday to show him our gratitude for the work he's doing for Kentuckians and the enthusiasm for his re-election campaign.

**[Will you help me make this Andy's best birthday yet? Chip in $1, $5, or $44 (for his 44th!) to help me surprise Andy before his birthday on Monday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38932770/317672281/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211123_bday1_fnd_gq_act___bb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211123_bday1_fnd_gq_act___bb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDliMmM5NC04MTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vIXfX_0-oTTz3cdsqyRUyVJ67bFTFYuhxYFPcGCDdiY=)**

And on top of all of that, he finds time to be an incredible father, loving husband, and (maybe most of all) a devoted dog dad to Winnie. I'm so proud of the progress Andy has made for our Commonwealth, so I wanted to do something to make his birthday extra special this year. I want to surprise Andy with 2,000 grassroots donations from supporters like you before his birthday to show him our gratitude for the work he's doing for Kentuckians and the enthusiasm for his re-election campaign. = I'm going to give him a list of all his supporters who chip in to help us reach our goal, and I know he would be so grateful to have you help him celebrate. = Thank you! Britainy = | PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

| | Derek, we have some exciting news:

**Beto O’Rourke just announced he’s running to serve the people of Texas as their next Governor.**

The stakes couldn’t be higher in Texas. Governor Greg Abbott and the Texas GOP have ruthlessly attacked reproductive rights, undermined democracy, and failed to protect Texas families from the deadly Covid-19 pandemic. Families and communities in Texas deserve so much better — and that’s why Beto is in this fight.

Beginning with his insurgent 2018 U.S. Senate campaign that engaged millions of new voters across the Lone Star State, Beto has shown that he has what it takes to beat Greg Abbott and transform the broken status quo in Texas. [**Will you help Beto build a winning campaign by chipping in to become a founding donor? Governor Greg Abbott is a prime example of an elected official who prioritizes himself and his wealthy friends over his constituents and their families.

We’ve seen it in Abbott’s failure to address Texas’ crumbling power grid, leading to catastrophic power outages and the death of hundreds of Texans in the winter of 2021. We saw it when he banned mask requirements in public schools, making Texas a national leader in child Covid deaths. And we saw it when he signed an unconstitutional law that bans most abortions in Texas. _**Derek, Texas deserves better.**_

But beating Republican incumbent Greg Abbott won’t be easy, especially since Abbott and his party have gone to great lengths to make voting more difficult than it ever should be. We’re going to need a huge amount of grassroots resources to build the kind of people-powered movement that can reach and mobilize millions of Texas voters.

[**This race is our best chance to take Texas back for working people and families. That’s why we’re asking if you’ll split a contribution between Beto and Common Good and become a founding donor today to help unseat Greg Abbott and elect Beto O’Rourke to serve the people of Texas as their next Governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38933109/317673755/-410225223?refcode=20211121_Beto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTUyNDcwNy04MjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljTs7Asi1DZ-U9CesAuyO5Yp3aeokJhTcgDI5TNCzHg=)

With voting rights, reproductive justice, and so much more on the line in Texas, this race couldn’t be more important.

Thank you for doing your part,

Beto for Texas

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

_If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5f1b5125-814c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/81524707-824c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTUyNDcwNy04MjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljTs7Asi1DZ-U9CesAuyO5Yp3aeokJhTcgDI5TNCzHg=&id=108609855)._

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: President Biden's infrastructure bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I want to tell you just how much this law will help every American
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38933419/317674397/-1540418300?code=jtk1109-su-nd&refcode=jtk1109-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzc3NTU2MS04NDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESV3b-jfx63iU2WZSPaHi-sUAAIUd5GdSPInIDjZs38=)
---
Hi, Peter.

I just got back from my trip to Washington, D.C., where I joined President Biden at the signing ceremony for his bipartisan infrastructure bill. Because you're one of my strongest supporters, **I want to tell you just how much this law will help each and every American in their daily lives. **
This law will help states across the nation rebuild infrastructure that is decades old. For you, Peter, the impact of this bill could look like: high speed internet in more communities, decreased highway traffic, better access to clean drinking water, safer bike lanes, and more. **On top of all that, this law is also the single biggest investment in climate change that our country has ever made.**
**This is a huge win for the American people, Peter **– including New Mexicans, who will receive a staggering $3.7 billion in state funding to protect us against wildfires, expand broadband internet access, improve our water systems, and more. My team and I are already getting right to work planning these exciting projects.
I'm so proud of this infrastructure bill, and I believe President Biden's progress over this past year is astounding. He's swiftly helping our country recover from a damaging Trump presidency – and 90% of Democrats approve of his leadership, **but I need to know what you think, Peter.**
**My team is running a live poll to find out how many Americans approve of President Biden after passing this impressive bill. You've been selected for our survey, so please answer our poll before it closes at midnight tonight:**
| | **Do you approve of President Biden?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38933420/317674398/-1637588567?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1109-su-nd&refcode=jtk1109-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzc3NTU2MS04NDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESV3b-jfx63iU2WZSPaHi-sUAAIUd5GdSPInIDjZs38=&emci=ee72ef8e-6649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f7775561-844c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24265352)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38933421/317674399/-1637588567?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1109-su-nd&refcode=jtk1109-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzc3NTU2MS04NDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESV3b-jfx63iU2WZSPaHi-sUAAIUd5GdSPInIDjZs38=&emci=ee72ef8e-6649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f7775561-844c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24265352)
---
_This poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight. Late responses will not be counted._
---
Thank you for sticking by my side as I work with national leaders to push our country forward.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ee72ef8e-6649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/f7775561-844c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzc3NTU2MS04NDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESV3b-jfx63iU2WZSPaHi-sUAAIUd5GdSPInIDjZs38=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

body:
Why our Giving Tuesday goal is so important | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38933554/317674697/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5YmIxMy04NTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuERSgi9xQAauvGA6RQUll5f4UV9Pb_rH3oUn6b-T40=&emci=e232af2c-8c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0069bb13-854c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=561582) | Hey there! Did you get a chance to read Kelly’s message yesterday? We set a powerfully important goal to raise $5,000 this Giving Tuesday to fuel our 2022 efforts. [_**If you haven’t had a chance yet, can you chip in whatever you can afford right now to kickstart our fundraising and help us hit that $5,000 goal?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38933556/317674698/-2008373766?refcode=E12542-20211123-GTAnnouncementEM2-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5YmIxMy04NTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OuERSgi9xQAauvGA6RQUll5f4UV9Pb_rH3oUn6b-T40=) _Why is this goal so important?_ When most folks think about the 2022 midterms, they’re probably most concerned with which party is taking hold of the majority in Congress. **We on the other hand, will be keeping our heads down and doing what we do best — _fighting in states across the country to pass progressive change for millions of Americans via the ballot box._** _**We’ll be frank**_ — when elected officials and politicians refuse to act in the interests of their constituents, our government isn’t really working for the people. **Ballot measures empower voters to take the power back into their own hands.** By mobilizing hundreds of thousands of voters in states across the country, we’ve been able to pass some pretty incredible policies that benefit working people in America. **And next year is no different.** We’ll be fighting to pass ballot measures around the country that expand Medicaid, raise the minimum wage, provide paid leave, end the predatory practices of payday lenders, and defend democratic institutions. clean_body: Why our Giving Tuesday goal is so important | | Hey there! Did you get a chance to read Kelly’s message yesterday? We set a powerfully important goal to raise $5,000 this Giving Tuesday to fuel our 2022 efforts. = Why is this goal so important? When most folks think about the 2022 midterms, they’re probably most concerned with which party is taking hold of the majority in Congress. We on the other hand, will be keeping our heads down and doing what we do best — fighting in states across the country to pass progressive change for millions of Americans via the ballot box. We’ll be frank — when elected officials and politicians refuse to act in the interests of their constituents, our government isn’t really working for the people. Ballot measures empower voters to take the power back into their own hands. By mobilizing hundreds of thousands of voters in states across the country, we’ve been able to pass some pretty incredible policies that benefit working people in America. And next year is no different. We’ll be fighting to pass ballot measures around the country that expand Medicaid, raise the minimum wage, provide paid leave, end the predatory practices of payday lenders, and defend democratic institutions. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = No matter who takes control of Congress, you can bet we’ll be winning campaigns that improve the lives of working people across America next November. Thanks for fueling our fight! — The Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at The Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Help ensure families have food this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
With Thanksgiving this week and the end-of-year holidays around the corner -- and with COVID continuing to impact our families and communities -- our local food banks need urgent support.
#
Peter,
With Thanksgiving this week and the end-of-year holidays around the corner -- and with COVID continuing to impact our families and communities -- our local food banks need urgent support.
I have selected these food banks serving different parts of our state and region that need our support: the Greater Chicago Food Depository, Midwest Food Bank, Operation Food Search, Northeast Community Fund, the Central Illinois Food Bank, and the Northern Illinois Food Bank.
**[Will you step up and pitch in $5 now to help feed Illinois families in need this holiday season?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38933627/317674782/-427819121?refcode=dd_em_211123_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U3MGM3Zi04NTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LlRqdgO91hanvLaAxFBDqNj5R2ffgtvMv6vS0cKB7XY=)**
Food banks are essential to our communities and continue to be swamped by the increased need the COVID-19 pandemic has created. They are doing their best to help people across the state feed their families and celebrate the holidays.
As we continue to live through this pandemic together this holiday season, we need to look out for one another. Let's be Americans and Illinoisans hanging together at this tough time and supporting our neighbors.
**[Contribute $5 or any amount now to support Illinois food banks this Thanksgiving.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38933628/317674783/-427819121?refcode=dd_em_211123_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U3MGM3Zi04NTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LlRqdgO91hanvLaAxFBDqNj5R2ffgtvMv6vS0cKB7XY=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38933629/317674784/-427819121?refcode=dd_em_211123_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U3MGM3Zi04NTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LlRqdgO91hanvLaAxFBDqNj5R2ffgtvMv6vS0cKB7XY=)****

name: Team Gearing
subject: It starts here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

While families across Texas have struggled during this pandemic to keep their homes and put food on the table for their children, right-wing leaders in Austin ignored their needs and instead have pandered to their extremist, Trump-loving base with divisive policies that pit neighbors against each other. Enough is enough.

Charlie is running to represent our community in Austin and fight for a Texas where all of our neighbors are welcomed, loved, and included. But he can’t do it without your help - can you chip in today to help us meet our end of month goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Texans deserve leaders who will fight for their rights and focus on delivering the changes that our families need. As our next State Representative, Charlie will always focus on the issues that matter like creating good paying jobs, fixing and securing our power grid, reducing property taxes, restoring and protecting reproductive rights, and defending LGBTQ+ children from senseless bullying.

Together we can build a Better Texas. It starts here in District 114 - will you join us? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

- Team Gearing
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90675/images/Gearing_SHLogo_blueonlightblue.png]Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: The DOJ is the greatest domestic threat to America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnPpJkppFjF3MWZ7ZlpP9hFfD4ss3xXyjUm2ay3b_7b206-wh7JPYU280gaHpaO1IbjqeliTtnfth2ArLQyyuUG3T4aK5Wj6Vrw-sqew-kJxUBXFXjdCAkHuZP5e8U5IqWfE-82LlV2As8sbV1nJ6mqIYMrEFa4KHOOrLB9aE0sbI7u1Qgtn7A==&c=OUsJYGACXzfD6zsbE-6aeJpvvOG2aOIWdZxWu2Nx8AaVgOCbUv0elQ==&ch=1HjCPxUrNJtbxLzb6XPmTg3q4vhjNDborJiygDTsTC_ntyDhT-0FLQ==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Last Friday, we conservatives (and decent people everywhere) breathed a sigh of relief after Kyle Rittenhouse was found not guilty on all charges.
It was the right decision by the jury, but even so, Kyle should have never been put through that experience in the first place. It's clear he was targeted for his political beliefs and, yes, even his skin color.
The President of the United States, Democrat members of Congress, and countless leftwing media pundits have all called Kyle a white supremacist, even after he was found "not guilty" by a jury of his peers.
Now, Jerry Nadler, the head of the Judiciary Committee, has called for a DOJ investigation into the case. That's right, the left is once again using the nation's law enforcement to go after a political enemy and torment an innocent man.
---
| | | [STOP THE THREATS AGAINST CONSERVATIVES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnPpJkppFjF3MWZ7ZlpP9hFfD4ss3xXyjUm2ay3b_7b206-wh7JPYU280gaHpaO1IbjqeliTtnfth2ArLQyyuUG3T4aK5Wj6Vrw-sqew-kJxUBXFXjdCAkHuZP5e8U5IqWfE-82LlV2As8sbV1nJ6mqIYMrEFa4KHOOrLB9aE0sbI7u1Qgtn7A==&c=OUsJYGACXzfD6zsbE-6aeJpvvOG2aOIWdZxWu2Nx8AaVgOCbUv0elQ==&ch=1HjCPxUrNJtbxLzb6XPmTg3q4vhjNDborJiygDTsTC_ntyDhT-0FLQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, | Last Friday, we conservatives (and decent people everywhere) breathed a sigh of relief after Kyle Rittenhouse was found not guilty on all charges. It was the right decision by the jury, but even so, Kyle should have never been put through that experience in the first place. It's clear he was targeted for his political beliefs and, yes, even his skin color. The President of the United States, Democrat members of Congress, and countless leftwing media pundits have all called Kyle a white supremacist, even after he was found "not guilty" by a jury of his peers. Now, Jerry Nadler, the head of the Judiciary Committee, has called for a DOJ investigation into the case. That's right, the left is once again using the nation's law enforcement to go after a political enemy and torment an innocent man. | | | == | == | We need to stand united and recognize that the left's tactic of punishing their political opponents using the Department of Justice is our greatest domestic threat. If you're ready to join me in this fight, == | | | == | Thanks for joining me, Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | == | | | | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. Christina Bohannan has experienced the transformational power of education. Growing up in a trailer down a rural dirt road, the daughter of hardworking parents without high school degrees, Christina didn't imagine the life she would eventually build. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38934015/317675944/397479554?refcode=em_2021123bohannanb_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlODY5NDA1LTg3NGMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GA0G2w6Za5cjcvcZpHP_eQBzCfu2_fxTIxdumIYwMKw=)

Educators and Allies Educators and Allies, Christina Bohannan has experienced the transformational power of education. Growing up in a trailer down a rural dirt road, the daughter of hardworking parents without high school degrees, Christina didn't imagine the life she would eventually build. Her determination, and the support of caring educators along the way, made it possible to attend college and graduate law school, become an engineer and then a law school professor. Now, she's running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country. **Elect Educators Everywhere is proud to endorse Christina Bohannan, an educator for 19 years and a State Representative, running in the new 1st Congressional District in Iowa.** **** | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38934016/317675945/397479554?refcode=em_2021123bohannanb_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlODY5NDA1LTg3NGMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GA0G2w6Za5cjcvcZpHP_eQBzCfu2_fxTIxdumIYwMKw=)

[Support Christina with a contribution today - when you split a contribution to Christina's campaign and EEE, you help both of us tell her story to more voters and potential supporters. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38934017/317675946/397479554?refcode=em_2021123bohannanb_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlODY5NDA1LTg3NGMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GA0G2w6Za5cjcvcZpHP_eQBzCfu2_fxTIxdumIYwMKw=)
Christina's been recognized four times for her teaching and scholarship, and consistently elected to leadership positions by her colleagues. She's a leader among educators at the Iowa Law School, and an inspiring voice for educators throughout the state.
What she needs now is our support to build a strong campaign and take the seat back. _**Join us in supporting Christina:**_

subject: Let's Get to Work addressing Rhode Island's housing crisis

Peter,

Everyone who works in Rhode Island should be able to afford to live in Rhode Island. But right now, more than a third of Rhode Island households are classified as cost burdened by housing.

Our state has continued to struggle with our lack of housing supply and the COVID-19 pandemic has only made this crisis worse. That's why yesterday, I released [our plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38934222/317677186/-76982978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTRiMDkyOS04NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpvb-thykw1lGZiN0dUOPAiajQEBaYmKy4mH0PXwlWI=&emci=6be161cb-734c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c54b0929-874c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15384964) to solve Rhode Island's housing crisis.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38934226/317677190/-917020693?ms=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&refcode=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&source=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7mm4Ic1SJmoH8JVMH%2F5uAyqxTSq2iYA0UlvvZhyJ%2BSfknc9LFCAtygq1i83vzENU0ysaKhopVTaOk2vg4DtsvAuTX0BBsXYQjimcQTcD19hph2Bhepbq9aXVvc7DFux1brBTrld3ndqHKl2PK9Rt3Gd0TTFeiTENSEtSNskaTzo%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTRiMDkyOS04NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpvb-thykw1lGZiN0dUOPAiajQEBaYmKy4mH0PXwlWI=&emci=6be161cb-734c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c54b0929-874c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15384964)
---
As your next Governor, I will make major investments to make housing more affordable for Rhode Islanders and end homelessness in our state.

I will make housing a priority of the state government by creating a cabinet level housing agency to develop and implement a housing plan for our state. We'll create more housing by investing in thousands of units of affordable homes, investing in infrastructure, and reducing red tape for affordable housing development. And together, we'll work toward ending homelessness by instituting a Housing First approach.

[**Together we can ensure that every Rhode Islander has access to affordable housing. Will you add your name to support my plan to make housing more affordable for Rhode Islanders?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38934230/317677194/-917020693?ms=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&refcode=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&source=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7mm4Ic1SJmoH8JVMH%2F5uAyqxTSq2iYA0UlvvZhyJ%2BSfknc9LFCAtygq1i83vzENU0ysaKhopVTaOk2vg4DtsvAuTX0BBsXYQjimcQTcD19hph2Bhepbq9aXVvc7DFux1brBTrld3ndqHKl2PK9Rt3Gd0TTFeiTENSEtSNskaTzo%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTRiMDkyOS04NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpvb-thykw1lGZiN0dUOPAiajQEBaYmKy4mH0PXwlWI=&emci=6be161cb-734c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c54b0929-874c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15384964)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38934234/317677198/-917020693?ms=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&refcode=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&source=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7mm4Ic1SJmoH8JVMH%2F5uAyqxTSq2iYA0UlvvZhyJ%2BSfknc9LFCAtygq1i83vzENU0ysaKhopVTaOk2vg4DtsvAuTX0BBsXYQjimcQTcD19hph2Bhepbq9aXVvc7DFux1brBTrld3ndqHKl2PK9Rt3Gd0TTFeiTENSEtSNskaTzo%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTRiMDkyOS04NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpvb-thykw1lGZiN0dUOPAiajQEBaYmKy4mH0PXwlWI=&emci=6be161cb-734c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c54b0929-874c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15384964)
---
As a Board member of Rhode Island Housing and Crossroads Rhode Island, I've seen the importance of investing in housing firsthand. I was the first candidate to call out the slow rollout of RentReliefRI, and I proposed a plan to fix it. I led the fight to approve more than $115 million in affordable housing development through two housing bonds, and I testified and supported the bill to protect Rhode Islanders from source of income discrimination.

I believe that every Rhode Islander has the right to a dignified home regardless of background, and as Governor, I will fight to make affordable housing for all a reality.

[**Add your name if you're ready to get to work on solving Rhode Island's housing crisis.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38934237/317677202/-917020693?ms=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&refcode=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&source=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211123_affrdh_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7mm4Ic1SJmoH8JVMH%2F5uAyqxTSq2iYA0UlvvZhyJ%2BSfknc9LFCAtygq1i83vzENU0ysaKhopVTaOk2vg4DtsvAuTX0BBsXYQjimcQTcD19hph2Bhepbq9aXVvc7DFux1brBTrld3ndqHKl2PK9Rt3Gd0TTFeiTENSEtSNskaTzo%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTRiMDkyOS04NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpvb-thykw1lGZiN0dUOPAiajQEBaYmKy4mH0PXwlWI=&emci=6be161cb-734c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c54b0929-874c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15384964)

name: Ted Deutch
subject: Coming together this Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Deutch for Congress
body:
| Happy Thanksgiving, friends!

I’m so grateful to be able to represent you in Congress. Whether you’re a Democrat, Republican or Independent, you have supported my efforts to make our schools and communities safe from gun violence, help our families, front-line workers and local businesses get through the Covid-19 pandemic, consistently uphold America’s values and stand with our allies and friends like Israel when they’re under attack, and make historic and bipartisan investments in our infrastructure.

Gratitude can bring us together; Thanksgiving gives us that opportunity. I hope we’ll take advantage.

Thanks again, and happy Thanksgiving.

Warmly,

Ted

I hope you'll take a moment to read the entire email, then consider donating $3 to protect public lands in our state and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38935590/317682074/102973118?refcode=em-112321-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJjNDE4MS04YTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mmidDkImF3l_NCavAzXtRXxGA41gzhdxxs0VKZ4i0U=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38935591/317682075/102973118?refcode=em-112321-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJjNDE4MS04YTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mmidDkImF3l_NCavAzXtRXxGA41gzhdxxs0VKZ4i0U=)
_Horseback riding with my mom and grandpa. (My brother pictured)_
Like most in Montana, I was raised with a close connection to our lands. My dad would hunt, and my family spent all of our free time outdoors -- camping, hiking, rafting, and fishing.

There was a real sense of freedom then. I remember my best friend and I would just jump on her horses and ride the open lands that surrounded us -- both private and public -- with very few barriers or fences in our way. Our neighbors readily shared access to their lands, and we all shared and cared for them collectively.

**Things have changed, but that connection to our land is still a big part of who we are as Montanans. It's why protecting public lands is so central to my campaign for Congress. And it's why I stood so strongly with local land custodians when my opponent Ryan Zinke tried to destroy national monuments for fossil fuel exploration.**

**[Montanans deserve a representative who will defend our public lands -- not sell them to the highest bidder. That's why I'm running for Congress, but I can't win this race without support from grassroots donors like you. If you can, please chip in $3 to support my campaign in MT-01.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38935592/317682076/102973118?refcode=em-112321-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJjNDE4MS04YTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mmidDkImF3l_NCavAzXtRXxGA41gzhdxxs0VKZ4i0U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38935593/317682077/102973118?refcode=em-112321-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJjNDE4MS04YTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mmidDkImF3l_NCavAzXtRXxGA41gzhdxxs0VKZ4i0U=)

In Montana, defending public lands transcends party politics. It's important to our native communities, conservation leaders, ranchers, and hunters alike.

That unity is something we're very proud of, and it's why we're all equally disturbed when politicians like Ryan Zinke rip up environmental safeguards and exploit public lands for corporate profits.

**Now he wants to represent us in Congress? Not on our watch.**

This campaign is our best shot at electing a public lands advocate who will stand up to Zinke and the corporate polluters, but I can’t win this race alone:

**[We’re still a bit short of our end-of-week fundraising goal, and I can use a boost before the deadline. Please chip in $3 to help us win this race and send a public lands ally to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38935599/317682083/102973118?refcode=em-112321-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJjNDE4MS04YTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mmidDkImF3l_NCavAzXtRXxGA41gzhdxxs0VKZ4i0U=)**

Thanks for your support,

Cora

clean_body: | = Friend, = = Horseback riding with my mom and grandpa. (My brother pictured) Like most in Montana, I was raised with a close connection to our lands. My dad would hunt, and my family spent all of our free time outdoors -- camping, hiking, rafting, and fishing. There was a real sense of freedom then. I remember my best friend and I would just jump on her horses and ride the open lands that surrounded us -- both private and public -- with very few barriers or fences in our way. Our neighbors readily shared access to their lands, and we all shared and cared for them collectively. Things have changed, but that connection to our land is still a big part of who we are as Montanans. It's why protecting public lands is so central to my campaign for Congress. And it's why I stood so strongly with local land custodians when my opponent Ryan Zinke tried to destroy national monuments for fossil fuel exploration. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = In Montana, defending public lands transcends party politics. It's important to our native communities, conservation leaders, ranchers, and hunters alike. That unity is something we're very proud of, and it's why we're all equally disturbed when politicians like Ryan Zinke rip up environmental safeguards and exploit public lands for corporate profits. Now he wants to represent us in Congress? Not on our watch. This campaign is our best shot at electing a public lands advocate who will stand up to Zinke and the corporate polluters, but I can’t win this race alone: = Thanks for your support, Cora = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cora for Montana PO Box 428 Bozeman, MT 59771 United States

| NEW POLL: Governor Eric Greitens Extends Already Massive Lead Over Democrat in 2022 US Senate Race in Missouri
---
| As reported by [POLITICO](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MOdUepCPEXfPA_ETUwjLPwBQYHmoBhG4Hbp6Dmp-_wSI6Cw5EeDksJhXTkVUcHmQ97-gr1yvdWU_Jqr05nypPI7MCG8iyiuaJ7Etx7NPPbfwzrB_aAgHkp4cn_z3vPHHWNnkwBDYOO1d4YGKIJKv6EPPEE3jbYJ9&c=N9p7en3_SG-OyJXanO5sDpsQUTGS6jDAVyDfy3cMY7mpBz7H42YYAQ==&ch=gpsfebvZQbyMzZlvwD1O6k7qQ4bObK3zDWcxGxMpvUujTYfodvhqaw==), newly released [WPA Intelligence](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MOdUepCPEXfPA_ETUwjLPwBQYHmoBhG4Hbp6Dmp-_wSI6Cw5EeDksJhXTkVUcHmQjn7u9GhI1Qc88AVfKGdg-Y-fJGdi2uLWfDCspnho7WDq7pN2bjPWYnVBhK47E2yq4JDxPkcbcQA=&c=N9p7en3_SG-OyJXanO5sDpsQUTGS6jDAVyDfy3cMY7mpBz7H42YYAQ==&ch=gpsfebvZQbyMzZlvwD1O6k7qQ4bObK3zDWcxGxMpvUujTYfodvhqaw==) polling shows former Missouri Governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens extending his significant lead over a generic Democrat challenger to +13 points.
According to the publicly released memo, WPAI finds that Greitens leads a generic Democrat in the 2022 General Election for the US Senate with 49% compared to a generic Democrat's 36%.
"Eric Greitens is the clear front runner in the Missouri Senate race. With the Dems unable to field a candidate, Greitens has a clear path to victory in November. All but certain he wins the primary," [tweeted Billy Grant](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MOdUepCPEXfPA_ETUwjLPwBQYHmoBhG4Hbp6Dmp-_wSI6Cw5EeDksJhXTkVUcHmQSo30a-ZLx6iJ0meubZUnngzzAAkGbMc3TB0FWmBau_k7EUL2ytCJWwy--NjfAUXmP6X3Uz3CtBzrpyFIAxgHT8M1DzP8KOaGFHz3LYpRE81Jo6PhWSh7eY5CV99zzDmJFd7ALYwHMDIlDvASvMVwtA==&c=N9p7en3_SG-OyJXanO5sDpsQUTGS6jDAVyDfy3cMY7mpBz7H42YYAQ==&ch=gpsfebvZQbyMzZlvwD1O6k7qQ4bObK3zDWcxGxMpvUujTYfodvhqaw==), a GOP strategist.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Friend, One of the reasons we’re so proud to be on Team Collier is because Mike will be the education champion that Texas deserves. While Dan Patrick has failed our students, educators, and parents, Mike has fought for the last decade to fix our broken education system. It’s the reason he got into politics in the first place. Here’s what Mike believes:
* Public money ought to go to public schools for the public good (NO vouchers)
* Fully fund our public schools in order to lower class sizes, hire more special education teachers, and raise educator salaries
* Rein in standardized testing which is destroying critical thinking skills
* Make Texas public schools the envy of the nation

These are just a few of the ways Mike plans to go all in on public schools, not fight against them like Dan Patrick does. [**If you’re ready for Texas schools to provide the greatest education in the country to our kids, chip in any amount right now to support Mike’s campaign for Lt. Governor. Here’s what Mike believes: Public money ought to go to public schools for the public good (NO vouchers) Fully fund our public schools in order to lower class sizes, hire more special education teachers, and raise educator salaries Rein in standardized testing which is destroying critical thinking skills Make Texas public schools the envy of the nation These are just a few of the ways Mike plans to go all in on public schools, not fight against them like Dan Patrick does. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

Ken is not your typical candidate. He is adventurous and compassionate. He cares deeply about the future of our planet and our beautiful environment here in Florida. I have seen Ken do everything from windsurfing in a hurricane to taking action to clean up Biscayne Bay and our local neighborhood park.
My husband is unique, and he will bring that one-of-a-kind energy to Washington, DC.
**[With your help, Floridians can finally have the leadership we deserve in the Senate. We need support from you to win, so can you make a donation of $30 to Ken’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38935844/317683220/-949005956?refcode=211123-email-wife&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQ5MjM3OS04YjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGSbzFyu9Q3eBEoMJsDkGmJS0wANeObOoeuqHqr_ocI=)**

subject: We've reached out a few times, Friend -- is this the best email for you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
As of 9:00 AM, we DO NOT have a response from you. So I'm touching base one last time...
Hi Friend --
This is Jordan from Republican Headquarters. I heard my colleague, Sarah, reached out to you a few times. [**Could you spare a moment to answer a quick (but important) question about President Trump?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852633:6cnX2U25N:m:1:3299561967:6D7708F0CAB2E8F5819EA0AC6B29CC79:r)
He just announced his new app for freedom-loving Patriots. _Almost_ everyone seems to be THRILLED to sign up. But as of 9:00 AM, we DO NOT have a response from you. So I'm touching base one last time: Do you plan on signing up?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852633:6cnX2U25N:m:1:3299561967:6D7708F0CAB2E8F5819EA0AC6B29CC79:r)
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852633:6cnX2U25N:m:1:3299561967:6D7708F0CAB2E8F5819EA0AC6B29CC79:r)**
**[No. I Do Not Stand With Trump >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852633:6cnX2U25N:m:1:3299561967:6D7708F0CAB2E8F5819EA0AC6B29CC79:r)**
President Trump is building a platform for proud American Patriots like you and me. He promised: ✖️ No Conservative censorship ✖️<< No shadow bans ✖️ No blacklists. It's incredible!
[**I know you 're busy but could you please take a moment to respond? President Trump needs to know if you're with him... or if you're with the Liberals.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58852633:6cnX2U25N:m:1:3299561967:6D7708F0CAB2E8F5819EA0AC6B29CC79:r)
Thank you so much,
\-- Jordan

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38936105/317684313/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2FiOGQzNi04ZDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9bqVTEhNIgeJbLMgQQa4dyO3lNeVZwaaGjO8LjwM5A=)
I'll be direct, friend.

I'm a Christian and an ordained pastor, and I'll never shy away from my faith and values.

It always bothered me that folks got the idea somehow that one political party held the monopoly on faith in this country._I couldn't disagree more._

I'm a Democrat _because_ my faith calls on me to take care of the least among us. My faith also calls on me to reject the division and hatred that have come to define our political process. And my faith gives me the hope to know that change is possible if we can all come together as one.

**This campaign is about giving everyone in this community the benefit of their humanity. That’s how we come together and solve the issues we face -- on affordable housing, education access, and creating more pathways to economic prosperity.**

We can win this race, but I'm counting on your help to do it:

**[I know you work hard for every dollar you earn, but today I'm hoping you take a moment to chip in $3 to help me flip North Carolina's 14th District for the people. We're falling short of our goal and we still need another 34 donations before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38936106/317684314/1573898945?refcode=em-112321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2FiOGQzNi04ZDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9bqVTEhNIgeJbLMgQQa4dyO3lNeVZwaaGjO8LjwM5A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38936107/317684315/1573898945?refcode=em-112321-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2FiOGQzNi04ZDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9bqVTEhNIgeJbLMgQQa4dyO3lNeVZwaaGjO8LjwM5A=)

body:
|

| | | Patriot, this is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.")**_

Biden's border crisis is out of control, and states like Florida are taking a stand against the Administration's reckless policy of open borders and mass illegal immigration.

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Senate Vote on Vax Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

When Joe Biden announced his illegal,
unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn't
whine or fidget. They acted:
▶︎ Within hours of the mandate's announcement,
Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) had drafted a letter telling Senate
leadership that he would not vote for any government spending
bills that funded the vaccine mandate.
▶︎ By the time Sen. Braun's letter was released,
a dozen other members had signed on.
▶︎ As more Republicans in the House and the
Senate joined the defund fight, all 50 Senate Republicans took
the next step and triggered a process to force a December vote in
the House and Senate to rescind Biden's vaccine order. Now all
Democrats will have to go on record defending Biden's un-American
policy - or the mandate will be toast. This is how you win a
fight in Washington. One punch... then another... then another.
Unlike the Left, conservatives can't wait for the media or
Hollywood or Big Tech to fight for us. We have to do it
ourselves. That can be daunting in a city hostile to conservative
values. But as you know, and as Senate Conservatives Fund has
been arguing for years, COURAGE COUNTS.
Please help us elect more courageous conservatives!
When a federal appeals court ordered Biden to halt
his vaccine mandate pending further litigation, the White House
initially and smugly told federal agencies to ignore the court.
But Senate conservatives didn't back down. And as more
Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed
course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate! Thanks
to conservative leadership, for now, THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE
MANDATE. None of this would be happening if Senate
conservatives answered Biden's assault on our freedoms with empty
tweets and press releases. They are SENATORS, not just pundits.
And they acted like it! On this defining vaccine mandate issue,
conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning.
We need your help to support conservative leadership
in the Senate so please make a contribution to SCF today!
SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his
colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate.
And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready
to join the fight. The defunding vote is coming soon.

Please help us push the Senate to join conservatives
in stopping Biden's vaccine mandate. Thank you for considering
this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for
America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Jake Evans
subject: The Radical Left Is Retreating!
body:
It's happening, the radical left is retreating from...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,
[It's happening, the radical left is retreating from Georgia's 6th District!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W1L8APC6WnZ8h-9zOs9GsZcSPgaaBC2SxUOYez3WC7e2UYASTGt0oKf-Mc-Rk4chbYL-PlnmRAH0WhUfrHyLeEXViIlRC_Il0Ycvxg-K9kTmiHti7B288tY7qqLWyxfAFGsXkCD5UFldLdf139b38fbXPmnOBURDLJiwehcYUvjrqwr9wanO-phybSCRL6Gp&c=FxJDYb032sll3YH7Wr6q2TSIN0plL0XcNEYWe4-lhPfX6SqACMYJNg==&ch=4ijRS1WCod2S-GsHtkTeEq6FxMEFPDPn_8PeNQF71s8-JmsOOx5ABg==)
Yesterday, my far-left opponent, Lucy McBath, informed the voters that she would be withdrawing from the race for Georgia's 6th Congressional District.
Lefty Lucy has provided Biden and Pelosi unwavering support for reckless spending, crippling inflation, a crisis at our border, and massive tax hikes.
But even with McBath in retreat, our fight to restore our country is just getting started.

subject: Luna the Blue Dem in a Red Coat
body:
A recent survey by St. Pete Polls shows RINO Luna.... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=65f92aab61&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, Florida’s 13th District is ground zero in the battle for control of the U.S. House. This race could literally determine whether we have another two years of Speaker Nancy Pelosi - or whether we fire Pelosi and install a Republican Speaker who will put a stop to the socialist agenda currently running rampant in Washington **That’s why we simply can’t afford to nominate phony Anna Paulina Luna again. ** Luna, like our current congressman Charlie Crist, changes her political beliefs when it suits her. After supporting the Obama/Biden ticket - twice! - she’s trying to convince Floridians that she’s now a conservative. Don’t take my word for it - here’s what Luna herself told an adult magazine she posed for about her philosophy: **_“I’m able to take on different personalities depending on what image I am going for. I think getting into character of what you are selling is super important.”_ \- Anna Paulina Luna** ****
---
| [NO MORE RINOS](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=35a49437d7&e=c2296cffff "NO MORE RINOS")

| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ef78273ba8&e=c2296cffff)
---
| **FL-13 doesn’t need a phony conservative who supported the socialist Obama/Biden agenda TWICE, even after seeing how they governed in their first term!** It’s high time for authentic conservative leadership in our district. That’s why I’m asking for your support in this primary, to ensure we have a real Republican nominee who can take back this seat next year - and then stay true to our values once elected! [**Can I count on your support today?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ae2090d002&e=c2296cffff)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Expel Gosar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, NBC reports that radical extremist Paul Gosar posted a “video that depicts him killing Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and attacking President Joe Biden.” Now—as POLITICO reports that for AOC, “death threats are a normal part of her existence”—the Republican Party is aggressively protecting extremists like Paul Gosar, Josh Hawley, and Ted Cruz. That's because Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell know that by boosting every extremist member, they will reactivate Donald Trump's radical far-right base, steal back the House, steal back the Senate, and reinstall Trump in the White House in 2024. Mitch McConnell and the special interest donors behind him are furious that we are moving forward with President Biden's ambitious Build Back Better agenda. BBB will help lower the costs of healthcare, senior care, prescription drugs and child care while giving working families with kids a big tax cut. And it's PAID FOR with a tax surcharge on those making over $10 million a year and by closing loopholes that reward corporations that move American jobs overseas. Earlier this week, Maryland's Republican Governor called the Build Back Better Act "nothing but a reckless grab bag of massive tax hikes... and handouts to special interests." He's the person McConnell is trying to recruit to run against me in order to turn this Maryland Senate seat RED and put Mitch back in charge in the U.S. Senate! disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS

A win for America. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/illegals-dead-of-night4657114-4657213?e=af4b86f5c6)

| | Dear Peter,

I trust you've seen the news.

Kyle Rittenhouse is a free man -- as he should be.

His acquittal is a major victory for American Patriots, affirming our God-given right to self-defense.

_But what happened in Kenosha was still a massive failure by the government to impose order_.

Unlike the weak RINOs and the destructive, violent Communist Democrats, I'll put the safety of our communities first when I'm elected to Congress.

_**[I'm counting on your support to help me get here](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=5037dc8e90&e=af4b86f5c6).**_

[_**Help me reimpose Law and Order, and stop the violent Communists from burning our country to the ground with a generous contribution to my election campaign today**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=dc300721e6&e=af4b86f5c6).

Any of us could have been Kyle Rittenhouse -- protecting our communities from violent thugs.

But we shouldn't have to live this way.

The Communist revolutionaries who want to destroy our way of life through violence need to be met with force. _We must enforce the law and hold them accountable_.

**[_Chip into my election campaign today and show me you support order, not chaos in the streets_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=43de86ba68&e=af4b86f5c6). **

I am grateful for Kyle Rittenhouse's freedom.

But if we don't get our Communist problem under control, we will never be able to live in peace.

I'm asking you to help me impose order in our streets through your generous [_**contributions**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d0d075c146&e=af4b86f5c6) today. [_**> > Chip in $10
>> Chip in $25
>> Chip in $50
>> Chip in 100
>> Chip in $250
>> Chip in ANY AMOUNT **_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=89b7dc8c46&e=af4b86f5c6)
Thank you in advance for joining me in the battle for Law and Order.
For America,
**** **Chief Jarome Bell**
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District

**P.S. Thankfully, Kyle Rittenhouse is a free man, and the right to self-defense is alive and well.

But the Communists in our streets must be met with force. **

**_[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a1588092c4&e=af4b86f5c6)_****Help me get to Washington so I can hold these violent thugs accountable by chipping into my election campaign today**.

name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m running for U.S. House in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hi, it’s Erica. I have
exciting news to share with you, and I wanted to make sure you heard it
from me first:

I’m officially running for the U.S. House to represent North Carolina’s
2nd District.

I’m so proud of the work we’ve done with your support in our U.S. Senate
race. We’ve visited all 100 counties, knocked on doors, held town halls,
and ran on a bold, transformational platform. We’ve changed this race —
and this state — for the better.

But let me tell you a little bit about why I’m running for the U.S. House.
Our moral movement has never been about winning one campaign, or winning a
particular office. It’s been about service, and showing up where we’re
needed.

My member of Congress, G.K. Butterfield, announced his retirement last
week after a GOP gerrymander turned this safe Democratic district into a
swing district.

After talking to my family and community leaders, and after a whole lot of
prayer, it is clear to me that representing the 2nd congressional district
is how I can best serve my community going forward.

I grew up in this district. I live in this district. I represented most of
the communities in this district. This is my home.

Just as my community has always been there for me in my times of need, I'm
going to be there for my community in its time of need.

The first step toward winning this race is showing as much momentum as
possible during these first 24 hours. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27191?t=1001&akid=649%2E3698%2E5lz5Ro ]That’s why I’m humbly asking if you can
become a day one founding donor. It would mean the world to me to have you
continue on this journey with me. Any contribution today, no matter how
big or small, will help set the tone for the rest of our House campaign.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27192?refcode=em20211123-649&t=1002&akid=649%2E3698%2E5lz5Ro ]Become a founding donor

We're going to continue the fight for a brighter future for rural North
Carolina. I've run in a racially gerrymandered district before, and won,
and I'm going to do it again. I've represented over half of these counties
in the state senate, and I’ve never lost an election here.

I've lived the struggles facing so many families across this district. I
understand where we are, the challenges we're facing, and the kind of
representation we need right now. We will come together, from small towns
and farms across our district, to win this seat for the people and deliver
a New Deal for rural North Carolinians.

This has always been about what’s best for North Carolina, and that’s never going to change for me.
[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27191?t=1003&akid=649%2E3698%2E5lz5Ro ]Your support is critical to this effort, and that’s why I’m asking: Can
I count on you to become a day one founding donor?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27192?refcode=em20211123-649&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=649%2E3698%2E5lz5Ro ]Donate $5

Thank you for joining our moral movement. I can’t wait for you to see what
we can accomplish together.

Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. House

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211123-649-footer&t=1023&refcode2=649_3698_5lz5Ro&akid=649%2E3698%2E5lz5Ro

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=649%2E3698%2E5lz5Ro

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

They hate that I'm President Trump's best ally in Congress, and they want to see me destroyed. . This is nothing new for me, fellow Patriot. They've been trying to silence me since they stole the 2020 election. Loser Republicans like Evan McMullin and Bill Kristol want to support a primary challenger against me. I have a simple message for them: bring it on. . I won't stop fighting to put America First, no matter what they throw at me. That's what this is all about. They're desperate to kill our movement. . . | For America, Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District P.S. The Communist Democrats, RINOs, media, and even SNL are calling for my head. They want me gone because they hate that I'm putting America First. . | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | Team, **Climate change poses a big threat to our country,** especially in states like Nevada where the natural climate trends warmer and dryer. Here’s how Susie Lee has been working hard to address it in Congress: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38937607/317691786/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211123_FR_ISSUESERIES2_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc5ZGZhMy05MTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KdlD06ScbZpyfmqvxSxippv38UbJZ9sIuHDabVG-fRE=) **Thanks to the hard work of Susie Lee and her Democratic colleagues,** the Build Back Better Act passed in the House just last week! name: Tom Nelson
subject: Helping victims of the Waukesha tragedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Friends,

I was deeply saddened to hear news about the tragic event that occurred Sunday night in Waukesha. On a night where nothing but holiday cheer was meant to be present, five lives were taken and dozens were injured.

My deepest condolences go out to the friends, families, and entire community affected by this horrible tragedy. No one should ever have to experience senseless acts of violence like this. I am grateful for the first responders, police and health care workers who responded so promptly.

While nothing can completely bring back what we’ve lost, local organizations are taking action to help those impacted by the attack. If you can help, please, consider donating today to the United for Waukesha Community Fund: [**_https://wccf.fcsuite.com/erp/donate/create?funit_id=3559_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38938001/317692995/111526658?funit_id=3559&refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211123_1_1&refcode2=5bbda859-934c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmJkYTg1OS05MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QmaT9jjCPBwf5-aNhQlQiDwrYQsLKoPUuzip6mpZ-So=&emci=d8194a5b-844c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5bbda859-934c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925)

Tom

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Help us pick our next shameful Marjorie Taylor Greene Award winner.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://www.kpef.info/gtm-poll-december [https://www.kpef.info/gtm-poll-december]

Dear Friend,

As you now know, each month, we choose the most odious mover and shaker dead set on taking down democracy to shame with our Marjorie Taylor Greene Award. We’re talking about some of the most deeply cruel and deceitful Pennsylvanians who make your skin crawl and invite nightmares about the future of our nation.

Today we need your help picking our next winner.

Here are our candidates:

Jake Corman: While working to roll back policies that protect the public from COVID-19, PA Sen. Corman recently had to cancel his gubernatorial-run announcement party because he ironically had contracted COVID. This man also spearheaded the total-waste-of-time-and-money Senate Intergovernmental Operations Committee to suck PA taxpayers dry by investigating false claims of election fraud. It's more than a little suspicious that a guy thirsting for the highest office in the state is also doing overtime to sow doubt in our elections. With Corman around, something is rotten in the state of PA.

Paul Martino : School board elections have turned into cultural bloodbaths here in PA. And behind darQ money that's being funneled to support COVID-denier and critical race theory-fearing candidates is libertarian Paul Martino ,who has pumped hundreds of thousands into races with the one supposed caveat that schools need to allow in-person learning:

Anyone who supported SB 565: You’d think that after decades of horrifying mass shootings and with the huge uptick in gun violence, PA state senators would vote AGAINST something known as a "Constitutional Carry" bill, but alas... no. We’re nominating all of those who voted to pass S.B. 565, which allows people to carry firearms freely and without a license. Introduced by Republican PA Sen. Chris Dush -- the same guy leading the Big Lie charge in PA -- S.B. 565 lets anyone in PA to keep and bear firearms without a permit, including carrying loaded or unloaded guns openly or concealed. It also eliminates restrictions to carry on public streets or private property in Philadelphia.

Feeling sick to your stomach? Us too! Vote for the most horrific of the three today.

VOTE. [https://www.kpef.info/gtm-poll-december]

And please, in the midst of so many attacks on democracy and our personal safety, donate to help us mobilize voters to rid our government of these sorts of traitors and paranoiacs. Help us build a truly progressive PA.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112321 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112321]

Thank you,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

We’re talking about some of the most deeply cruel and deceitful Pennsylvanians who make your skin crawl and invite nightmares about the future of our nation. Today we need your help picking our next winner. Here are our candidates: Jake Corman: While working to roll back policies that protect the public from COVID-19, PA Sen. Corman recently had to cancel his gubernatorial-run announcement party because he ironically had contracted COVID. This man also spearheaded the total-waste-of-time-and-money Senate Intergovernmental Operations Committee to suck PA taxpayers dry by investigating false claims of election fraud. It's more than a little suspicious that a guy thirsting for the highest office in the state is also doing overtime to sow doubt in our elections. With Corman around, something is rotten in the state of PA. Paul Martino : School board elections have turned into cultural bloodbaths here in PA. And behind darQ money that's being funneled to support COVID-denier and critical race theory-fearing candidates is libertarian Paul Martino ,who has pumped hundreds of thousands into races with the one supposed caveat that schools need to allow in-person learning: Anyone who supported SB 565: You’d think that after decades of horrifying mass shootings and with the huge uptick in gun violence, PA state senators would vote AGAINST something known as a "Constitutional Carry" bill, but alas... no. We’re nominating all of those who voted to pass S.B. 565, which allows people to carry firearms freely and without a license. Introduced by Republican PA Sen. Chris Dush -- the same guy leading the Big Lie charge in PA -- S.B. 565 lets anyone in PA to keep and bear firearms without a permit, including carrying loaded or unloaded guns openly or concealed. It also eliminates restrictions to carry on public streets or private property in Philadelphia. Feeling sick to your stomach? Us too! Vote for the most horrific of the three today. VOTE. [] And please, in the midst of so many attacks on democracy and our personal safety, donate to help us mobilize voters to rid our government of these sorts of traitors and paranoiacs. Help us build a truly progressive PA. [] Thank you, Jenna Henry Keystone Progress [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. body:
Before the Thanksgiving festivities begin, I need to tell you something....
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-UkL0p5_4us3eYfUes6s13-bUfcKDbJhUcB8gFibQ7L1ZVJQmaZE7g2Tb_Ogt8cHA-N732Osdlm4gAYPAo7-8Gb0g2bwWwX6gtcRC_acUU5RDyRF8-OCIRM1GIWoyMrGxejtCK5iAYcn902r8fCIEZ-XlUvyhRn5-x7pwSskTnl9wyRBOAS5Pqq_PaD1K7Ja&c=Aw4T3ryhy6vLp-5-yFWCz8qPorpk2I78FC5jke598kwzXaeLgoqeGg==&ch=s8DlZzdIV1K-wC1v5OM2DMzvod5CrCjjQYLaaY1CEXHEnsTn1gJGpw==)

| Friend,
Before the Thanksgiving festivities begin, I need to tell you something....
I know things haven't been easy since President Biden has taken office. You have probably already noticed this year's Thanksgiving is far more expensive than it was under President Trump. Thanks to socialist spending bills, increased taxes, and a supply-chain crisis, prices on everyday goods have skyrocketed.
Biden's radical, Far-Left agenda has made the holidays a nightmare instead of the joyous celebrations we remember.
---
| | | [END BIDEN'S SOCIALISM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-UkL0p5_4us3eYfUes6s13-bUfcKDbJhUcB8gFibQ7L1ZVJQmaZE7g2Tb_Ogt8cHA-N732Osdlm4gAYPAo7-8Gb0g2bwWwX6gtcRC_acUU5RDyRF8-OCIRM1GIWoyMrGxejtCK5iAYcn902r8fCIEZ-XlUvyhRn5-x7pwSskTnl9wyRBOAS5Pqq_PaD1K7Ja&c=Aw4T3ryhy6vLp-5-yFWCz8qPorpk2I78FC5jke598kwzXaeLgoqeGg==&ch=s8DlZzdIV1K-wC1v5OM2DMzvod5CrCjjQYLaaY1CEXHEnsTn1gJGpw==)

| The Swamp Socialists don't care about the current economic crisis because it doesn't affect them. After all, if they run out of cash, they'll just stick their hands into your pockets to pay for more of their schemes.
The American people are not personal ATMs for Washington suits. We will stand up and fight this economic insanity.
Momentum is on our side for the Red Wave in 2022, but we need to keep the fight strong to take back the House. I fully understand that money is tight right now, but Kat is here to fight for you and your wallet on the steps of Capitol Hill.
[Can Kat count on you in her fight against left-wing socialism?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-UkL0p5_4us3eYfUes6s13-bUfcKDbJhUcB8gFibQ7L1ZVJQmaZE7g2Tb_Ogt8cHA-N732Osdlm4gAYPAo7-8Gb0g2bwWwX6gtcRC_acUU5RDyRF8-OCIRM1GIWoyMrGxejtCK5iAYcn902r8fCIEZ-XlUvyhRn5-x7pwSskTnl9wyRBOAS5Pqq_PaD1K7Ja&c=Aw4T3ryhy6vLp-5-yFWCz8qPorpk2I78FC5jke598kwzXaeLgoqeGg==&ch=s8DlZzdIV1K-wC1v5OM2DMzvod5CrCjjQYLaaY1CEXHEnsTn1gJGpw==)

After all, if they run out of cash, they'll just stick their hands into your pockets to pay for more of their schemes. The American people are not personal ATMs for Washington suits. We will stand up and fight this economic insanity. Momentum is on our side for the Red Wave in 2022, but we need to keep the fight strong to take back the House. I fully understand that money is tight right now, but Kat is here to fight for you and your wallet on the steps of Capitol Hill. == | | | == | Thanks for your support, Jessica Norfleet Finance Director | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

|

McCarthy's arrogance was on full display during his eight hour speech to delay the vote on the Build Back Better Act. It was a pitiful attempt to curry Trump's approval and get the Speaker's gavel. McCarthy himself admitted his speech wouldn't make a difference on the vote.

**Instead of supporting historic investments in working families here in the Central Valley, McCarthy rambled for eight hours.** Not being able to test drive a Tesla despite being friends with Elon Musk came up in his speech. He's becoming more unhinged by the day, and we're getting a real taste for what a McCarthy speakership would look like if Republicans take back the House. That's why I'm running against him.

Every moment McCarthy spends fighting off our campaign in his backyard is one less minute he has to help the Republicans nationwide. Our job is two-fold: 1.) Hold him accountable right now, and 2.) defeat him at the ballot box in November. The best way we can do that is by making sure we have resources to run a strong door-to-door operation -- that’s where you come in:

**If everyone reading this email chipped in just $5 right now, we'd meet our goal TODAY. I know we can do it, but only if we all step up and do it together.**

**[With the end of November in sight, we need to pick up the pace on our monthly goal. Can you chip in $3 before 11:59 PM tonight to help us close the $8,118 gap on our daily goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38938181/317693706/-787496292?refcode=em-112321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2ZjY2VlYS05MzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W4uu7Y_tJN485sqIiBLqJYznQNwhdcan4KDzcM7SeJ8=)**

Thank you friend, your support means the world to me.

Marisa
Teacher for Congress

name: Eddie Geller
subject: You get a thank you, and *you* get a thank you, and YOU get a thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey friends — Just wanted to send you this quick note before the Thanksgiving holiday, because 1) I don’t want to bother you while you’re spending time with your friends, family, pets, whoever and whatever you choose to spend Thursday with; and 2) I have a _lot_ of gratitude to hand out. Thank you for laughing at my bits (one of my secret powers is knowing when people laugh at my jokes even through a screen...don’t ask). Thank you for reading our emails. Thank you for donating — [**every dollar you’ve given**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38938225/317693972/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_EG_main_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzE0ZjM0ZC05NDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8XzBtAo4PmFOkFG61CtRhTlXpUmRzIDkyP2HNt95MzQ=) has made a difference, and I really mean that! Thank you for spreading the word about our campaign with your friends. **Most of all, thank you for being on this wild ride to change our politics for the better and deliver real leadership back to Florida’s 15th District.** We’ve still got 11-ish months to go in this marathon, but I’m so proud to have you on our team. I’ve said it before, but this campaign isn’t about me — it’s about you. I’m running to be a voice for everyone that Scott Franklin has ignored since he was elected (which, frankly, is everyone who’s not a corporation, lobbyist, or the former President), which means that we’re only going to win if we all come together. So far, we’ve done that, and I’m so appreciative of your support. Enjoy the turkey (or, if you’re like me, tofurkey), Eddie | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38938226/317693973/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_EG_main_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzE0ZjM0ZC05NDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8XzBtAo4PmFOkFG61CtRhTlXpUmRzIDkyP2HNt95MzQ=)

clean_body: | Hey friends — Just wanted to send you this quick note before the Thanksgiving holiday, because 1) I don’t want to bother you while you’re spending time with your friends, family, pets, whoever and whatever you choose to spend Thursday with; and 2) I have a lot of gratitude to hand out. Thank you for laughing at my bits (one of my secret powers is knowing when people laugh at my jokes even through a screen...don’t ask). Thank you for reading our emails. Thank you for donating — = has made a difference, and I really mean that! Thank you for spreading the word about our campaign with your friends. Most of all, thank you for being on this wild ride to change our politics for the better and deliver real leadership back to Florida’s 15th District. We’ve still got 11-ish months to go in this marathon, but I’m so proud to have you on our team. I’ve said it before, but this campaign isn’t about me — it’s about you. I’m running to be a voice for everyone that Scott Franklin has ignored since he was elected (which, frankly, is everyone who’s not a corporation, lobbyist, or the former President), which means that we’re only going to win if we all come together. So far, we’ve done that, and I’m so appreciative of your support. Enjoy the turkey (or, if you’re like me, tofurkey), Eddie | = | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Karl Rove

Attn: House GOP Conservatives

With control over both houses of Congress, Democrats are figuring out ways to exercise their power by pushing through bills that harm Americans and satisfy their Radical Left base.

In the House of Representatives however, the Democrats hold a very narrow lead, **as Republicans are only 5 seats away from retaking a Conservative Majority.** This has led the Radical Left to begin aggressively campaigning NOW to keep their majority.

**We aren 't taking this news lightly.** Democrats will fight hard to prevent us from taking back the House, and the Radical Left keeps pouring money into their campaigns at a shocking rate.
