name: Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: Allow us to (re)introduce ourselves
body:
We’re not like other PACs

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38938502/317695950/1300596418?refcode=211123_ReIntroduction_FR_bte
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjczYTE5LTk3NGMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ww56NHNYOSKBeVW6jbmMkNsYd6LLY2VKAZOldDuAOSw=)
---
Peter **Allow us to (re)introduce ourselves.** We are Barrier To Entry PAC, and we are cleaning up the Democratic Party.

We are spearheading the effort to support progressive candidates from working-class and low-income backgrounds. We’re effective with our money, and we’re intentional with where it is going. We’re supporting exciting campaigns and we’re centered in reality to know which campaigns we can win.

With our supporters' short-term investments, we can create long-term solutions. What we do will pay off.

When we fund small races, like Shenise Turner-Sloss who won her race to become Dayton City Commissioner this November, we help lay the foundation for her to lead.

The science shows us that Democrats may not hold the House or Senate long-term. But if we start to win small races, we can move the needle where it really matters AND create the next generation of elected leaders to continue to go on and win bigger races. We need a bench.

Down the road, who will be there to lead? That’s a question we hope to answer.

We aren’t like other PACs. We are a grassroots organization and run almost entirely off volunteer efforts. We keep costs low so your money is getting into the hands of people who are doing the hard work on the ground. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38938503/317695951/1300596418?refcode=211123_ReIntroduction_FR_bte
_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjczYTE5LTk3NGMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ww56NHNYOSKBeVW6jbmMkNsYd6LLY2VKAZOldDuAOSw=) **And let’s be clear, there is no one else doing the same thing as us. We are the only PAC focused exclusively on helping low-income progressive candidates run for local office to lift up their communities.**

When we fund candidates, we fund working people who have full-time jobs AND are determined to win an election.

Our candidates don’t sit on large inheritances and six figure wages. They’re not here to satisfy their egos. Our candidates are in this to fight for their communities.

Your money goes directly to providing candidates with the resources they need to win -- direct cash, mentorship and guidance, video production, fundraising training and event tools.

Our candidates are really working two jobs, so our full-time job is being there for them.

Our next focus is getting Jessica Mason (TX-30) elected to Congress, and we have great news. The incumbent announced her retirement, paving the way for Jessica to become the front-runner. This is the momentum we need going into the new year. **[If you’re new, we hope you are as excited to be a part of making history. And if you’ve been here since day one, thank you for your continued dedication to our cause. It takes all of us to make change and at the end of the day, we should be so proud to be on this side of history. If you could be so generous and donate today, we can continue fighting the good fight. DONATE NOW>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38938504/317695953/-2038882143?refcode=211123_ReIntroduction_FR_bte_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNjczYTE5LTk3NGMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ww56NHNYOSKBeVW6jbmMkNsYd6LLY2VKAZOldDuAOSw=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ********[**$10 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38938505/317695965/1300596418?refcode=211123_ReIntroduction_FR_bte

body:

I want to send him a message from the American people that our freedom to celebrate with our family won't be determined by some Washington bureaucrat! name: Patrick Leahy
subject: We have come so far since last year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
I hope you have a very happy, safe, and healthy Thanksgiving.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/Z6z3sNLYLyC_/N3dFVTRDdTNyV2l5M3RGaXhYODVqL3FDWWRYVDVJMS9GekpVdkE4ZDcwV3c1S3FSL0l6ZFlMRHZmbTJEWUFJZjdUaTErc2VLV1VNUU5heTlwWTBtZnlPT2JXSGFBWkpIeEhreEdFNFhYalE9S0/) Friend, Our nation has come so far since last Thanksgiving. Thanks to the advent of vaccines, many more Americans will be able to more safely visit with their families this Thanksgiving. Marcelle and I are so thankful to have the opportunity to safely celebrate with our children and grandchildren over a thoughtfully prepared meal this year. But even as more Americans become vaccinated and our economy begins to recover from the pandemic, I also know that millions of families continue to feel the effects of the pandemic. My heart breaks for the countless families who lost loved ones to COVID-19. I am also thinking of the most vulnerable among us, many of whom are still out of work and who are relying on the generosity of their neighbors to have food on their table this Thanksgiving. **If you are fortunate enough to have money, goods, or time to spare this Thanksgiving, I 'd encourage you to join Marcelle and me in making a donation to your community's food bank. **[**Click here to find your local food bank and learn how to help them this holiday season.**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/Z6z3sNLYLyC_/N3dFVTRDdTNyV2l5M3RGaXhYODVqL3FDWWRYVDVJMS9GekpVdkE4ZDcwV3c1S3FSL0l6ZFlMRHZmbTJEWUFJZjdUaTErc2VLV1VNUU5heTlwWTBtZnlPT2JXSGFBWkpIeEhreEdFNFhYalE9S0/) As always, from my family to yours, I hope you have a very happy, safe, and healthy Thanksgiving. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator | [FIND A FOOD BANK »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/0L4gFqe3ejJg/N3dFVTRDdTNyV2l5M3RGaXhYODVqL3FDWWRYVDVJMS9GekpVdkE4ZDcwV3c1S3FSL0l6ZFlMRHZmbTJEWUFJZjdUaTErc2VLV1VNUU5heTlwWTBtZnlPT2JXSGFBWkpIeEhreEdFNFhYalE9S0/)

name: Christy Smith
subject: Paid family leave benefits everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38938738/317698751/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA3N2VlZi05NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rcm_zpVReoliUSKIiHYb3SaXSBPu1UYHNEjeeZD6LFE=&emci=48790b8e-7a4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1c077eef-974c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Do you want to hear something that over 70% of Americans agree with? **Working families need paid leave.**

All caregivers should be able to provide love and care when they are needed without having to contend with their work schedule. We know that investing in paid family leave pays dividends -- to the economy, to our children, and to our families.

**It's time for the U.S. to figure out paid leave, like the rest of the world already has.**

**[Peter, we can't wait any longer -- help us push to demand President Biden and Congress to invest in the future of American families. Sign the petition now>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38938741/317698793/-2072206398?ms=em21_211123_paidleave&refcode=em21_211123_paidleave&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA3N2VlZi05NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rcm_zpVReoliUSKIiHYb3SaXSBPu1UYHNEjeeZD6LFE=&emci=48790b8e-7a4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1c077eef-974c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)** [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38938744/317698796/-2072206398?ms=em21_211123_paidleave&refcode=em21_211123_paidleave&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzA3N2VlZi05NzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rcm_zpVReoliUSKIiHYb3SaXSBPu1UYHNEjeeZD6LFE=&emci=48790b8e-7a4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1c077eef-974c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749) **We need to move fast.** Make no mistake: women and children will suffer the most. About half of women report experiencing pain within the first two months following childbirth, and many experience more serious, potentially life-threatening postpartum complications.

I know this all too well: When I was pregnant with my oldest daughter I suffered from seizures so bad that I had to be rushed to the hospital for an emergency Cesarean delivery. I cannot imagine having to return to work just days after I almost lost my life but that is a choice many Americans don't have the luxury to make.

_Families have to be able to take time off to care for themselves or their loved ones without fearing for their jobs._

Women of color are more likely than white women to face difficult choices between their caregiving and work responsibilities, because they are more likely to be the primary breadwinners for their families while being paid lower wages than their white counterparts.

_We need leaders who will reach across the aisle, working with anyone willing to provide desperately needed relief for the millions of Americans struggling right now._

**And supporting paid leave will bring real results to working families right here in CA-25.**

clean_body: | Peter, Do you want to hear something that over 70% of Americans agree with? Working families need paid leave. All caregivers should be able to provide love and care when they are needed without having to contend with their work schedule. We know that investing in paid family leave pays dividends -- to the economy, to our children, and to our families. It's time for the U.S. to figure out paid leave, like the rest of the world already has. We need to move fast. Make no mistake: women and children will suffer the most. About half of women report experiencing pain within the first two months following childbirth, and many experience more serious, potentially life-threatening postpartum complications. I know this all too well: When I was pregnant with my oldest daughter I suffered from seizures so bad that I had to be rushed to the hospital for an emergency Cesarean delivery. I cannot imagine having to return to work just days after I almost lost my life but that is a choice many Americans don't have the luxury to make. Families have to be able to take time off to care for themselves or their loved ones without fearing for their jobs. Women of color are more likely than white women to face difficult choices between their caregiving and work responsibilities, because they are more likely to be the primary breadwinners for their families while being paid lower wages than their white counterparts. We need leaders who will reach across the aisle, working with anyone willing to provide desperately needed relief for the millions of Americans struggling right now. And supporting paid leave will bring real results to working families right here in CA-25. I hope I can continue to count on your support. \-- Christy = *

name: Tom Winter
subject: The powerful work of BIPOC organizers on the ground
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
This Thanksgiving, give back to the BIPOC organizers who are serving everyday Montanans. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrQkz9ScmDx02MoT7pYMdU6kmlvbSmn3BcJifxDmlxmFEeDjjRqQa80YKXlaX8ljvp0ZVUWnDaahAoYMhME1mx_hrXLQF08y1eZgLuUU1mi7Q9PtrpebsGjhHM3B6w6jc2RiW2Z9C7AEpH9I7HeMecEpI5PinUp6jAvSefbnu1C6vwLM4lYjN6k_31R2uzhNpu9xruwhrdZUsmN8EM3_cU_usQR0mT8LiaOaXYXmLUNYfiEAPR6w7YtJci2avTqP6eia3ALLhtb3BjqoMuvwKAzsjCg11sdQnnjKtMGqCnxMb/3h9/slZiuULSTvq0oYsleu0sTw/h0/j3BslHnJzbsaIk6kDSMbBBFq18-lVBKSGdX9T0CLlS0) Friend,

One lesson Montana has taught me is that you don’t have to be in Congress to be there for your neighbors when their lives get precarious.

When Montana faced a shortage of personal protective equipment (PPE) at the start of the pandemic last year, I had the opportunity to work alongside Montana mutual aid groups to support the effort to keep us safe. I turned full-time to looking out for our neighbors. We organized 2,800 masks and face shields for people with respiratory illness and donated the PPE to tribal and rural healthcare clinics

As many of us turn to family and celebrate the good in each other this week, I want to encourage you to remember the Montanans who could use a little extra support right now. _[Missoula Food Share Project](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/nIATlT34azO8Uq6tATWtxFJYwyTr8bXZtTnWCXCF9fq-YE7vFmCeR9qy4paoF29s0jLj1yT18-IitlOyCDIkrEqbBzaS9acXDyBlv8f8D-eu8GfB1TXnIF34SgOHQw3CF4GQ_TFEi-Ss4e5aUOi4dfMJhOy_qK0Zi0qPsP07HLiZC6mi5qn4e7Eccham9FwTbeNQj6pBP4J5dBlQpeQWUb_k3h0cOGxyaPsCFamR1zzfkyCVZGA2TGwStz9a5CP9zjDMccUsMRBm_mTWnhxLno_FhAVH1U059FgALmWjhEOqfTds2TLRyQBN5KwUF8f8WA7vyCucAYje-G-wj2zQRQ/3h9/slZiuULSTvq0oYsleu0sTw/h1/5lwCszHD1ocSmVR1YQsL3ZUG1njgvpmXNdNZdKaRlsA)_ is a project of the Montana Black, Indigenous, and People of Color Mutual Aid Fund (MT BIPOC Mutual Aid Fund), a group that organizes resources to make sure that not one more struggling Montanan falls through the cracks. Will you join me in supporting them today?

_**[Contribute $3 or more to Missoula Food Share Project today to feed hungry Montanans and serve one another with dignity, honor, and loyalty.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrQkz9ScmDx02MoT7pYMdU6kmlvbSmn3BcJifxDmlxmFEZEciVtRTBynTJDURn4-4UZMhcggGtTM8xR53BLuRGkCtCPtoFAW4wXrTcqOHJBpC1ES2MkV6EgIkXBOHWptMqVSGeX66QMrla2zVFYwNwYBCfso0iAPgTzTj_Pwvhdv6E4s2VgqbKijpqFs9nx-GxZYpWSBHoET2E20YehswjSa6ghb6L1u3VKjTjEoJAtyPodF3X7xBwI0Eq-GwzrMnFAOGq8uEOwKYzpZ1RNMkWSCS-IR9MQC5IV-hR4Hv0TG1/3h9/slZiuULSTvq0oYsleu0sTw/h2/WOoecM_4kqnSSfSntIg9XtcNCdBw2MCxSGSualgJldU)**_

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrQkz9ScmDx02MoT7pYMdU6kmlvbSmn3BcJifxDmlxmFEUO5h4niGAiPA5Hh_VBMkYVL1CUzIvdQ_QWYwD9DlKfbUiwzpv-9dFiWBQWfpdoNv_kl2rqhuOxGaQhX5WrOZkcWhwcd4l6kMQ0kXUx7xxvy4-DQoMO2J56kS-Hz9ypAGUISYkJLbRe6nKeopjZ4EWH_vtEl71uBCHpao2lJG3BRC7seelViWQaMvrxpkfViCXYNtSl6jSAT3AdWH4yVHFf84WEsp7Bbm8-krVki1vHzIPeVNxnpWDnEWDmhZdHyf/3h9/slZiuULSTvq0oYsleu0sTw/h3/y7GYFqJ2KU6nKmTzGyxg9hGWKqVg0M_Y6yBH0-JAPRQ)

What’s so great about MT BIPOC Mutual Aid Fund and other mutual aid groups is that we fight for one another to bring back a Montana that’s rooted in respect — not greed and exploitation. That’s why I want to make sure that they have enough resources to continue serving our community.

The mutual aid movement is so powerful precisely because we continue the legacy of the true Montana spirit of always helping out a neighbor in need. We know that billionaires won’t pay to keep us safe and healthy. That’s why we must be there for one another: because we know what we need and how to build a Montana that works for all of us — not just those who were born into wealth.

As we come together for the holidays to be thankful for our friends, families, and neighbors, I want to shine a spotlight on our hometown heroes, remember the true Montana spirit, and give back to a group that’s been working day in and day out to feed hungry Montanans and serve one another with dignity. Will you give $3 to Missoula Food Share Project so they can continue to serve those in our state who need it most?

_[**Contribute $3 or more to Missoula Food Share Project today to feed hungry Montanans and serve one another with dignity.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrQkz9ScmDx02MoT7pYMdU6kmlvbSmn3BcJifxDmlxmFERboywEyoIDgXXnHdwdYAoC1xiXyA_AIlWrAuwYz4wNvr-yX_6KQ_2tKPLRcDY0vpgVHsJLosqyNX6mOQ3KLHkvSRR3VX3Dk-T5iRIW8aAmfd1KQYMU4qqwh5gjfEVrxUI2q7gKT_kQignCh15tug_D1R_iW-v1Cx0x4EBDxM94aOxxZm-7-wuCq66lTKFoxnLdPUdVgOdKzhp48wbIpd6MZOuG7eZCPegNlrxTdhPvw6-zeILcyaJ_QO7aphdp_O/3h9/slZiuULSTvq0oYsleu0sTw/h4/_EfI7H0kmwDoWAhXZ-XaCyydE5Tdd1YGmo1UfdEB_Pg)_

Thankful for you this week,

Tom | [CONTRIBUTE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrQkz9ScmDx02MoT7pYMdU6kmlvbSmn3BcJifxDmlxmFE3DaL6pKpiTHl-3LBJshxwKyV1gpFtddCvMbuK3JKBxcgdeDCWYv6Kz8skQO2uLKnbPJFTNl2fa9s8hPPCye9IshCivaANP8GEjSRnf-NguvtM0RAKZ5REvHAajFkKmtKpXEjG375kznB-TPIQa7H2tmCVAggnPW4hCq4J-Iw6Hd-IIMkt4WmgMPyoVvt5kxGdUL-3nNiLV3kVjgROOID5UXWyfP6FeaCZ2YoJoZs2M51Z0VAscy1R4paZ_cRLeCw/3h9/slZiuULSTvq0oYsleu0sTw/h5/_axD0huEXZPoWpg04bkiq7yQ59ixgkwxEUMWRa5PPq4)

clean_body: Dear Peter, The tragedy in Waukesha is heartbreaking. It is also a wake-up call. Radicals have turned our cities and towns into crime-ridden cesspools. They have emboldened criminals who never should have been on the streets to begin with, and they have ripped our law enforcement system to shreds. We can do better. We must do better. Watch my video below. Best, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We are opposing an all-out effort by the Left to corrupt our elections!
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

The integrity of American elections continues under sustained assault by the Left - inside and outside the federal government:
* The **Biden Justice Department** is suing **Georgia** and **Texas** because those states enacted voting law reforms **that make it harder to cheat and steal elections.**

* **_Leftists and socialists in Congress_** are trying to pass legislation increasing federal control over our elections by expanding "emergency measures" enacted during the Covid pandemic such as **radically expanded mail-in voting, ballot harvesting, same-day voter registration, and the removal of voter ID requirements.**

* _And dozens of**radical Soros-funded groups**_ are opposing our legal efforts to force states to clean their voter lists as federal law requires - **_our most important defense against voter fraud_.**

**Yet, we have reason to cheer. Judicial Watch investigators and lawyers are successfully working to protect our constitutional republic by helping make certain that only eligible American citizens are permitted to vote.**
We are standing tall in federal and state courtrooms across America _against_ the Left and _for_ honest elections...and I must tell you that at times it feels like we are alone in this fight. _[That's why I am urgently asking for you to join Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57190&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_.
Through our investigations and lawsuits, our highly experienced election law attorneys have stopped a leftist scheme for discriminatory elections in **Hawaii** , defended **South Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** voter ID laws in court and cleaned up "dirty" voter rolls in **California** , **Ohio** , **Indiana** and **Kentucky**.
One federal lawsuit led to a legal settlement in which **Los Angeles County** _agreed to purge**1.6 million ineligible voters** from its registration rolls...and required all counties in **California** to follow suit. This process is well under way as you read my letter_.
This is a huge success because "_dirty " voter registration rolls are a recipe for voter fraud_.
Now we are in federal court battling **Colorado,****North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** over their failures to maintain accurate voter rolls...and we are preparing even MORE lawsuits where our latest research is finding that election officials (**Democrats and Republicans**) are failing to take the steps necessary to keep their voter registration rolls accurate.
**[That's why I hope you will help us with atax-deductible membership gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57190&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)****.**
It is very easy to _complain_ about how **Joe Biden, the liberal Congress and the Soros network** are trying to steal elections by opening our borders, allowing non-citizens to vote and stopping legislatures from acting to protect honest elections in their states.
But at **Judicial Watch** , _we don 't just complain_... _we act_.
Our record of success speaks for itself. _But very real costs come with our election law lawsuits and investigations_ , especially in opposition to the taxpayer-funded deep pockets of state and federal government agencies and the whole array of Soros-funded groups.
[Your tax-deductible membership gift today will mean](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57190&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) a great deal to us as we pursue our election law investigations and lawsuits, prepare for additional litigation _and carry forward all of our work dedicated to upholding_ _the rule of law in our nation_.
**Judicial Watch** is breaking new ground fighting to keep our elections honest.
But none of what we've accomplished would be possible without the financial support we receive from patriotic Americans like you across the country. Please join with us!
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57190&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: 30,000 Democrat votes found in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter -- Establishment Republicans in Georgia just loaded my
district with 30,000+ Democrat votes.

President Trump "lost" Georgia by less than
12,000 votes!

This is nothing more than a RINO scheme to
redistrict and kick me out of Congress.

HELP MTG FIGHT BACK - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT
AWAY

These are the same weak-kneed "Republicans"
who refuse to stand with President Trump and audit Georgia's 2020
elections.

So now, not only am I facing some of the most
well-funded Democrats in the country. . .

. . .now I have to get through a tough
Primary against a Liz Cheney/Adam Kinzinger type "Republican" who
will have MILLIONS of dollars behind her. . .

George Soros. Hollywood celebs, the Chamber
of Commerce, Never Trump orgs like the Lincoln Project,
dark-money super PACs. . .the list goes on.

All of them will spend TENS OF MILLIONS of
dollars in negative attack ads, smear campaigns and dirty tricks
to defeat me in 2022.

HELP MTG FIGHT BACK - CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT
AWAY

But I'm not backing down. In fact, I'm going
on offense.

You see, my goal for my re-election isn't
just to win. . .

My goal is to beat the Democrats and the
Never Trumpers so badly, that they will never show their face in
my district -- or Georgia -- again.

That's why I've set my End-of-Month
fundraising goal at $50,000.

I know it's a lot. But I'm facing some of the
most well-funded Democrats and Never Trump Republicans in 2022.

I must have the resources to fight back. Can
I count on you to chip in $17.76 right now before my November
30th Deadline?

Since the day I was elected, Democrats have
painted a big red target on my back . . .

They tried to expel me not once, not twice,
not three times -- BUT FOUR TIMES!

We've beaten them before. But now the
Democrats AND the Establishment R's are using every dirty trick
in their playbook to take me out.

So I need the support of Patriots like you to
step up and chip in $5, $10, $25 to America First Republicans
like myself.

Please, Peter, chip in whatever you can
afford right away. You and I must DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene for Congress

name: Rep. Taffy Howard
subject: Vaccine Mandate Warning
body:
Surprise, surprise... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8162%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Mohr4zhJdPu53yxc6MRdZQ&sysid=1)

Dear Fellow South Dakotans, Surprise, surprise... Joe Biden is demanding that you obey his mandatory vaccine edict even though it has already been struck down by the Courts. I’m Representative Taffy Howard, and I’m running for Congress to fight back against President Biden’s radical agenda for America. In fact, I am sponsoring legislation to block Biden’s vaccine mandate in my state, and I’m working to stop him nationwide! That’s why I need to show the political establishment that America opposes Biden’s “get vaxxed or you’re fired” agenda. _If you’re like me, you’re ready to start firing politicians who support mandatory vaccines_. What you put in your body is a personal choice, and one that every person has the RIGHT to make for themselves without fear of government crackdowns or losing your job! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u64lsHDPpLyudL%2fbmLPYjw&sysid=1) _I currently serve as a State Representative in South Dakota, and I’m running for Congress to fight for freedom in D.C._ _As an Air Force Veteran, I served our country to protect freedom_. It’s why I joined the military, and why I currently serve as a State Legislator in South Dakota. We need to stand up against the leftists who are trying to ram government mandates down our throats! When I earned my Airborne wings at Fort Benning, I was privileged to work alongside warriors who care about America, and who stand up to those who want to hurt her. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u64lsHDPpLyudL%2fbmLPYjw&sysid=1) _I served in the Air Force and was privileged to work alongside warriors who defend America._ My son now serves as a Naval officer for the same reason. _And defending freedom is why I decided to run for Congress_. That's why I’m sending you this email today. I believe you are a freedom-loving American who will stand up to Biden and his anti-American cronies. **[So I'm hoping you will join millions of other Americans in signing your Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18178%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3PxpY9CsIi9Oj%2bmluDrBVg&sysid=1)!** I want to prove to Congress, to the courts, to the media, and to the American people that we DO NOT support forcing you to put things in your body you do not agree with. This strikes at the very core of our rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness! It’s not about whether or not you want the vaccine. Members of my immediate family go both ways, and I fully support EVERY person’s right to choose the vaccine, or to choose not to get it. Unfortunately, the current occupant of the White House doesn’t agree. It’s downright un-American. Fellow South Dakotans, President Biden is demanding that Americans simply bow to his Constitution-busting vaccine mandate, even though a court put a stay on it! Unfortunately, this fight is just getting started. It could take months for Biden’s vaccine mandate to finally make its way to the U.S Supreme Court, and even when it gets there, victory is not guaranteed. _After all, it was a Republican-controlled Supreme Court, led by Chief Justice John Roberts, who wrongfully ruled that Obamacare is constitutional when we all knew it wasn't_. And even if the Supreme Court does strike down the mandate, Biden is signalling he’s going to try to enforce it anyway! Biden’s “get vaxxed or you’re fired” mandate is a huge risk to our nation’s economy, our military, and to the freedom we enjoy as Americans. You and I cannot afford to take this fight sitting down and hope for the best. That’s why I hope you’ll sign your **[Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18179%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9hR8P5axfbPVeaMRG2xIBA&sysid=1)** right away! Never before in our nation’s history have we seen so many blatant abuses of government power as we have witnessed in the last year. “ _Never let a serious crisis go to waste” is the mantra of the Democratic Party dating back to Obama_. Fast forward to last spring when they once again, without any sense of irony, demanded that everyone use the coronavirus crisis to expand the role of the federal government in our lives. Handing out trillions of dollars in Covid “stimulus” cash to politically-connected entities... Paying millions of workers not to work... Forcing draconian mask mandates on airplanes, buses and trains... Punishing the brave men and women in our Armed Forces who refuse to kowtow to Biden’s vaccine madness... And now, forcing American businesses to fire workers for not getting vaxxed, or face hundreds of thousands of dollars in fines for failing to comply with Biden’s edict. Unless we stand up now, this is going to result in millions of people losing their jobs. _All these policies are destroying our economy, weakening our military and shredding our Constitution_. **[So please take action NOW with your Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18170%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mDZCx0qsly5flwienaFc5w&sysid=1)!** Of course, President Biden and his lackeys spent the summer telling us that they were never going to mandate vaccination, even proclaiming that they didn’t think it was a legitimate power of the federal government! But the radical fringe of the Democratic Party, many of whom are avowed Marxists, believe that the ends always justify the means and believe government force is always legitimate if it is for the “common good.” And so, as the Democrats have given more comfort to these radicals, the Biden administration has lurched even further to the left. _That’s why we need real fighters in Washington, D.C_. I’m running for Congress because I have an established track record of standing up for freedom. In South Dakota, we successfully fought off every call for shut-downs and mask mandates. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u64lsHDPpLyudL%2fbmLPYjw&sysid=1) _With my husband, Mark, and sons and their wives._ _And over the five years I’ve served in office, I have consistently stood for smaller government and less spending_. We NEED more of this in Washington, D.C. And thanks to millions of freedom-loving Americans like you fighting back, the Biden Administration is getting desperate. With his agenda bogged down in Congress, the Supreme Court handing him defeat after defeat, Virginia electing a Republican Governor and New Jersey (of all places!) nearly booting a Democrat Governor, he’s going to start lashing out to get a political “win” at any cost. _The best way to fight back against Biden’s overreach is for all of us to tell him and the rest of the swamp creatures to go pound sand_. **[So join us today in this fight by signing your Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18171%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bprEFx37jIMO1C6HB%2fOdDQ&sysid=1)!** We’ve had enough Democrats! And frankly, we’ve had enough “Republicans” in Congress who do nothing to fight back unless it’s “safe” for their careers. Our Founder Fathers blessed us with the greatest nation on earth, and NOW is the time to stand and fight to save it! _Failing to fight against Biden’s vaccine mandate only leaves the door WIDE open for future infringements on our rights_. It’s crazy to think that we are having to push back against the federal government forcing a medical procedure on individual American citizens. But here we are in Biden’s America... There is good news, though. _President Biden’s presidency is proving to be an absolute nightmare for the Democrats, especially in the wake of the Virginia elections_. Americans are waking up to the disaster in Washington, D.C. and a Republican wave is forming that could dwarf the 2010 Tea Party wave. But even if Republicans do sweep into power across the nation, Joe Biden will still be President and he’ll be even more emboldened to try to rule by executive fiat, which is why we must fight back now against his unconstitutional mandates! Please sign your **[Pledge to Oppose Biden’s Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18172%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aERAkiQCPKQVU5U2dn6PMA&sysid=1)** right away! We must prove that there is nationwide opposition to Biden’s decrees, so adding your signature is crucial! I’m sick of two-faced politicians who talk a good game when running for election, but do nothing once they are in office. And I know you are too. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18177%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u64lsHDPpLyudL%2fbmLPYjw&sysid=1) _At Airborne school in Fort Benning where I earned my jump wings._ I have a proven record in the South Dakota Legislature of walking the walk, fighting against government overreach and restoring our most fundamental rights. After serving our country in the U.S. Air Force, I knew I couldn’t just sit on the bench and hope for the best. So if you agree that Biden’s vaccine mandate MUST be stopped by the states, please sign your **[Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18179%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9hR8P5axfbPVeaMRG2xIBA&sysid=1)** today. After you’ve signed, I hope you’ll consider making your most generous contribution to my campaign for Congress. I don’t have the support of the corporate lobbyists and PAC’s, but what I do have is patriots like you. _Time and again, we’ve seen grassroots Americans change the course of our nation’s trajectory, despite the millions being spent by the political establishment_. We don’t have to match them dollar for dollar. What we lack in fat checks from the elites, we make up for in passion and numbers. Why else would the lamestream media attack me just last week for speaking at a Medical Freedom Rally, or for calling for a special session to end the mandates? It’s because they are scared of you and they are scared of me. **[So please consider making a generous contribution of $300 to help me bring our pro-freedom message to Washington, D.C](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18173%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kll2AFmypF3%2bGiqio%2fL0DQ&sysid=1).** I know that is a large ask, but that’s how important our fight is. But with rampant inflation caused by Biden’s reckless policies, I know that we all can’t afford today what we could just last year. So if $300 is just too much to ask, will you consider giving at least $100? _Every dollar goes to fight against Joe Biden’s radical agenda for America_. If that’s still too much, I completely understand. Perhaps $75 or $50 is closer to what you can do? Even a donation of $30 or even $15 would help! **[Whatever you can do, please be sure to sign your Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18174%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b61TX%2fJ%2fzl1npxgPMHNv1Q&sysid=1).** Thanks in advance for your support and activism. For Freedom, Taffy Howard
Candidate for U.S. Congress, South Dakota P.S. Biden’s “get vaxxed or you’re fired” mandate is a HUGE risk to our nation’s economy, our military and to the freedom we enjoy as Americans. That’s why I am sponsoring legislation in my state to block Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate, and why I’m fighting it nationwide in my race for Congress. We need to demonstrate that America opposes Biden’s vaccine mandate, and you can help by signing your **[Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18179%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9hR8P5axfbPVeaMRG2xIBA&sysid=1)** today! Along with your signed pledge, would you consider making a generous contribution of $300 or $100 to my campaign for Congress to help me bring our fight to the Swamp? I know that’s a big ask, but that’s how important this fight is. We need a Congress that will stand up to the radical left, not play footsie with them under the table while Biden destroys our country! If $300 or $100 is too much, especially given the inflation and economic upheaval Biden is causing, perhaps $75 or $50 is more doable. Even a donation of $30 or $15 can make a big difference. **[Whatever you can do, please take action right away with your Pledge to Oppose the Biden Vax Mandate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18185%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPGrUY6ETJnWk%2bxgnDKOjg&sysid=1).**

* * *

**Taffy Howard for Congress**
P.O. Box 1682 | Rapid City, SD 57709
www.taffyhowardforcongress.com | (605) 655-3287
> TAFFY HOWARD IS A VETERAN OF THE UNITED STATES AIR FORCE. USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, OR PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY THE ENDORSEMENT OF THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE U.S. AIR FORCE.

Joe Biden is demanding that you obey his mandatory vaccine edict even though it has already been struck down by the Courts. I’m Representative Taffy Howard, and I’m running for Congress to fight back against President Biden’s radical agenda for America. In fact, I am sponsoring legislation to block Biden’s vaccine mandate in my state, and I’m working to stop him nationwide! That’s why I need to show the political establishment that America opposes Biden’s “get vaxxed or you’re fired” agenda. If you’re like me, you’re ready to start firing politicians who support mandatory vaccines. What you put in your body is a personal choice, and one that every person has the RIGHT to make for themselves without fear of government crackdowns or losing your job! I currently serve as a State Representative in South Dakota, and I’m running for Congress to fight for freedom in D.C. As an Air Force Veteran, I served our country to protect freedom. It’s why I joined the military, and why I currently serve as a State Legislator in South Dakota. We need to stand up against the leftists who are trying to ram government mandates down our throats! When I earned my Airborne wings at Fort Benning, I was privileged to work alongside warriors who care about America, and who stand up to those who want to hurt her. I served in the Air Force and was privileged to work alongside warriors who defend America. My son now serves as a Naval officer for the same reason. And defending freedom is why I decided to run for Congress. That's why I’m sending you this email today. I believe you are a freedom-loving American who will stand up to Biden and his anti-American cronies. ! I want to prove to Congress, to the courts, to the media, and to the American people that we DO NOT support forcing you to put things in your body you do not agree with. Unfortunately, the current occupant of the White House doesn’t agree. It’s downright un-American. Folks, it’s Senator Martin Heinrich from New Mexico. **[I’m hoping you’ll split a donation between my friend Michael Bennet and my campaign ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38939321/317702830/634573377?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211123_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDljOWUxNi05YjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0C4-1ybnKVGXgj8O7n9-fPtirY-muBUfDyCaY10EhSE=)** But first, I owe you an explanation on why your contribution is so important. This month, President Biden signed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ into law — a once-in-a-generation infrastructure bill. Michael and I fought every day to make sure it invested deeply in helping out folks across Colorado and New Mexico and in preserving our planet for future generations. All that hard work will lead to repairs to our bridges and roads; increased high-speed internet access; an expansion of our electric vehicle charging network; and access to safe, clean drinking water — especially for our Tribal communities. Next up is the _Build Back Better Act_ — our best shot to make meaningful investments in addressing climate change. We’re both fighting day in and day out to get it through the Senate. None of this would be possible without grassroots supporters like you. You’re the reason Democrats flipped the Senate last year and we’ve been able to get so much done for our communities. Michael is ready to build on this great work — **but he’s facing well-funded attacks from his GOP opponents and National Republicans, who’ve made him a top target.** We can’t afford to lose Michael’s seat and — along with it — the Senate majority. **That’s why I’m reaching out ahead of our end-of-month deadlines. clean_body: | = Folks, it’s Senator Martin Heinrich from New Mexico. = But first, I owe you an explanation on why your contribution is so important. This month, President Biden signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law — a once-in-a-generation infrastructure bill. Michael and I fought every day to make sure it invested deeply in helping out folks across Colorado and New Mexico and in preserving our planet for future generations. All that hard work will lead to repairs to our bridges and roads; increased high-speed internet access; an expansion of our electric vehicle charging network; and access to safe, clean drinking water — especially for our Tribal communities. Next up is the Build Back Better Act — our best shot to make meaningful investments in addressing climate change. We’re both fighting day in and day out to get it through the Senate. None of this would be possible without grassroots supporters like you. You’re the reason Democrats flipped the Senate last year and we’ve been able to get so much done for our communities. Michael is ready to build on this great work — but he’s facing well-funded attacks from his GOP opponents and National Republicans, who’ve made him a top target. We can’t afford to lose Michael’s seat and — along with it — the Senate majority. That’s why I’m reaching out ahead of our end-of-month deadlines. Will you split a donation of any amount between us to hold Michael’s seat, defend our Senate majority, and power our work? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Michael Bennet and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support. — Martin Senator Martin Heinrich New Mexico Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Peter,

You probably don’t keep tabs on the amount of money that Nancy Pelosi and the national Democrats raise each quarter, but I do, and **that’s why I’m writing to you today to sound the alarm.**

Even though the Biden/Pelosi machine is an absolute failure that

House Democrats are **STILL** outraising House Republicans. Their cash-on-hand advantage gives them the only chance they have of maintaining control of Congress and continuing to force their liberal agenda on the American people.

**Democrats' $1.5 million fundraising advantage can make the difference between Republican victories like we saw this year in Virginia and New Jersey, or two more years of an unfettered Speaker Pelosi.**

We must work together to overcome this gap, or else face losing very winnable races next year.

I know that we ask for conservatives like you to make a donation often, but the truth is**[we wouldn’t need to ask if we were able to keep pace with what Democrats are raising](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=22b24fc5b775431b874ed866dda4e063&_e=4pcRbia7WY4h8Yq2JtvC0EKdg4x2VSrybgoMnsF5ONCbGONiunCMQMW_xf-UsQD8laRTj8RlqJNfh-tq-n6T02lYrePR1xgD4zyX6CgEqCx246Y5g2EExl9eHtJIZ9nxXxPo5n5M_Ii-taXyhsTtfQ6VJ7t4Jtj0ypAsfQb2w-_3ActnE1O7hZIfLqpRkV07NmQlNA1CPyl7ECQIS73IZ40KR6Ztb3uVYlu6TSUmprKLeHN1gUg0ERy0fSIal9WXVM6KE-An1zQ5UrAnbmxXKqku3YIl6tYZSNpJtiETTaQvRObn3KKaMbH0fXBPK6tTpTOVlO2GNXF9PEVsw-ZsuiPRA6jUBWxgNm-tMp4MUDY%3D)**.

body:
#

Friends —
Think there’s a chance we can convince you to make a contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before Thanksgiving?
What if we told you we were well short of our fundraising goals for the month, and because this campaign is on-going, missing our mark even once puts this seat at risk?
What if we told you one of our opponents said he’d spend up to $50 million of his own money to beat us and another already has a $10 million super PAC behind them?
We know $3 may not sound like a make-or-break amount of money, but when we’re all chipping in, it adds up. Fast.
So, please. If there’s any chance you’d be willing to add a contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election, before Thanksgiving is a great time for it.

Friend,

I warned you.

Just when you think Joe Biden and his Administration couldn't get any worse, **they continue to PRIORITIZE our enemies aboard instead of the American People. Our economy is suffering. We are suffering.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This means the Democrats will double down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our race in GA has been declared a “toss-up.” This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate! |
---
**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d6f2806e1587471cb5dc9d01eac20e12&_e=YJA8ZJT_KujUpPzrfzJhLq9Cvti0Wo4Diuo4zOBtxyKkqPxJWUQaOOCQkLQKcZuA5w94ICqNcJGLW-zwqdUQdASEiSnLgY2PvWRwO_aA_au2M7RhiczL_ues-RM0BrwdqABIYNiZkmpwZ4gcIuSFqjtd_U-1PgUtJOWZVNibq3WRWP0Ztup6Hs64bMj8IsnVoomUd1dfjX_3g2uIti-u_WipJJX9OmD4Q3FM9sfPnwnAqsi9kCF5XnAxeUOK30nrOkdVFODPWLYkZsFAO41rI4ouC3xQ0mgr4aoEFkKYp2Zl1PlG0M44oB92b5v8EwsoZ0QD4d_o7V7RaF-IVSW239569MkNbR9QzulbkU09r4dFV8TZCR_AXp5qaYu1IWkT06UpYji6jcKUdIFmjr-4nRHIrgTEQzmtUFcfKw2H9nELgdZq-RJsLF1Drmc-7ko3wf6Ix6Lcd7z84Ziv6TFCOeGElNzOjuY3oPH6pYHL9qY%3D)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. clean_body: Our race in GA has been declared a “toss-up.” This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate! | ☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜ Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up Peter, BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in. Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic." If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message. In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters. Take a look for yourself: I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up. While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column. Therefore, we must increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game. While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: The youngest Black Woman to run for congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
My 5 year old nephew thinks it is totally normal for Young Black Women to run for office | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s_3DH2kAFm9wsjT5ubDGRQqFueMhNY9Nqs7dbfXdjawy920RnpEqemSAGHFdVMfs2tLjVdRRSTtd6S8BDTBqHcWb7EeNl7XZ0hkXKg48OBGEcDgRq9pJHgfelzyBHRTvRznLCftMsVRotx5U8FZ0IksxBErJBxqS8npRB-9W0JfBkqDtzIF4assqYd88qO8TzYzOuxN31SnMGcgsAzry2-JZc3aBrWnLCI2fcDqzMssFtTL0koAtUvpE0M6UohyYqyXE3T6X6V7DhIyV3qRLw6g/3h9/-p4kGQDuTO6PSAtlp7KzpA/h0/h2-7jtA11SHTQJ6HFO7MBKeNLU4ZfOBl8mgwyWHHniQ) Team, Black Women are one of the most important voting populations in the United States. We have powered every victory in the Democratic Party for decades, and yet we rarely get to see ourselves represented in leadership. I am running for Congress because working class communities like mine are being left behind and bargained away, but I also know that when people like me run for office it sends another message, one my 5 year old nephew has learned to accept as fundamental: Black Women belong in Congress. We have been spoken to and spoken for, but rarely do we ever get the chance to speak. We are the force that mobilizes the Democratic electorate, and soon, with your help, we will be the voice bringing accountability, urgency, and transformative change to Congress. **[Donate $15 to help us get there.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIcPgRJA71Gt6yvd5kp4V8OpaRviyTwFIP-vWvr0WIJnZk4XHrLfGUXqAfTmlCdHP5Q2YKlUiknfg6-FjMFiuIldkfzq2k02y4NcuS3BztwGtBJZzzbC1JQsD9HQ0A1UZ-hhbuBCdi1MfR8Z797mslpJqCzj4xtthIc8sjyiXZ8yxRfQicyox98tzqyqSnM4rLWaIAE4TeuvVES0cJl67hz5nFMVl3aTGQ0Z1YkS-ZafIbkC8YGr16EBEWhy-IQvMRjNwZTa59E5O3sbNt8nqncM9BXo4YBLYcK8eMdLmuNmVTZCrb-gMepli_KtaCpjZ1U4d_mTG7Uh2qCl6ueIQqOYipuvdRewO_eOkRKtgHiA/3h9/-p4kGQDuTO6PSAtlp7KzpA/h1/Kry7EpNV3s8yDG0qmVljQlXSWHgSDxUT7etN4r7Ywrc)** [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIcPgRJA71Gt6yvd5kp4V8OpaRviyTwFIP-vWvr0WIJuw_fiCsx7QzN-SvsJFQCdF2Tm_hsEIUahZmu-w9be5ykA4Rz5NyAhOm5qPnm0TOtEHGeL71a2-WCTyxopPrtDOl5xtwbwQW_2fFrFv-daLSqv992fu9r_1WlXxAu_3UoaYLIgXOncCOsuQ0QOWBnDUIEx0m8al_UoKbSSj4_NqMKmXMSf0VlWIeS4avEZAcPfdmO_zyeQnGJCKxiu3GzpD8qUVMjc3mVFtYPQpUsnxXg5LLAq1gSD4-5heL9oe7KXdwwD3ggLBRh0i1Kwnpep8sQiXfCNj82AZFH3Oq6ybesQp2u-EVLPjNiQDaJicwzA/3h9/-p4kGQDuTO6PSAtlp7KzpA/h2/Xjrdn-H8BlT23t0gRQM605IOWP03c1VbG_OfyjRfGQA) Thank you,

name: SamuelsForCongress.com
subject: Save the Majority Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Samuels for Congress
body:
We have to protect our majority in the House.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940132/317707264/-1223207246?refcode=EM_FR_211123Majority_OPPO_SC_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTiB0cwL69O5OzXlxVij2Jl36-xR_AZ_NIj7In7nEEQ=)
Even though the holidays are upon us, we can't stop thinking about what our lives will be like if we don’t keep the House in 2022. That’s why we’re fighting with everything we’ve got, but this fight takes resources.
[**November has been incredibly slow -- could you be one of the 20 donors we need to give $20 for our Save the Majority Fund?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940133/317707266/-1223207246?refcode=EM_FR_211123Majority_OPPO_SC_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTiB0cwL69O5OzXlxVij2Jl36-xR_AZ_NIj7In7nEEQ=)
[$20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940134/317707267/-1223207246?refcode=EM_FR_211123Majority_OPPO_SC_90DO_7_NG_N_B1&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2I5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTiB0cwL69O5OzXlxVij2Jl36-xR_AZ_NIj7In7nEEQ=)
Right-wing extremists will come at us with everything they’ve got in 2022, and it’s already started. Here are some facts:
* There are **SEVEN** sitting members of Congress who reportedly helped plan the January 6th insurrection.
* If we lose just **FIVE** seats, we will lose the majority in the House.

We know most people aren’t thinking about campaigns right now, _but the fight to keep the House and protect democracy has already begun._

That’s why we’re fighting with everything we’ve got, but this fight takes resources. = = Right-wing extremists will come at us with everything they’ve got in 2022, and it’s already started. Here are some facts: There are SEVEN sitting members of Congress who reportedly helped plan the January 6th insurrection. If we lose just FIVE seats, we will lose the majority in the House. We know most people aren’t thinking about campaigns right now, but the fight to keep the House and protect democracy has already begun. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940160/317707295/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_GV_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWI5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQRPmcqqToxqMWV62ShsitucAGJAZgDDXpVkW4LRrKk=)
---
**** Team, Thanksgiving is a time to gather with our loved ones and take a step back to reflect on what we’re grateful for. **This year, I am so incredibly thankful for you.** I launched my campaign for Congress about three months ago, determined to build a people-driven movement to flip NM-02 from red to blue and give southern New Mexicans a representative who truly fights for their best interests in Washington. Since then, we’ve built an incredible foundation fueled by grassroots donors and people helping spread the word as I travel across the state meeting with New Mexicans in dozens of communities. Here are just a few of my recent highlights: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940161/317707297/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_GV_full_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWI5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQRPmcqqToxqMWV62ShsitucAGJAZgDDXpVkW4LRrKk=)
---
We started November by celebrating Native American Heritage Month, taking time to honor our state's rich cultures, traditions, and histories. Native American communities and leaders make New Mexico great.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940162/317707325/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_GV_full_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWI5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQRPmcqqToxqMWV62ShsitucAGJAZgDDXpVkW4LRrKk=)
---
In Las Cruces, we came together and honored our veterans, with special acknowledgement of our Korean War veterans, at a beautiful Veterans Day parade.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940163/317707326/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_GV_full_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWI5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQRPmcqqToxqMWV62ShsitucAGJAZgDDXpVkW4LRrKk=)
---
I also joined Mayor Benny Jasso and community members to honor veterans at a Veterans Day event in Deming organized by Thom Barry (R-USMC), Commander of the American Legion Bataan Post 4.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940164/317707327/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_GV_full_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWI5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQRPmcqqToxqMWV62ShsitucAGJAZgDDXpVkW4LRrKk=)
---
And last week, I had an awesome time participating in the Sierra Vista Trail Run put on by New Mexico’s Bureau of Land Management, the Southern New Mexico Trail Alliance, and all of the volunteers and sponsors. Nothing beats running with the Organ Mountains as your backdrop!
We’ve still got just under a year until the November 2022 election and our opportunity to flip this critical House seat, but if it’s anything like these first few months have been, I know we’re going to win!
Thank you again for everything you’ve done to support our campaign for NM-02. I hope you have a great Thanksgiving with a delicious meal surrounded by loved ones.
Best,
Gabe
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940165/317707328/1888486807?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_GV_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWI5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQRPmcqqToxqMWV62ShsitucAGJAZgDDXpVkW4LRrKk=)
---

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico.

subject: A modern-day poll tax

body:
#
Hello friend,
Since January, 19 states have passed laws making it harder to vote. Republican-led legislatures across our country are undermining our democracy and disenfranchising millions of Americans by obstructing their fundamental right to vote.
Black and brown folks in Southern states have been disproportionately targeted by these restrictive voting laws as legislatures have limited their ability to vote by mail, cut early voting hours, and criminalized the act of simply handing out water to voters waiting in long lines. In Florida, one million formerly incarcerated persons must pay a poll tax in order to vote.
No government should deny its citizens access to the ballot — that’s why I’m calling on the Senate to pass the _Freedom to Vote Act_ and put an end to voter suppression.
**[Friend, please join me in pushing the Senate to pass the _Freedom to Vote Act_ to protect our democracy. With the 2022 midterm elections around the corner, we have to act now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940176/317707342/1465474333?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2I5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_3XLWNeHt9hFrtNpzM7W3g-kAtq0qA48KtsvLylOd4=&emci=039bac55-a74b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d7b99e50-a04c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940177/317707343/1465474333?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2I5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_3XLWNeHt9hFrtNpzM7W3g-kAtq0qA48KtsvLylOd4=&emci=039bac55-a74b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d7b99e50-a04c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**
_The Freedom to Vote Act_ is critical legislation that will implement automatic and same-day voter registration, stop partisan gerrymandering, make Election Day a federal holiday, require at least 15 consecutive days of early voting, and so much more.
I’m proud to have both the _Right to Vote Act_ , which I introduced with Senator Jon Ossoff and the _Preventing Election Subversion Act_ , which I co-lead, included in the _Freedom to Vote Act_.
**[Please add your name next to mine to support this bill. It is incredibly important to get the _Freedom to Vote Act_ passed if we want a chance to save our democracy before it’s too late.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940178/317707344/1465474333?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2I5OWU1MC1hMDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_3XLWNeHt9hFrtNpzM7W3g-kAtq0qA48KtsvLylOd4=&emci=039bac55-a74b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d7b99e50-a04c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**
Thank you for your help in this fight,
Mondaire

body:
| | | **[WOW, this is incredible! Since President Obama broke his silence and called on us to protect our Majorities, CNN reported SIX Republican Senate seats are on the verge of flipping BLUE!! Now is our chance to build the biggest Democratic Majorities in history. But McConnell won't go down without a fight, and our Democratic Trifecta is razor-thin. Will you rush $3 before MIDNIGHT to answer President Obama's call and defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**FIRST:**

President Obama called on us to zero in on the Senate.

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTR994~)

**THEN: **

After President Obama's powerful call, CNN revealed Democrats are on the verge of flipping SIX must-win Senate seats!!

**** | **[This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to FLIP seats in Missouri, Ohio, North Carolina, Florida, and Pennsylvania!!!](https://links.e.dccc.)**
---

President Obama knows just how unprecedented this opportunity is for Democrats.

**If we can flip these seats and maintain our momentum in the House, we could secure our Majorities for DECADES.**

But McConnell and his Republicans won't go down without a fight. They've already raised millions to get revenge.

**[That's why we're calling on grassroots Democrats like you to rush $3 before midnight to help OUTRAISE McConnell and his allies. He's not wasting a second, and is already flooding critical races with cash. We need to match his war chest or else we risk losing our once-in-a-lifetime shot to make our Democratic Trifecta UNBEATABLE. Can we count on your $3 to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: Gary Black
subject: From A Farmer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e3f1c0e04a1036f6/7ed91b3f11344237c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — I live on the farm my father purchased in 1969.**

---
We’re stewards of the land. We protect our family and our home. Living our values and preserving them, that’s what makes me tick. Washington — and certainly the U.S. Senate — could learn a lot from our farmers. I know I have. [**Will you watch our special Thanksgiving video here or below, and share it far and wide?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e3f1c0e04a1036f6/75ba5594fd637ed5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate to restore our voices and our values, because protecting and promoting the values learned on the family farm is good for Georgia and America. ** And as we pause this week to give thanks, let’s remember to thank all of the farmers who feed and clothe our nation. And let’s resolve to protect and preserve this land for future generations. Hope you have a peaceful and happy Thanksgiving with your family and loved ones!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e3f1c0e04a1036f6/02e384450b7b4204c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e3f1c0e04a1036f6/6bf5787b55690203c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e3f1c0e04a1036f6/f2d3bb8caa10b05ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=e3f1c0e04a1036f6&d=1a37736afeead22ac3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=e3f1c0e04a1036f6).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I’m shocked by what I just learned: \-- Mark Kelly is now in danger of losing Arizona.
\-- Raphael Warnock is now in danger of losing Georgia.
\-- Catherine Cortez Masto is now in danger of losing Nevada.

**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Fellow Conservative,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=64720515b6fd4edc85a919d1cc4ba8d9&_e=hi43fsK1A8CcJ4o0zVUv-hZRdYQsRmmhw4UGF0gEP7K9cirLU_0KClXkQy3z72kfUnL-mAk3dri0hICLuYmgf1YmyGpxXHl_tV_YcL8likdbnTmW5FMqhf_5FzDjHo_SDcOxhWzW6SOT5zpKG6Yc5k5q1Xee8dBb7M2Z2SflzvcpFUYY6cD4h_rU94wUCjDD4WMaLs9M8yZkRNunVm4HRmZtwyo2KdiiuUEGAV0R_W4CIQ0ArYGomLu8zl1CVxUgEw56TayVbh8XiKIzUyFoqjxx-CS541JvxmbK0DfS5mIxyQBHdOQZVZp3UvqomKTCQRU_RmgO4DuHSyOGyCIi2NMnyeHe6Y2KJ29v1jXQj8gEtYfPmRxQd3nkrzn_e2SX2A4PEQUmOHS68FC2BcD0hfN5_zaTCpbmuiP1l-Tr32bsjfT7hZd8ImVXNIN3kVewddqGIQ5DbukHjWs1Hkr-jeB-DRwqQRRE0PHHxeFcHNA%3D)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. clean_body: Our race in GA has been declared a “toss-up.” This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate! | ☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜ Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up Fellow Conservative, BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in. Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic." If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message. In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters. Take a look for yourself: I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up. While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column. Therefore, we must increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game. While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: A time for gratitude

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940856/317709344/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2VhNDdhMS1hMTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZLFPkqEhrt4gD3rvslroViw_EKoqpArsf4ypEqPl3aU=&emci=0ae446cd-6a4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=43ea47a1-a14c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15353729)

Peter, I hope that you are well.

Every morning before I start my workday, I focus on gratitude. For my health. For our planet. For the roof over my head. There's always lots to be thankful for.

And as we enter the holiday season, I'm also thinking about what it means to share our second winter together in this pandemic. I'm definitely thankful for my booster shot!

This year, there's even more, to be grateful for: **everyone who is supporting my campaign for Governor.**

When I first embarked on this journey to run for Governor, I didn't know what to expect. I am so grateful for your support - every step of the way.

**And I filed the official paperwork last week!**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38940858/317709345/-2077430504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2VhNDdhMS1hMTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZLFPkqEhrt4gD3rvslroViw_EKoqpArsf4ypEqPl3aU=&emci=0ae446cd-6a4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=43ea47a1-a14c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15353729)

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38941017/317709924/335882241?refcode=fl_em_na_20211123Thanksgiving_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODc3YTk2MC1hMjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OFb-VPmm8dqkvUwwGtyPszrA1wskAouScVLhpFLU5vA=)
---
Hi friend, I wanted to be sure to wish you all a happy and healthy Thanksgiving before we log off to start prepping our dinners and spending time with family and friends. **I know what I’m especially thankful for this year: supporters like you.** As a kid growing up in an unstable household, constantly moving and sometimes unable to afford things like milk for my cereal, I never would have thought that someday, I’d be running for Congress. I’m part of the first generation that has it worse off than their parents, and that’s not okay with me. But that’s why I’m running to be your next representative: to ensure no child or family has to go without what they need to not only survive, but thrive in today’s world. For the past month since announcing my candidacy for Pennsylvania’s first congressional district, I’ve felt such an outpouring of support from people like you. I’ve also seen and heard the ways our current representation is failing Pennsylvania families and working people. Together, we can change that. Thanks to you, we’re off to a great start, and I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together between now and the November 2022 election. Thanks again from the bottom of my heart. Know that I’m incredibly grateful for each and every thing you do for this campaign to flip PA-01, from signing petitions to making grassroots donations to spreading the word on social media. This Thursday, I hope you have a wonderful holiday surrounded by loved ones. Then, let’s get back to work! — Ashley | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them.

clean_body: | = Hi friend, I wanted to be sure to wish you all a happy and healthy Thanksgiving before we log off to start prepping our dinners and spending time with family and friends. I know what I’m especially thankful for this year: supporters like you. As a kid growing up in an unstable household, constantly moving and sometimes unable to afford things like milk for my cereal, I never would have thought that someday, I’d be running for Congress. I’m part of the first generation that has it worse off than their parents, and that’s not okay with me. But that’s why I’m running to be your next representative: to ensure no child or family has to go without what they need to not only survive, but thrive in today’s world. For the past month since announcing my candidacy for Pennsylvania’s first congressional district, I’ve felt such an outpouring of support from people like you. I’ve also seen and heard the ways our current representation is failing Pennsylvania families and working people. Together, we can change that. Thanks to you, we’re off to a great start, and I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together between now and the November 2022 election. Thanks again from the bottom of my heart. Know that I’m incredibly grateful for each and every thing you do for this campaign to flip PA-01, from signing petitions to making grassroots donations to spreading the word on social media. This Thursday, I hope you have a wonderful holiday surrounded by loved ones. Then, let’s get back to work! — Ashley | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army.
