Last week, the House passed the historic Build Back Better Act, delivering on our promises! This follows the passage of the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act, which brings $3.5 billion to Connecticut for federal highway programs and $561 million to Connecticut for desperately needed bridge replacement and repairs. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38941377/317711669/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTA4NWVjOS1hNDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHPs8KycFj6s9Ah_onSOitfa9mcFkQ1CJyaZAetgs1Y=&emci=891f43ea-6d4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2e085ec9-a44c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15529135) | Last week, the House passed the historic Build Back Better Act, delivering on our promises! This follows the passage of the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act, which brings $3.5 billion to Connecticut for federal highway programs and $561 million to Connecticut for desperately needed bridge replacement and repairs. _These are real programs that will bring real relief to all people in CT. These bills are the investment in our future that Americans need and deserve._ The Build Back Better Act means lower child care costs, universal pre-K for all American children, growing our clean energy economy, lower health care costs, paid family and medical leave, lower prescription drug prices... and SO much more. [**THIS is what happens with Democrats in the majority. THIS is the progress we can make for the American people. I am – as always – keeping my head down and focusing on my work. Focusing on making a positive impact where I can. _Many of the priorities I fought for were included in the final version of the Build Back Better Act._ **But the relentless attack ads and GOP trackers assigned to me have not slowed down while Congress worked hard to bring these positive changes to American families**.
[_**So now is the moment to contribute.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38941385/317711677/777984295?recurring=auto&refcode=E12583-20211123-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTA4NWVjOS1hNDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHPs8KycFj6s9Ah_onSOitfa9mcFkQ1CJyaZAetgs1Y=) With less than 12 months until Election Day, we need to keep pushing forward and be resolute in our message: _We are not going anywhere_.
It is the EARLY support that pays off when the going gets rough. When the nasty mailers drop, when the divisive rhetoric starts to penetrate, when millions in opposition advertising meant to distract from the real work floods the airwaves – it is because of supporters like you who have invested EARLY who ensure we have the resources to get my positive, unifying message out above the rhetoric.
In 2018, we came together, worked hard, and won big. We did the same thing in 2020. Now, we’re ready to move ahead of the critical 2022 midterm elections and spread the word about the important work Democrats are fighting for on behalf of the American people. _We did not come this far to only come this far!_
[**If you’re ready to do what it takes to hold this seat and the House so I can continue my work in Washington, please consider a recurring donation of $20.22 or any amount that makes sense for you._We need the early investments to hold this seat._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38941386/317711678/777984295?recurring=auto&refcode=E12583-20211123-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTA4NWVjOS1hNDRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHPs8KycFj6s9Ah_onSOitfa9mcFkQ1CJyaZAetgs1Y=)
Thank you for trusting me with your vote and for trusting me with your voice. With your support, we will get it done!
– Jahana

This follows the passage of the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act, which brings $3.5 billion to Connecticut for federal highway programs and $561 million to Connecticut for desperately needed bridge replacement and repairs. These are real programs that will bring real relief to all people in CT. These bills are the investment in our future that Americans need and deserve. The Build Back Better Act means lower child care costs, universal pre-K for all American children, growing our clean energy economy, lower health care costs, paid family and medical leave, lower prescription drug prices... and SO much more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your recurring donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I am – as always – keeping my head down and focusing on my work. Focusing on making a positive impact where I can. Many of the priorities I fought for were included in the final version of the Build Back Better Act. But the relentless attack ads and GOP trackers assigned to me have not slowed down while Congress worked hard to bring these positive changes to American families. = With less than 12 months until Election Day, we need to keep pushing forward and be resolute in our message: We are not going anywhere. It is the EARLY support that pays off when the going gets rough. When the nasty mailers drop, when the divisive rhetoric starts to penetrate, when millions in opposition advertising meant to distract from the real work floods the airwaves – it is because of supporters like you who have invested EARLY who ensure we have the resources to get my positive, unifying message out above the rhetoric. In 2018, we came together, worked hard, and won big. We did the same thing in 2020. Now, we’re ready to move ahead of the critical 2022 midterm elections and spread the word about the important work Democrats are fighting for on behalf of the American people. We did not come this far to only come this far! = Thank you for trusting me with your vote and for trusting me with your voice. With your support, we will get it done! – Jahana = * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you need to update your contact information, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes Friends of Jahana Hayes P.O. Box 1487 Waterbury, CT 06721 United States

Kamala Harris was named Border Czar in March. She's had eight months to make progress in securing our border and the situation has only gotten worse.
**In fact, the crisis has spiraled completely out of control. The number of illegal crossings is at a decades-long high, drugs and sex trafficking are rampant, and border communities are seeing increased levels of violence.**
Harris has been an absolute disaster. It's time for her to go, and we are getting ready to make a bi-partisan push for her replacement.
[_**But we need your support to keep up our work. Send a generous gift of $70 or more to let us know you've got our back.**_](http://url7814.protectamericanow.com/ls/click?upn=3eFiVoiUwlvJueN0fL7MVK0Sgfcp3vl17mubXsvNOuEyCMmLGIf-2B5L6d5zUfEaNaY86QeCvOeZOlr2EVWr7wig-3D-3DfQEy_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6tGvqtJVFNMxRsp0clPmywjMG5Ro13dj98W30qG38iRo5SFoKPf-2B-2FYSqDjSyem-2BofGS-2BTjE0jRifLqBEvOZkQFfzNEkXUisd7Gmb0UlDVmM90eFjNtB6UnMyhOq376Rzk69fJ3qFPVUOnc3HTF3lD4U6nKTRRAeTAmYg3e8HNhi7jtAT8AbiPfIndWAElDqPPAhfNt5bFiXpQxxFeN5fR-2BHaB26V9EUcB5xwBEq6Skp6df-2FFiu5Wa6h6G1lnsQabxVz23yP371ILzJiwx8m1QvWXGaP7GmAAFqbRXc1vtMQS-2BVSOccaHE6wv6s67-2F1PXZ0sXqx0DxaQ7H2wBN-2BEH5InXGGih046MJbUx4lqEfs9ZEtmLKSGFy6PWAKJ9dabQczfihtJrVW4NCiMz-2BGgHey8NZcxWHV2aQx-2FysChiqqrY6fbCMvQhcE0J4O1KgpzFlsFkRN8JAWt-2Bqb0P9n4uK5pk6vKoXngkf0zxdh-2FHEDT4m6Gz-2B-2B158s7EnzNvZ9-2FxLwC73UPWpgf8bA9cSpz8EfiDn3VEUORRRhEVr4Qqx50FoXTW1Pk6qwMRtmUr0j5VOky6zCgGlZxeDGzz5NiZ7ywnupu-2Ft2bHuhHIen4L3a0sJtjHToYA1a7h-2BPfQ-2Bnq-2BRWRkV6A4HDO6v1oAnhUj1wmLA6n6xHWZ-2B19XDLj0pvZhMMOf8r8x-2FTFOewoLq7YTg9jsldibng8yTlJv7cWoZPmmBHkNMrpmTyQG4Id8vfeRuVA9eObVOVoi1FH6VoOvJQadsm0cd3em7yr6o9NgxdN0oKepwudt4VqZmJV-2B9yUvBxwZUfmx-2FinYX72GFxpQBF-2FH9wWzToHSqLE20XiFTMIMXvts3-2FSB4OzArJSxi8CE-3D)
Replacing Kamala Harris as border czar will be a major first step in forcing the Biden Administration to take this crisis seriously.
**With a little help from other red-state Democrats like Rep. Cuellar, we can make a bi-partisan push that will be impossible for Biden to ignore.**
But we need your support to make this all possible. Our organization is fueled by conservatives like you.
Stand with me today, and we'll force their hand together.

| **The COVID-19 vaccines were NEVER effective** ... and now, we have cold, hard proof:
* New data shows the Pfizer vaccine is **only 45% effective** after 6 months... against _any_ COVID-19 variant.

* A leaked video shows a **top Pfizer scientist** admitting that **vaccines are vastly inferior** compared to **natural immunity,**

* Sweden **halted Moderna shots** for people under 30 because it **causes major heart problems,**

* U.S. COVID-19 **cases are skyrocketing** **to their highest peaks EVER** ... even though the _majority_ of Americans have been vaccinated.

Meanwhile, the Left is ignoring the science to create a** tyrannical apartheid state...**

...where anyone who _dares_ to question their authority is **fired** from their **jobs** , **stripped** of their freedom of **movement** , **denied** **healthcare** , and **barred** from participating in **society.**

This only ends in one of two ways, Peter. **Either the far-Left wins** their war on America... or **patriots like you and me do.**

| Peter,

Now more than ever, we need leaders who will protect the voices of parents instead of threatening them, who will boost our economy instead of tanking it, and who will make our rights as law-abiding citizens the priority - NOT those of lawless criminals!
For Sheriff Joe Lombardo, that's the course he plans on charting as our next Governor. After all, he's been keeping Nevada safe for decades now!
But the fact is that he's not going to be able to get to work in Carson City without your support, and money continues to pour in to prop up Steve Sisolak. So before the Thanksgiving holiday, [are you able to chip in any amount towards getting a proven leader in charge by supporting Joe's campaign?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oeveR_6Jk7rswfUvfHRGDJLz2b5yE4yYhB6-OiUYXP6N1_B-syQkcfAXwB1potYfTgbz_3kuNC_UsDyHZ1I61QEaDaw6Btxp3Hw5xGDPste22UtSfRMXhWa_6msxrdtx7xf52XcBJ1qIMd1DPd9r66CFnnNzAFPcNq9PF2VJejnsBu_GzG5gHi0j253cLQDMQ9dV4yv5gVc=&c=a7ui5gA4M-JM9VjB3XnvdQ4hqvhRUDJBt_OTkgY_gudpS-vtYFHGUA==&ch=TP0fInorE0NTM4tQI4YYxNLUane6J9rtfE3_jSh0o9yTBIyZiG4a3A==)

| Days like today are when the support of everyday folks like you really makes a difference...
Even though the holiday season is now in full swing, our campaign still has goals to hit and steps we need to take on the ground if we're going to ultimately end the destruction of Single-Party rule.
[That's why keeping up the support for our outsider campaign really goes the extra mile today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oeveR_6Jk7rswfUvfHRGDJLz2b5yE4yYhB6-OiUYXP6N1_B-syQkcfAXwB1potYfTgbz_3kuNC_UsDyHZ1I61QEaDaw6Btxp3Hw5xGDPste22UtSfRMXhWa_6msxrdtx7xf52XcBJ1qIMd1DPd9r66CFnnNzAFPcNq9PF2VJejnsBu_GzG5gHi0j253cLQDMQ9dV4yv5gVc=&c=a7ui5gA4M-JM9VjB3XnvdQ4hqvhRUDJBt_OTkgY_gudpS-vtYFHGUA==&ch=TP0fInorE0NTM4tQI4YYxNLUane6J9rtfE3_jSh0o9yTBIyZiG4a3A==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oeveR_6Jk7rswfUvfHRGDJLz2b5yE4yYhB6-OiUYXP6N1_B-syQkcfAXwB1potYfTgbz_3kuNC_UsDyHZ1I61QEaDaw6Btxp3Hw5xGDPste22UtSfRMXhWa_6msxrdtx7xf52XcBJ1qIMd1DPd9r66CFnnNzAFPcNq9PF2VJejnsBu_GzG5gHi0j253cLQDMQ9dV4yv5gVc=&c=a7ui5gA4M-JM9VjB3XnvdQ4hqvhRUDJBt_OTkgY_gudpS-vtYFHGUA==&ch=TP0fInorE0NTM4tQI4YYxNLUane6J9rtfE3_jSh0o9yTBIyZiG4a3A==)

name: Team Holly
subject: Get your "Charge Marge" sticker today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]

name: Giffords
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A 17-year-old arming himself with an AR-15 makes no one safer.
#

The Kyle Rittenhouse verdict sends a troubling message that will encourage further vigilante violence and murder. That is not a society in which we are safe or free. Rather than accept this version of America, our team at Giffords is recommitting to doing everything in our power to make this country safer.
We hope you’re with us, and wanted to make sure you saw our Executive Director’s email from over the weekend.
* * *
Friends,
Kyle Rittenhouse — who had been charged with five felonies, including shooting and killing two people, and injuring another — was found not guilty.
This verdict is a perversion of justice. Our nation is built on laws — not vigilantism. Murder, racism, and hate-fueled violence should be condemned, not celebrated. Too often, our legal system protects the right of white Americans to take the lives of others, especially people of color. Kyle Rittenhouse wielded his whiteness as a shield and his AR-15 as a weapon in the streets of Kenosha, where police officers thanked the self-styled militia members, including Rittenhouse, and let him walk away after killing two people.
Rittenhouse also benefited from our country’s weak gun laws. The gun lobby argues that everyone will be safer if we all arm ourselves, but this extremist idea is neither supported by most Americans nor any evidence.
As the tragic events on that night in August showed, a 17-year-old arming himself with an AR-15 makes no one safer. Rather than roll back gun safety laws, as the gun lobby is pushing the Supreme Court to do, we must strengthen gun laws that protect us all. Laws like minimum age requirements and assault weapon regulations don’t infringe on the Second Amendment — they’re commonsense protections. At the same time, extreme Stand Your Ground laws that encourage people to shoot first and ask questions later must be repealed.
The verdict sends a troubling message that will encourage further vigilante violence and murder. That is not a society in which we are safe or free. Rather than accept this version of America, we recommit to doing everything in our power to make this country safer.
I hope you are with us for all the battles to come.
All my best,
Peter Ambler
Executive Director
**Will you make a $3 donation to Giffords to support our work? Your donation will be put immediately to work in a campaign to pass universal background checks, keep guns out of the hands of people who shouldn’t have them, and keep our communities safe.**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211123-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1233_3935704_7WkBz6&akid=1233%2E3935704%2E7WkBz6)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1233%2E3935704%2E7WkBz6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Governor Greg Abbott has failed Texans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Abbott has stopped listening to, trusting, and working for Texans.
#
Governor Greg Abbott has failed Texans.
During the Covid-19 pandemic, Abbott has undermined science and public health at every turn.
At the height of the pandemic, he barred school boards, mayors, county judges, and even private businesses from implementing common sense public health measures that could have prevented thousands upon thousands of deaths.
**As a result, we've lost over 73,000 of our friends, family members, and neighbors to Abbott’s bungled response to the pandemic.**
This is happening because Abbott has stopped listening to, trusting, and working for Texans. He’s put us all at risk in his efforts to cater to the loudest, most extreme voices in his party.
[If you're ready to be a part of this people-powered movement to defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto O'Rourke to be our next governor, will you chip in $3 or more right now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50119?refcode=ema20211123-163814&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163814%2E444211%2EUR3T39)
In May, Abbott announced that all cities, counties, and public schools could not require masks in the classroom and would be fined if they attempted to do so. **As a result, Texas became a national leader in childhood Covid deaths at the start of the school year.**
While Abbott’s careless decisions have put Texans at risk, Beto has spent decades working to improve the lives of Texans. He'll be a leader focused on protecting Texans from this ever-changing virus. But first, we need to help him defeat Abbott.
[Please, contribute $3 or more to fire Abbott and put an end to his extreme and divisive policies. clean_body: Abbott has stopped listening to, trusting, and working for Texans. Governor Greg Abbott has failed Texans. During the Covid-19 pandemic, Abbott has undermined science and public health at every turn. At the height of the pandemic, he barred school boards, mayors, county judges, and even private businesses from implementing common sense public health measures that could have prevented thousands upon thousands of deaths. As a result, we've lost over 73,000 of our friends, family members, and neighbors to Abbott’s bungled response to the pandemic. This is happening because Abbott has stopped listening to, trusting, and working for Texans. He’s put us all at risk in his efforts to cater to the loudest, most extreme voices in his party. In May, Abbott announced that all cities, counties, and public schools could not require masks in the classroom and would be fined if they attempted to do so. As a result, Texas became a national leader in childhood Covid deaths at the start of the school year. While Abbott’s careless decisions have put Texans at risk, Beto has spent decades working to improve the lives of Texans. He'll be a leader focused on protecting Texans from this ever-changing virus. But first, we need to help him defeat Abbott. As a fourth-generation Texan and father, Beto understands how important it is that ALL Texans have someone looking out for them. That's why we're funding this campaign with $5, $10, and $25 grassroots donations from folks like you — because Beto will always be 100% accountable to the people — not lobbyists. Thank you, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

name: Emergency Petition [Left Action]
subject: re: Texas abortion ban
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the petition: Fight back against the Texas abortion ban >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T872621ba-17fd-4f75-9324-d51dc2859229/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16ec9dba-d30e-4b63-87b3-56c6d7c67510/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | We were devastated when Texas imposed the most restrictive abortion law in the country -- and again when the Supreme Court upheld it. This abortion ban, Senate Bill (SB) 8, bans abortion at about six weeks – before most people know they’re pregnant AND authorizes any person in the country to sue a person who performed or helped a patient access an abortion in violation of the ban. Not only is this ban downright disgusting, it’s blatantly unconstitutional. That’s why the ACLU is suing Texas over SB 8 -- and they need our support. We must keep up the fight to keep abortion legal. [Sign your name to stand with the ACLU and fight back against the Texas abortion ban.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bd39a9d-b05e-4224-ac0c-c9e556b1e0f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: =?utf-8?b?Um96YSBDYWxkZXLDs24sIEZ1dHVyZSBHZW5lcmF0aW9ucw==?=
subject: Congressman Jamie Raskin joins Future Generations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future Generations PAC

We are so excited to have Rep. Raskin join our slate and the fight for our future. Jamie Raskin has a bold record of relentless advocacy for the environment that has been recognized for years. When he joined Rep. Ocasio-Cortez and his Future Generations slatemate Sen. Markey in introducing the Green New Deal, Jamie described the urgency of climate change as a "civilizational emergency."

**We need to keep allies like Rep. Raskin in Congress if we 're going to pass the Green New Deal and halt the climate crisis. Will you split a contribution with his campaign and Future Generations today?**
---
[ **Elect Jamie for the Future!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yImUf_b6CesG9wJb30wgu5SK-H13qWnyOMfRgNfeShTKEQKZvQf6rqGvdB9I9FokWetel4QyQHvf5gtxTnPqA-HRH4BlImBZqQQpXRySqoiif-NhTds1DKqVZ_TcA9lSdar0v6y282tLc1l_dIF_tXB2we8hdQAeAnttPQGoRmPSqRBlw0xsTCNS1ekfwJES2Vey1H0cnd5Qcz7DiVTFHL69tT2hdmyva1BO5a0YjFN9c68IRx6JmWpZpgM6Q2Ky_LPV8GgIvffTX-8vN9J5LKoJAZKUHWNCOy3DSyfiErrbImIO6wiT3qw3OjP-Aj_Dc_SPMcBB73DE6FU3Um579oQV9nqs771qTNlyXVh5GitoapyhvND2l7xVVtteTcbNE/3h9/rqd5HvA4SvGMmdX6S5rasA/h2/0G58fRA-tmwPj0y78yGYhW_f8yJvxrBW5hYr5fR_kkg)
---
This endorsement was an easy one! Jamie inspires people from every generation to care about climate change by demonstrating how it intersects with race, criminal justice, housing, and healthcare. In his own words:
---
_" I take pride in my endorsement by Future Generations, a remarkable group galvanizing people to ensure a sustainable future for generations to come. Climate change is both a civilizational emergency and the context in which we must consider all public policy decisions, big and small. I look forward to working with the leaders at Future Generations to advocate for swift and sweeping change to address climate chaos."_
**Rep. Jamie Raskin (MD-08)**
---
In all his work, Jamie invests directly in the people of his community. In just his first two terms in Congress, he has secured over $40 million dollars in funding to combat homelessness, and hundreds of millions of dollars for Maryland public transit systems and other critical infrastructure upgrades -- creating good jobs and reducing carbon emissions. We are confident he will continue to take the lead on implementing legislation that builds upon the principles of the Green New Deal, and for this reason, Future Generations is proud to endorse Jamie Raskin.

**[In a time when politicians sell out to corporate interests, we need to keep allies in office who will fight for our future. You can help by splitting a contribution between Jamie Raskin and Future Generations today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yImUf_b6CesG9wJb30wgu5SK-H13qWnyOMfRgNfeShTKEQKZvQf6rqGvdB9I9FokWmC_iGNL4nwbTBD9lHcDfB3McuwOtFnMKKBY_0zhwfonBWXoGeRc9U_k2KdA0pcnEUnZykjLU0DFouTnlzmBwpniXlXrfSKGbiAf_oO4LOpAeHbGe5kS7oldBjKw80OBBo2SV-bxH2zQD7fui8t_p_Ao_kuyFwpTmICrd7bQVhn-sqfKZhn_JOe1uwzPrbVyBQK92cEJ-MK7eNCepniYVwUMNGZHkdDgrLZ5g5Ujvi0ky-yqRKBGGwUfOwn6tYtp6ZSxRh_u7qn99gMyLh7kem2m15-ehlE59CUgQv1MJlA_t6Gclwj11umaQPyB3e3RY/3h9/rqd5HvA4SvGMmdX6S5rasA/h3/OdeW-3u0_FL79NYz5lQyL87Lx1RHbh_Aa5UTeNtV6E8)** In solidarity, Roza

| | **Future Generations** is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats.

We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=0ee2fa5d77&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | This Thanksgiving season, I am deeply thankful for the opportunity to serve our community.

Everyone deserves to be safe, housed, fed, and loved, and I have dedicated my life to fighting for these basic rights for every individual.

I am thankful for every one of you who has supported me along this journey and continues to stay with me on the path to the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. I sincerely wish all of you a joyous holiday with friends and family.

We hope you can make it to our final event of 2021, [a fundraiser at one of my favorite local restaurants, MIXTO](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=5a5ff5112e&e=3f8e2ea1e3). Please find details below.

With love and gratitude,

_Deja_
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=d7cb22f2dc&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
### Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=4f9beca44a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=f79b401730&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Schulz=20for=20Congress?=
subject: New District/Need Volunteers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schulz for Ohio
body:
We Need Your Help Today! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/schulzforohio/new-districtneed-volunteers?e=cecfea7090)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# _OH-16 Becoming OH-13_
We finally have a new Ohio Congressional map. My district (OH16) held by Anthony Gonzalez now becomes Ohio’s 13th District shown in blue on the map below.
OH-13 is now compromised of:
* 100% of Medina County

* Cuyahoga County: Bay Village, Berea, Brecksville, Broadview Heights, Brook Park, Middleburg Heights, North Olmsted, North Royalton, Olmsted, Olmsted Falls, Rocky River, Strongsville and Westlake.

* Summit County: Akron, Barberton, Bath, Boston, Boston Heights, Copley, Coventry, Cuyahoga Falls, Fairlawn, Macedonia, Northfield, Northfield Center, Norton, Peninsula, Richfield, and Sagamore Hills.

---
|
---
| If you live in these areas or know people who do, we need you to MOBILIZE with us over the next 5 months and help me win this Republican primary. This primary season will dictate the future of our country. We must send working class outsiders to DC who will uphold our Constitution and restore our God-given rights. Please respond to this email if you would like to volunteer or place a sign in your yard.
To all of my **amazing** supporters from areas of Cuyahoga, Portage, Stark, Summit and Wayne County who are not part of this map, I want to express my deepest appreciation for your support that put my campaign on the track to victory! This is much bigger than one district or one race - This is about a movement.
I am prepared to give all of my time, energy and talent to win this primary in May and general in November. I have already attended 200 events, our team has knocked thousands of doors and we are seeing grassroots energy that is unparalleled.
It’s time to win. Join me
---
|
# _Jonah's Official Statement_
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _We Need Your Help TODAY!_

The next few weeks are going to be vital, as we need to get into new areas that we did not have to focus on prior to redistricting, including Summit, western Medina and continued outreach in Cuyahoga. In mid-December, our campaign has an essential deadline that will determine the potential for game-changing opportunities, which is why we must all work tirelessly over the coming weeks to reach as many voters as possible. We will be utilizing financial resources for targeting voters in various forms, but will also need a large group of individuals to drop flyers and door hangers across targeted areas. We will provide you with maps and walk lists that are in walking order so that you can be as efficient as possible. If you can help, please reply to this email or email our campaign manager (Jonathan) directly at JJS@Liberty-Rising.com
---

name: Dylan McArthur
subject: The stakes couldn’t be higher.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
While the year anniversary of the 2020 election reminds us to reflect on the past year, we’re looking to the future.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38942512/317716829/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211123PBS_VR_DM_90DO_5_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmU3OGFhYi1hOTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1gqkISKBPpkXOvY0iK5XGQR-wIWTQTKNmL1YDLkDZM=)
It’s hard to believe that the 2020 general election was just over a year ago. Just a couple of weeks ago, Maggie went on PBS and talked about her experience during that election.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38942513/317716830/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211123PBS_VR_DM_90DO_5_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmU3OGFhYi1hOTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1gqkISKBPpkXOvY0iK5XGQR-wIWTQTKNmL1YDLkDZM=)
There were a lot of wins to be celebrated:
* Record turnout despite being in the middle of a raging pandemic.
* Turnout for early voting was stronger than ever.
* The election took place in a safer, more secure environment than ever before.

But there were some serious problems, too:
* Maggie and her election staff faced **death threats post-election** , all the way through the insurrection on January 6th.
* Post-election conspiracy theories, spurred by the losing presidential candidate, about the election being stolen ran rampant -- and those conspiracies continue today.

While the year anniversary of the 2020 election reminds us to reflect on what’s happened over the past year - we’re looking to the future.
**_[If you contribute $10 or more today, you’ll help us meet our $5,000 blackout deadline to push back against false conspiracy theories and continue advancing free and fair elections in New Mexico. So please, chip in whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38942514/317716831/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211123PBS_VR_DM_90DO_5_G_N_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmU3OGFhYi1hOTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1gqkISKBPpkXOvY0iK5XGQR-wIWTQTKNmL1YDLkDZM=)_**

Dylan McArthur

Our volunteers are braving the cold every day urging voters to join Melanie’s campaign for Medicare for All, reproductive rights, living wages, and the Green New Deal. There are so many volunteers that we’re running out of palm cards to pass out! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thanks for standing up! \-- Team Melanie is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. subject: A question we often get →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
The answer is pretty simple. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPJVmidDNeIgTtFETyjb0wSWAE8nMoLE7Cklz18CmO0viSCy_-W7EpsYrcIlolo6bvh0UYsqELfdStZ_5C7jYpuLt8ihPiv65PsiBIPpfPV6Ayr0iEhMtcOe2UZbzBAzObvoy17YSYCSnqyvRFJCdLgluv6KwQ4DXiGihopsNOuCKyp6S1B_Yf51ubO7ubpPPn99WHwAPOl_Ej_gueKzLm34Dix8djFvNdSf6SOU4ajXR/3h9/D6rMM40TT1-nOaFVI1Nutg/h0/bD35bhO_s28P50mw6ApVVx2S4_uGcQO3BsXUcGK5LVs)
Peter, As a newer organization, here's a question we often get from folks: **_"Why don't you just recall Kyrsten Sinema?"_** The answer is pretty simple: we can't! U.S. Senators can't be recalled, because state-level recall laws used for governors or local officials don't apply to federal office holders. Therefore, Arizona's recall law does not apply to Sinema. **[So while we may not be able to recall Sinema, we can ensure that Arizona is ready to primary her and elect a real Democrat who isn't out of step with Arizonans. That's the basis of our work at the Primary Sinema Project, and we're just getting started. Chip in $3 now and help us grow our impact:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSegY9wCtabMzVeV-yEJ6oQVqfycM0najvpn0kex88CDeeFlnV1jeqlUrR8w1xLTYdIr7KbUame86juHrrsZKjeOwuZfzRrm68A9073qrLX4GZ6EtTgWWU34K0WS2AZz6N8Jaapbxp6a1xbvaUc8UtB8-bXcZgn7DtCwiZ6_Xb2J5ivWQ_uS5HRkxjVEFngoq6XtyG-IRKRS3q3wdb2PMr5PbGjVxdr2awBKlxidfZSnQwvhGVSf_q-AurZHS8jF_NuBw1FVZfpab3IYTGGHTYpJC-qQbTM4UW40VMQDNMTbaUv3XDnD9tGM1279ag117r/3h9/D6rMM40TT1-nOaFVI1Nutg/h1/MOLAK9dj_2EWzOczt6w4cwVoKlUEN73XKkTPMBjaD9U)** **[Contribute $3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSegY9wCtabMzVeV-yEJ6oQVqfycM0najvpn0kex88CDeBACsK4RrZ6z-4xMiIlxQ6Iee-DnUKR79Sx6u8LSltnqght0eGaShy0kczRh-whSC6R25V0w1ek6gdMCe_jCuYwsxJaR7Ylap35bXvAhVQc9sllcsPIPwQeTAxE9dQEyvgzLEf-gmpEW9zyGKxXeyQKf348XZkwxVwXl_zZKQGFZRm-du7vX3ZK4olb95XJ-8_F8UWnYMgVGTif7WP3CgzMtieY-RZDj6Mw-_0spt6Rn2Jo2ikcHqp1EwKdsS1ljXCcZBQugCycFv3PGD6asyZ/3h9/D6rMM40TT1-nOaFVI1Nutg/h2/1GS-6cixB2R4A8CLepsK8FzK6Jjp_WprUo34OYpQZ5k)** President Biden's agenda is broadly popular in Arizona, and it is extremely popular with Democrats. And recent polling suggests that if Sen. Sinema continues to block his agenda, _voters will not reward her in 2024._ But Peter, ousting an incumbent senator isn't easy work, and it's critical that we retain Democratic control of this seat. And we can't afford to wait until 2024, especially since Sinema's obstruction is hurting Democratic electoral chances — including that of the other Arizona Democratic Senator Mark Kelly, who's up for re-election in 2022 — right now. **That's why we're working closely with grassroots groups on the ground in Arizona who are leading the fight to hold Kyrsten Sinema accountable and make sure that we can elect a real Democrat to the Senate.** **[Will you join us today? If you're ready to lay down the groundwork to get her out of office — please donate $3. Your donations will strategically fund grassroots groups in Arizona laying the foundation for a successful primary challenge.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSegY9wCtabMzVeV-yEJ6oQVqfycM0najvpn0kex88CDcm1A_tyN-gQ5UZS_L8DlSsIWv1JqbO-5xkM7n474Ev0SiyTN8_61uTftqbl_9LoLLbUUuixIw1A_PNu57LusI8lGCY5rmR-w-ePWFFZV0thjd6C9DTKNnsa78VurK7OiNBd7q8Tptjq-4k95L8-5jUNVfWGPMS8wFCVABrHPzPZL1k-HPucK6Hn8WDf7wibmplUFa-97iw3OO2rq-xlaRxl16tPgBFwnJgFB3tA5nQI3q2Aq9PsB2O1pY0MUjSSw4N2flq2QAHuEWrR-XMHBPQ/3h9/D6rMM40TT1-nOaFVI1Nutg/h3/jzTFr6ep8O8GDb-uZuDji-U0XJlyj9EXkhQb2wEyyDQ)** Thank you, Primary Sinema

clean_body: The answer is pretty simple. | | | Peter, As a newer organization, here's a question we often get from folks: "Why don't you just recall Kyrsten Sinema?" The answer is pretty simple: we can't! U.S. Senators can't be recalled, because state-level recall laws used for governors or local officials don't apply to federal office holders. Therefore, Arizona's recall law does not apply to Sinema. President Biden's agenda is broadly popular in Arizona, and it is extremely popular with Democrats. And recent polling suggests that if Sen. Sinema continues to block his agenda, voters will not reward her in 2024. But Peter, ousting an incumbent senator isn't easy work, and it's critical that we retain Democratic control of this seat. And we can't afford to wait until 2024, especially since Sinema's obstruction is hurting Democratic electoral chances — including that of the other Arizona Democratic Senator Mark Kelly, who's up for re-election in 2022 — right now. That's why we're working closely with grassroots groups on the ground in Arizona who are leading the fight to hold Kyrsten Sinema accountable and make sure that we can elect a real Democrat to the Senate. Thank you, Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: Team WisGOP
subject: Pray for Waukesha
body:
We wanted to send a quick note with resources to support the Waukesha community during this painful time.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=waukesha_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- This week has been heavy for all Wisconsinites. We are praying for the community of Waukesha after the tragic events at Sunday’s Christmas parade. Our hearts are with the victims and their families, and we ask that you keep them in your thoughts as they work to heal from this horrific tragedy. We wanted to send a quick note with information on resources available to support the Waukesha community during this painful time. **The City of Waukesha recently announced the United for Waukesha Community Fund -- a partnership between the Waukesha County Community Foundation and United Way to support families impacted by this tragedy. You can donate at the link**[**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GhPaaNBzs54Gh5oH7cabF23uC1zwaMMb6ev7TBv5YisJwJTzpiC2LiTBzOEuTF_QEh0uzWISoxxE-zFUkyWDVw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=waukesha_v3&n=2)**.** Additionally, consider giving blood to support local hospitals in need of donations. **The** **Red Cross Waukesha Blood Donation Center is located at 2220 Silvernail Road, Pewaukee, WI 53072.** We hope that you will join us in prayer and support. Thanks, Team WisGOP
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=waukesha_v3&n=3).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=waukesha_v3&n=4) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=waukesha_v3&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=waukesha_v3&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Great America Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6515%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8FuuLuZvSc2c%2fWyWissKAg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67297%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3%2fjjAZ3ICTuP%2fx6dsivOpw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67298%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DNhWGQiKXuEl47a1rgwojw&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67299%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9USUSs9qddLSMVSUOt3Qlg&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6515%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8FuuLuZvSc2c%2fWyWissKAg&sysid=1)_

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z77prg64ocecar9ph1j09pc578jlgflqf13a0kl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctg66or2chh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc2ieckf7a40jhe9984t1v8oorr8a92kgtc02lmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctg66or2chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv1uionqdinth1pu97fe7trueagu91utlp2oo8i0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctg66or2chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Team NextGen
subject: Key battlegrounds in 2022.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; http://nextgenpac
body:
Here's why North Carolina and Pennsylvania are key battleground states for 2022.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38943436/317720400/-783913782?refcode=EM_FR_211123BG_N_TN_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGNmNjc4OS1hZTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FUmCapSHY3UVe7jdm7kxBndbTucyxghdwGosob7Y9Q=) Team — _North Carolina and Pennsylvania are key battleground states for 2022._

In 2020, NextGen community members made up President Biden’s margin of victory. **By continuing to organize in key states, we can deliver Democratic victories up and down the ballot in 2022.**

Pennsylvania Governor Tom Wolf has been key in preventing the Republican-held state legislature from restricting voting rights after the 2020 election. Now, Pennsylvania’s open gubernatorial seat will be vulnerable in 2022. In North Carolina, we have the opportunity to flip an open U.S. Senate seat, make gains in Congress, and weaken the Republican hold on the state legislature.

From canceling student debt to reforming our criminal justice system, North Carolina and Pennsylvania are key to electing the progressive leaders we need. clean_body: Here's why North Carolina and Pennsylvania are key battleground states for 2022. | | = Team — North Carolina and Pennsylvania are key battleground states for 2022. In 2020, NextGen community members made up President Biden’s margin of victory. By continuing to organize in key states, we can deliver Democratic victories up and down the ballot in 2022. Pennsylvania Governor Tom Wolf has been key in preventing the Republican-held state legislature from restricting voting rights after the 2020 election. Now, Pennsylvania’s open gubernatorial seat will be vulnerable in 2022. In North Carolina, we have the opportunity to flip an open U.S. Senate seat, make gains in Congress, and weaken the Republican hold on the state legislature. Friend, It’s Official. The Wyoming Republican Party has voted to stop recognizing Liz Cheney as a Republican. It was the right thing to do.
---
**We all know that Liz Cheney stopped recognizing what Wyomingites care about a long time ago. When she launched her war against President Trump, she completely broke with where we are as a state. We did not send her to Washington, DC to fight with President Trump; we sent her to DC to fight with Pelosi and Biden. She is now aiding and abetting them in their quest to destroy our “America First” President. **
---
There’s no place in the America First GOP for a Pelosi puppet who spends her time doing photo ops with Adam Schiff (one of the most dishonest political hacks in our country) and fist bumping Joe Biden. As the Radical Left pillages our economy and deconstructs the country we love, Liz Cheney has chosen to join them rather than fight back. Let’s send a message to Liz today that her time in Congress is coming to an end. clean_body: They’re on the same team | | | | They’re on the same team Friend, It’s Official. The Wyoming Republican Party has voted to stop recognizing Liz Cheney as a Republican. It was the right thing to do. We all know that Liz Cheney stopped recognizing what Wyomingites care about a long time ago. When she launched her war against President Trump, she completely broke with where we are as a state. We did not send her to Washington, DC to fight with President Trump; we sent her to DC to fight with Pelosi and Biden. She is now aiding and abetting them in their quest to destroy our “America First” President. There’s no place in the America First GOP for a Pelosi puppet who spends her time doing photo ops with Adam Schiff (one of the most dishonest political hacks in our country) and fist bumping Joe Biden. As the Radical Left pillages our economy and deconstructs the country we love, Liz Cheney has chosen to join them rather than fight back. Let’s send a message to Liz today that her time in Congress is coming to an end. Maybe Liz didn’t get the memo, but gone are the days of career politicians cozying up to DC and Northern Virginia elitists at the expense of the hardworking citizens who made this country great. President Trump endorsed my campaign because he knows I am a real America First Conservative Republican. I am unapologetically pro-life. I will protect your second amendment. I am strong on borders. I support the Wall. And I will never vote to raise your taxes. Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | | [Unsubscribe]() Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Why I voted to censure Paul Gosar
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38943617/317721170/601477077?refcode=20211123_f_3_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNiMGNiMS1hZjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q5TqVeYh780SZxwtAQGUAlpwPXjtidWr7xKqvVHF8Rc=)
---

Friend,

Actions matter. They don’t exist in a void. They can incite insurrection at the U.S. Capitol or convince people to reject a life saving vaccine.

That’s why I was so appalled to see Rep. Paul Gosar’s promotion of violence against a colleague. This kind of hateful action has no place in Congress or in our society, and it’s why I voted to censure Paul Gosar.

**[I’ll always fight to stand up for what’s right, and that’s what I’ll do as Governor. Will you pitch in today to help me restore truth and accountability to Tallahassee?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38943618/317721171/601477077?refcode=20211123_f_3_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNiMGNiMS1hZjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q5TqVeYh780SZxwtAQGUAlpwPXjtidWr7xKqvVHF8Rc=)**

Paul Gosar’s actions illustrate everything people hate about partisan politics. He doesn’t care what lies he spouts or violence he might encourage; it’s all red meat for his far-right base.

It’s not unlike what Gov. Ron DeSantis is doing in the Sunshine State. He’s focused on building a national platform and profile so he can potentially run for president in 2024.

Actions matter, and Floridians deserve someone who will build a Florida for All, not just a platform for their own political agenda.

**[So, if you can, donate whatever amount you can to my campaign, to help us lay the groundwork this year to defeat Gov. DeSantis next year. It’s time for a governor who’ll put Florida first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38943619/317721172/601477077?refcode=20211123_f_3_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNiMGNiMS1hZjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q5TqVeYh780SZxwtAQGUAlpwPXjtidWr7xKqvVHF8Rc=)**

Thanks so much and God bless,
Charlie

body:
---
| | Team — Ron Johnson can’t keep a promise.

He promised to protect Wisconsinites, and instead he’s peddling lies about COVID-19 vaccine safety.

He promised to uphold our democracy, and instead he’s helped spread the Big Lie that voter fraud may have contributed to Joe Biden’s false victory.

And now, Ron is breaking another promise — that he would only serve two terms.

Upon being asked if he’d run for a third term in the US Senate, Ron told Fox News: “If you’re in a position to try and help things, would you walk away?”

Ron Johnson: It's time to walk away. Wisconsinites need new, bold leadership ready to go to bat for working families. That’s why Tom is running for US Senate.

[Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters, not Ron Johnson’s special interests. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Big Vote Coming on Vax Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn’t whine or fidget. They acte
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| |
---
Fellow Patriot:

When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn’t whine or fidget. They acted:

▶︎ Within hours of the mandate’s announcement, Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) had drafted a letter telling Senate leadership that he would _**not vote for any government spending bills that funded the vaccine mandate.**_

▶︎ By the time Sen. Braun’s letter was released, a dozen other members had signed on.

▶︎ As more Republicans in the House and the Senate joined the defund fight, _**all 50 Senate Republicans**_ took the next step and triggered a process to force a December vote in the House and Senate to rescind Biden’s vaccine order. Now _**all Democrats**_ will have to go on record defending Biden’s un-American policy – or the mandate will be toast.

This is how you win a fight in Washington. One punch... then another... then another. Unlike the Left, conservatives can’t wait for the media or Hollywood or Big Tech to fight for us. We have to do it ourselves.

That can be daunting in a city hostile to conservative values. But as you know, and as Senate Conservatives Fund has been arguing for years, **COURAGE COUNTS**.

**[Please help us elect more courageous conservatives!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z207866lieecd1mema03885l2kmks4jfjod9dic8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctg66or2chh2bs)**

When a federal appeals court ordered Biden to halt his vaccine mandate pending further litigation, the White House initially and smugly told federal agencies to ignore the court.

But Senate conservatives didn’t back down. And as more Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate!

Thanks to conservative leadership, for now, **THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE MANDATE**.

None of this would be happening if Senate conservatives answered Biden’s assault on our freedoms with empty tweets and press releases. **They are SENATORS, not just pundits.** And they acted like it!

On this defining vaccine mandate issue, conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning.

**[We need your help to support conservative leadership in the Senate so please make a contribution to SCF today!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z97nms2v845r1nu1n7abujqvnhaol62c3ukqfmf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctg66or2chh2bs)**

SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate. And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready to join the fight.

_The defunding vote is coming soon._

**[Please help us push the Senate to join conservatives in stopping Biden's vaccine mandate.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh1ec89q57sl52s2br2biibo4o1r5cl3uih5013o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctg66or2chh2bs)**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH**
**COUNTDOWN**
|
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: The Media Attacks are Escalating
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I need your help! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a4456c3d09&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the America-First, Trump-endorsed, election integrity patriot running for Secretary of State in Arizona.

**[I am writing you today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2159c13583&e=44b8c466b0) because we cannot be lulled into a false sense of security because of our win in Virginia. If the results in New Jersey showed us anything, we know this.**

**The Democrats do not sleep. They are trying everything they can to undermine our elections while proud Patriots stay quiet.**

You can always tell this by what the media is doing. They are the propaganda arm of the Democrat party, the shadow puppets of the Radical Left.

**And the media attacks are escalating on myself, on my campaign, and on election integrity in general. They do this because they are scared of the progress we are making.**

Here are some of the attacks just in the last week:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a8b4b1c3ca&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| From _AZ Central:_

_He helped spread Trump’s discredited claims of election fraud from its earliest days and pressed repeatedly for a legislative hearing on irregularities cited by Giuliani. _

_With the ballot review in Maricopa County complete, Finchem called for expanded action. “We need to Audit Pima County,” he wrote on Twitter. He baselessly claimed 35,000 votes were “in question from multiple sources & I want answers.”_

_Trump rewarded Finchem’s loyalty with his coveted endorsement in a race that had scarcely started._

_“Mark was willing to say what few others had the courage to say,” Trump said in his announcement._
---
|
---
| Also from _AZ Central:_

_State Rep. Mark Finchem, R-Oro Valley, hosted the meeting, which Trump joined by phone. It seemed to bestow newfound importance on a man once ridiculed for wearing a “cowboy costume” at the Legislature._

_Finchem ... became one of the leading proponents of an “audit” of the election results. He pressed for a special legislative session to overturn the results and award the state’s electors to Trump. _

_As much as he wanted to, Finchem did not preside over an official legislative hearing. Bowers refused to authorize it despite Finchem’s repeated requests to hold one at the House of Representatives._
---
|
---
| And from _ABC News:_
_Retired TV news anchor Kari Lake, now a frontrunner in the GOP gubernatorial primary, has said over the course of her campaign that if she were governor last November, she would not have certified the election. State Rep. Mark Finchem, who was at the insurrection on Jan. 6 and defended the actions of those who stormed the Capitol, is now pursuing a run for the state's chief elections official and would have oversight over the state's elections._
Our opponents are spending inordinate amounts of time and money trying to attack me and election integrity. They are launching smear campaigns across countless media outlets on an almost daily basis.

**Folks, the media only does this when they are scared. _Let’s give them something to be scared of. [Let’s show them that Election Integrity Patriots have the momentum and WILL win in 2022!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=72e2409740&e=44b8c466b0)_**

We’re heading into the holidays and I know that you, like myself, are thinking of family and cheer this time of the year, counting our blessings, and thanking God for our many gifts.

**But make no mistake, now is not a time to get too comfortable. The Radical Left and those that stole the election from us still walk free from the due punishment they deserve. And they are busy planning how to steal the next elections.**

It is critical this does not happen. To do this, we need to spread the word of Election Integrity, apply pressure on Mark Brnovich to throw the perpetrators of Election Fraud in jail, and we need to Audit Pima County. [And we can only do this with your support.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8c170b4cc6&e=44b8c466b0)

[Please make a generous donation today to help our campaign protect Arizona’s elections, America’s elections, and secure America’s future by protecting the sanctity of our elections!

Please donate as much as you can today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ba314fb398&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=609f01a248&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5d84ad0e44&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c977cba21d&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=85a5327a76) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=85a5327a76).

Finchem ... became one of the leading proponents of an “audit” of the election results. He pressed for a special legislative session to overturn the results and award the state’s electors to Trump. As much as he wanted to, Finchem did not preside over an official legislative hearing. Bowers refused to authorize it despite Finchem’s repeated requests to hold one at the House of Representatives. | | And from ABC News: Retired TV news anchor Kari Lake, now a frontrunner in the GOP gubernatorial primary, has said over the course of her campaign that if she were governor last November, she would not have certified the election. State Rep. Mark Finchem, who was at the insurrection on Jan. 6 and defended the actions of those who stormed the Capitol, is now pursuing a run for the state's chief elections official and would have oversight over the state's elections. Our opponents are spending inordinate amounts of time and money trying to attack me and election integrity. They are launching smear campaigns across countless media outlets on an almost daily basis. Folks, the media only does this when they are scared. Let’s give them something to be scared of. We’re heading into the holidays and I know that you, like myself, are thinking of family and cheer this time of the year, counting our blessings, and thanking God for our many gifts. But make no mistake, now is not a time to get too comfortable. The Radical Left and those that stole the election from us still walk free from the due punishment they deserve. And they are busy planning how to steal the next elections. It is critical this does not happen. To do this, we need to spread the word of Election Integrity, apply pressure on Mark Brnovich to throw the perpetrators of Election Fraud in jail, and we need to Audit Pima County. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Will you please split a contribution between three food banks — in Los Angeles, Sacramento and San Francisco — to help feed the hungry this Thanksgiving?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
The holiday season is the busiest time of the year for these organizations, so your contribution right now will make a big difference
#

I'm writing today with a slightly different request than usual.
With just a few days until Thanksgiving, we’re running a fundraiser for three food banks that serve Californians facing food insecurity.
For those of us who are able to donate, supporting these food banks is one way we can make a big impact in the lives of people in need.
And the holiday season is the busiest time of the year for these organizations, so your contribution right now will make a big difference as they prepare for Thanksgiving and the entire holiday season.
[**Will you please split a contribution between three food banks — in Los Angeles, Sacramento and San Francisco — to help feed the hungry this Thanksgiving? 100% of your contribution will go directly to the organizations feeding people in need — none to my campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-thanksgiving?refcode=em211123-1-15&t=1&refcode2=462_159979_0ELTLr&akid=462%2E159979%2E0ELTLr)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-thanksgiving?refcode=em211123-1-15&t=2&refcode2=462_159979_0ELTLr&akid=462%2E159979%2E0ELTLr)**
These three organizations have a long history of feeding Californians who need it most — here’s a little more info on each one:
**The Los Angeles Regional Food Bank** has been operating in the Los Angeles area since 1973 with a simple vision statement: No one goes hungry in Los Angeles Country. Each month, they serve more than 900,000 people.
**Sacramento Food Bank & Family Services** is the largest nonprofit provider of basic human needs in Sacramento County, and in addition to a food bank they also offer educational opportunities and family support services to people in need.
Since 1987, **The SF-Marin Food Bank** has been working to make San Francisco and Marin a community where everyone is able to obtain enough nutritious food — in a dignified manner — to support the health and well-being of themselves and their families.
[**Please split a contribution between these three California food banks working to feed the hungry. Thanksgiving is one of the busiest times of the year for food providers, so your support now makes a big difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-thanksgiving?refcode=em211123-1-15&t=3&refcode2=462_159979_0ELTLr&akid=462%2E159979%2E0ELTLr)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-thanksgiving?refcode=em211123-1-15&t=4&refcode2=462_159979_0ELTLr&akid=462%2E159979%2E0ELTLr)**
Thank you, and have a happy Thanksgiving!
Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=462%2E159979%2E0ELTLr)

body:
They want to end your right to defend yourself. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=2c7f4e895bd04690939d7de6e032ec26&_e=xWrZ1wae1xp1kzGzcIsiUjBq3vcimKy9NdTUriP_Kpd8acCNgKlWcBDcRvTG_IOOEhAzSvzH5Qzrf159k11Lo6f0XXvIpHX9LXH6XozdWBpFzuwiC2HjLHmzUh2tx0c4XY8_w6zZ5RyfqAESgBZh15jjHGpVWqG9FrmxbweuStugQdqO_nssC9IUU4AAH9uNOKtAb59cpsYilh-c7TMK39DYwgrWKGjgRkZOA1dcaLMDRkuisF93RCyJYJbFctwJFECYi4JLGU1pvS6t9SPs-Bh38cVcFZB6mORBxrW7JR-eiE6uup0CncKyn0FCtWYWf36ZZLJOVoWss0ksgEI7jCCKmO8-AuHtJ1dIqvUCMA1wlSAbjYA9NlfP9I0iCYwTad7X-eX-Pl-3x83U29im-akVikYT1G4j4aXh8ndt4YO1SC6NwlN_o8S_iNEtJM6qu9bcBDoMa60ewjRZ0rFKwg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I'm ecstatic to see Kyle Rittenhouse found NOT GUILTY. He was vindicated at last in court.

While so many leaders were cowering to the BLM mob, Kyle Rittenhouse tried to help. **He tried to protect the businesses of Kenosha, WI, and he gave medical aid to the people rioting.**

That's not just my opinion. **_That's on video. You can see that with your own eyes._** The fact that Kyle was ever on trial is a complete miscarriage of justice. He was defending himself, and I'm glad that the jury saw the truth.

The Leftist media called Kyle a domestic terrorist for fighting back when he was under attack. They tried to intimidate the jurors from day one. And they made up a crime that fit their narrative.

**All of this was done with the express intent of denying Kyle a fair trial and destroying his life for defending himself from the violent mob progressives deliberately whipped up and supported in Kenosha.**

[** ****STAND UP AND DEFEND YOURSELF ➞ **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=2c7f4e895bd04690939d7de6e032ec26&_e=xWrZ1wae1xp1kzGzcIsiUjBq3vcimKy9NdTUriP_Kpd8acCNgKlWcBDcRvTG_IOOEhAzSvzH5Qzrf159k11Lo6f0XXvIpHX9LXH6XozdWBpFzuwiC2HjLHmzUh2tx0c4XY8_w6zZ5RyfqAESgBZh15jjHGpVWqG9FrmxbweuStugQdqO_nssC9IUU4AAH9uNOKtAb59cpsYilh-c7TMK39DYwgrWKGjgRkZOA1dcaLNioWshl4qhfyPRi5niA99tElRy8YNU5sgaEY9qW3WGcu4xfv_N_h1Ec87UXDXb1-lQtLmsRCHhrMoqpaoeKJLML0rtNPtdHcah_F-gChG0YDMeaTuVHurxyyHTL4UaPHunzVUzskVIQBMwYBoJx0U1qqtlPPu5Q9Ibz9XFiuXVo4BXOh_BUAF99C8m0L_RBTfm7XUCqZc0bLw0aGWD9ybfYREeGd-PJPoBGOoCal5cyQ%3D%3D)
Fellow Conservative, the reason the Left wanted to demonize Kyle Rittenhouse is the same reason they support gun confiscation: **They want to end your right to defend yourself.**

**If you can't defend yourself, you'll have to depend on the government.**

We may have won this round, but the Left won't stop until they label everyone who dares to protect themselves and their family a domestic terrorist.

Wisconsin is already preparing for riots regarding the verdict. We cannot allow the Left to continue encouraging destructive riots and prevent people from defending themselves and their property.

In 2022 we need to elect Republicans who will stand up for our right to defend ourselves, and when I make it to Washington, D.C. I plan to do just that. [**Can you help me make it to the Senate in 2022 by making a $2 donation to my campaign today?**](f)

[** ****STAND UP AND DEFEND YOURSELF ➞ **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=2c7f4e895bd04690939d7de6e032ec26&_e=xWrZ1wae1xp1kzGzcIsiUjBq3vcimKy9NdTUriP_Kpd8acCNgKlWcBDcRvTG_IOOEhAzSvzH5Qzrf159k11Lo6f0XXvIpHX9LXH6XozdWBpFzuwiC2HjLHmzUh2tx0c4XY8_w6zZ5RyfqAESgBZh15jjHGpVWqG9FrmxbweuStugQdqO_nssC9IUU4AAH9uNOKtAb59cpsYilh-c7TMK39DYwgrWKGjgRkZOA1dcaLPhWrXSOLRdPgxBkEbrgFI1yaYoEpfa3avCy-UDSUbdWRVxvE7yYW75G6k_Dh906OHHVG0R1q0mga9cESSaS13uSWLvPSiBgT0o78MGxXK-sZZdgx3Yq6f5BMX7KhIUgs5oRgtctqjJYvBxSxM8XzCFzq1XRJOy1ic-_7BDMtVCjutqvUcuUZ0JkHRay9Ii6eGEid4H5OpCncimQCO4Lp32FMuXb9wasbVyXMAB2bHw9w%3D%3D)

With you in the fight,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Thank you for being a top supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Because you’re one of our top supporters, we need your help! Peter, WOW! The past few weeks of our campaign have been a whirlwind. We’ve been overwhelmed with the amount of support we’ve received and we’re excited and energized by your encouragement and your prayers. We’re working our way through hundreds of emails and it’s important to me that every email receives a personal response so if you haven’t heard back from me or a member of our team yet, we promise you’ll be getting a response very soon and we thank you for your patience! Many of you have donated to our campaign already and many have signed up to volunteer.**I want to personally thank each of you for taking the time to read our emails and for supporting our campaign however you are able to.****THANK YOU!** As we continue to ramp up our operation, we are going to need hundreds of volunteers knocking on doors and making phone calls all across the state, but **at this point, our goal is to collect the required petition signatures to qualify for the primary election ballot. ** All statewide Republicans are required to collect at least 1,503 valid signatures from registered Republicans throughout the state. We know we have to at least double that number just to be safe so we’re going to need all hands on deck! You can download our petition on our website under the “Supporter Engagement Page” tab or by clicking HERE: [**Download Mark’s Petition**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=32cb49aa586e48d9bf362876dae3f663&_e=Jj2wuD-3LstZ-cI-M4ZEtLjLkn3m0ZHbs_0SjavhSGx2lEHOd-QCXR5gmbp6rmQ5H61fcKibQxkJHQsgC-mRPe8pw22FoMMbLm7-f-kRdZihbRKbRX8Q1xMVadN88ExaPLuhpDWrPX22xatSss_9O0LDX6BByTepv8UXdX4d6U-yErzI4fwuZ4KjuwqgjOFtYNpHUAmYK_0h_yh1V4G3N6XJ4hL2xtef2kW1AAspZBUYxV2ZRfmybbFF5cT2IEDQEMBbmVXfJz6rz1B5Sveht2hsq2Pner1eVu00l1AgYiIoFNc5OZUP-GQrPRJrRK8_l0EMdCQ3mL6EQ5jfwznDE231pDwMLFqtqHmA1F29rjc%3D) So many of you have sent emails, texts and called asking how you can get involved. This is the first of many ways you can help us on our campaign and I can’t stress how important it is that we do this together. **New Mexico is ready for new leadership and new direction and****the people of our state are ready to fight to get our freedom back!** New Mexicans are coming on board with our campaign because it’s time we have a leader who will ensure the government and the governor know their place in our democracy. New Mexicans are ready for a governor who will listen as opposed to wagging fingers and dictating mandates, a governor who will empower and encourage parents to decide what’s best for their kids, and a governor who will support our law enforcement, tackle crime head-on, and work to secure our borders. We MUST also ensure New Mexicans have faith in our election system, require voters to show an ID, and secure every ballot. Thank you for coming alongside me to fight this good fight for the future of New Mexico. Your time, support, contributions and prayers mean the world to me. [**Help Mark Make the Ballot**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=32cb49aa586e48d9bf362876dae3f663&_e=Jj2wuD-3LstZ-cI-M4ZEtLjLkn3m0ZHbs_0SjavhSGx2lEHOd-QCXR5gmbp6rmQ5H61fcKibQxkJHQsgC-mRPe8pw22FoMMbLm7-f-kRdZihbRKbRX8Q1xMVadN88ExaPLuhpDWrPX22xatSss_9O0p875rklWIbwoXU56URTOytugqSHOztCRTE34bxB1U_GscCI-1IORYApLI9-DMXYURt4jNeMMlD2aK158U2JMkaD_KhlZhCsiZ34OtJnxQIKpocP9ZPuGuJQChQv2L2PfkbxtjeF92xBQneP_VWpP29y5_O6M4bw0aGrUVJDWhY0gkl5qwxKIOUq9W7XMT4l2XNS5uAouHL_ETzYefnw7s%3D) Thank you! Mark | |
---
|
---
