name: Val Demings, U.S. Senate Candidate
subject: Never tire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm running for United States Senate because I will never tire of standing up for what I believe is right. Never tire of serving Florida. Never tire of doing good.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38944423/317724932/-1674755858?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1796-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJmNTZjMy1iMTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qqmq9K7BdjgN8gkjkoYMe_cSpNKpdt3QchV_xMu1H0Y=)
---
"Never tire of doing good, Val."

That's what my mother told me from a young age, friend. She was a maid, and my father was a janitor. When I was growing up as a poor Black girl in the South, my mother knew I had to have faith in both progress and opportunity – and to never grow tired of fighting for it.

_Never tire._

They're the words I heard every day of my 27 years on the Orlando police force. The words I heard upon becoming the first Black woman to serve as chief. The words I hear while serving in Congress.

And they are words that I hold close to my heart today, as I tell you this: **I'm running for U.S. Senate because I will never tire of standing up for what I believe is right. Never tire of serving Florida. Never tire of doing good. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38944424/317724933/-1674755858?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1796-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJmNTZjMy1iMTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qqmq9K7BdjgN8gkjkoYMe_cSpNKpdt3QchV_xMu1H0Y=)
But to win, I need you. I need every last bit of grassroots support. I need a movement that will flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority.
[**Will you take a moment to make a contribution to help us win in Florida and defeat Marco Rubio? Floridians should have real leadership in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38944425/317724934/-1674755858?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1796-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJmNTZjMy1iMTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qqmq9K7BdjgN8gkjkoYMe_cSpNKpdt3QchV_xMu1H0Y=)
My mother also taught me this: When someone gives you an opportunity to do something big – do not disappoint them. I'm ready for this moment. Let's win this together.
Congresswoman Val Demings

P.S. CNN is already calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip.**_Just 10,033 votes_ decided the last Senate race in the Sunshine State: [Can you chip in $5 now to make sure we can hit the ground running to win in Florida and defeat Marco Rubio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38944426/317724935/-1674755858?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1796-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJmNTZjMy1iMTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qqmq9K7BdjgN8gkjkoYMe_cSpNKpdt3QchV_xMu1H0Y=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38944427/317724936/-1674755858?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1796-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzJmNTZjMy1iMTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qqmq9K7BdjgN8gkjkoYMe_cSpNKpdt3QchV_xMu1H0Y=)

| Peter,

We know you’re probably busy getting ready for Thanksgiving and we want to be respectful of your time, so we’ll make this quick.

We are so grateful for everything this team has done to fuel our campaign to elect John as Maryland’s first Black governor and the nation’s first Afro-Latino governor, but just yesterday, Donald Trump decided to insert himself in this race ... uninvited.

As I’m sure you know, John is a bold progressive committed to building a more equitable future where everyone has a fair shot at success — not just those at the top. But building that future will take all of us, and John is counting on supporters like you – people who believe in the progressive momentum we’re building here in Maryland – to ensure that we have the resources to speak out against the spread of Republican extremism.

[_**With one week to go before our November fundraising deadline, will you please consider contributing to our efforts today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38944597/317725825/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211123-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=dbff412f-b34c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZmNDEyZi1iMzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EyX88k9Sy2pTqSkVNbuCZFGu7eg8Cg3kZZXB9ehIuZU=)

clean_body: We are so grateful for everything this team has done to fuel our campaign to elect John as Maryland’s first Black governor. | = | Peter, We know you’re probably busy getting ready for Thanksgiving and we want to be respectful of your time, so we’ll make this quick. We are so grateful for everything this team has done to fuel our campaign to elect John as Maryland’s first Black governor and the nation’s first Afro-Latino governor, but just yesterday, Donald Trump decided to insert himself in this race ... uninvited. As I’m sure you know, John is a bold progressive committed to building a more equitable future where everyone has a fair shot at success — not just those at the top. But building that future will take all of us, and John is counting on supporters like you – people who believe in the progressive momentum we’re building here in Maryland – to ensure that we have the resources to speak out against the spread of Republican extremism. = | = Your support confirms we can build a brighter future here in Maryland. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Your support makes such a difference and we are so grateful. \- Team King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . name: Roger Stone
subject: A real emergency
body:
| |
---
**ROGER STONE**
Ft. Lauderdale, Florida

---
| **EMERGENCY** Dear friend, Yesterday the bogus, Trump-hating House Democrat committee investigating the events of January 6 sent me a subpoena for testimony and records regarding their latest politically motivated witch hunt. **Here we go again!** **Needless to say, the subpoena above was released to the media to create a fake news media feeding frenzy long before it was received or even seen by my lawyer!** Haven't my wife and I suffered enough at the hands of liars and con-men like Adam Schiff, Jerry Nadler and Chinese spy-compromised Eric Swallwell? **I was not at the Ellipse or the Capitol on January 6th and know nothing about any illegal activity on that day. Any political activity I engaged in was legal and Constitutionally protected by free speech rights and right to free assembly.** It's bad enough that my wife, who is battling stage 4 cancer, and I are already being harassed in six remaining groundless harassment politically motivated civil suits filed by crack-pots, hysterical Trump haters, George Soros funded front groups and the corrupt Biden Justice Department. Between the two years of hell we were put through, being framed and extorted to bear false witness against President Trump in the Mueller witch hunt - and being censored, deplatformed and canceled on the internet, **we are battered, exhausted and essentially bankrupted. Only by the grace of God and the intercession of Jesus Christ was I pardoned and delivered from my persecutors when pardoned by President Trump.** Now I have to go out and retain lawyers to fight this latest vile attack on me and my family. I just can't do it alone. **I will never stop fighting but I need your immediate help once again.** The coffers at the [Stone Defense Fund](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppko2maok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=c896ee2af21b477b8d83ed6c68292519) are virtually empty, having been through a two year ordeal and **more recently won dismissal of 11 harassment civil law-suits against us!** Please send an EMERGENCY [contribution](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppko2maok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=da2f8efda520497d831f734c0375d27a) to my legal defense fund so I can stand up to these bullies who seek to smear, frame and destroy me once again. I will fight, and by the Grace of God, will win again- but I cannot do it without your help. GOD BLESS YOU. Roger Stone PS- If you are more comfortable mailing a check than utilizing a credit card or PayPal to make a contribution to the [StoneDefenseFund.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppko2maok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=f11a46fa96184f19a7431e2c71d6145f) please make your check payable to "**Stone Defense Fund** " and mail it to _1007 N Federal Highway #405, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304_. God Bless You.
---

[One-Click Unsubscribe](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsubscribe/?sid=00ab0c0ppko2maok2o2wkpm) [Report Spam](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsolicited/?sid=00ab0c0ppko2maok2o2wkpm) [Web Version](https://www.directiq13.com/IO/viewer3.aspx?sid=00ab0c0ppko2maok2o2wkpm)
---

name: Donna Imam
subject: Here’s how we stop gerrymandering in Texas
body:
With attorneys general playing an increasingly important role in legal battles, 2022 is a huge opportunity to put a stop to gerrymandering. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945034/317727251/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFlMThkZC1iNTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_FDSWNnQ6bJLqrJnavyIcmnOCfFwNjMjByhKNBmSvm4=)
Friend,

**The Texas GOP primary for Attorney General is being contested by several GOP candidates.** Why? Because our indicted AG barely won his election with 50.6% of the vote in 2018. In Texas you must get over 50% to win and Ken Paxton is vulnerable. That’s a huge opportunity for Democrats.

Louie Gohmert is the latest candidate to jump into this race. He's one of the most extreme, right-wing members of Congress who suggested that Jan 6th was a set-up by Democrats.

**With attorneys general playing an increasingly important role in legal battles following redistricting, who we elect to this statewide office can have a significant impact in stopping gerrymandering. That’s why winning statewide races is the only way to take back Texas.**

Last year, our campaign went to over 50,000 doors with our grassroots operation to boost turnout to record heights. If we're going to defeat the GOP, we’ll need to duplicate that effort and get out the vote here in Austin, Texas -- we can deliver tens of thousands of votes for Democrats running statewide if we get out the vote in the bluest city in Texas.

[**Will you chip in $5, $15, or even $35 today toward our November end-of-month goal? With just a week until the end of the month, we need to pick up the pace. name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: re: giving thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We'd both really like to say thank you.
#
Derek,
[**_If you'd be willing to chip in any amount at all before the end of this month, would it be okay if John + I gave you a phone call?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37659?refcode=em20211123-3579&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3579%2E434096%2Ev1ZfGc)__
**We'd both really like to say _thank you._ ❤️**
There is SO much to be grateful for when it comes to this team. From online donations to seeing so many yard signs as John and I campaign across PA. I mean, just *look* at this dreamy yard:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37659?refcode=em20211123-3579&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3579%2E434096%2Ev1ZfGc)
It honestly never gets old for us — it's an absolute honor that you would put our name on your yard. 😭
Derek, with Thanksgiving coming up in just a couple days, John and I want to share how deeply grateful we are to have you on this team — and how humbled we are by your support in this race.
**That's why we'd *love* to give you a quick phone call to say thank you.**
[**_John and I are planning on personally calling a few grassroots donors who chip in before this month's fundraising deadline to say thank you. Will you chip in $5 or anything you're able to support our campaign before the holiday? We'd be so grateful for your support._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37659?refcode=em20211123-3579&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3579%2E434096%2Ev1ZfGc)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37659?refcode=em20211123-3579&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3579%2E434096%2Ev1ZfGc)**
With love,
Gisele
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Second Lady of Pennsylvania (SLOP)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211123-3579-footer&t=23&refcode2=3579_434096_v1ZfGc&akid=3579%2E434096%2Ev1ZfGc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3579%2E434096%2Ev1ZfGc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3579%2E434096%2Ev1ZfGc)

---
Your contribution will be split between Raphael Warnock and the DSCC to keep Georgia and the Senate blue.
Friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to support our people-powered campaign to keep Georgia blue and help Democrats hold the Senate. **But first, I want to explain why your support is so important -- and what could happen without it.**

My Senate seat is one of Republicans’ biggest targets, and my opponent already has the full support of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their dark-money allies. **_And with CNN ranking mine as the most likely Democratic seat to flip, we’re depending on this grassroots team more than ever._**

Friend, next year’s election will be an uphill battle, but throughout my life, nothing has come without a struggle.

I grew up in public housing in Savannah, Georgia, but through hard work and determination I was the first in my family to graduate college. Eventually I was blessed to serve as the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, in Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s pulpit.

Then, I faced one of my biggest challenges yet when I ran for Senate. From the very beginning of my campaign, Republicans singled me out with the most outrageous attacks imaginable. But we fought hard, and with the help of this grassroots team, I became the first-ever Black Senator from Georgia and helped flip the Senate.

Now, I’m facing another tough fight, and unfortunately at this critical moment, we're about to fall short of our daily fundraising goal. In a race this close, falling short simply isn’t an option. **Failing to keep pace for even a second could mean handing Georgia's seat -- and with it, the Senate majority -- right back to Mitch McConnell.**

Friend, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to support our people-powered campaign to keep Georgia blue and help Democrats hold the Senate. But first, I want to explain why your support is so important -- and what could happen without it. My Senate seat is one of Republicans’ biggest targets, and my opponent already has the full support of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their dark-money allies. And with CNN ranking mine as the most likely Democratic seat to flip, we’re depending on this grassroots team more than ever. Friend, next year’s election will be an uphill battle, but throughout my life, nothing has come without a struggle. I grew up in public housing in Savannah, Georgia, but through hard work and determination I was the first in my family to graduate college. Eventually I was blessed to serve as the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, in Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s pulpit. Then, I faced one of my biggest challenges yet when I ran for Senate. name: Charles Booker
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

I know what it’s like to struggle,
Peter.

I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members to gun
violence. I am still paying off my student loans.

I know I’m not alone in these struggles. My story is the story of millions
of Kentuckians who are sick and tired of politicians who continue to
ignore us.

That’s why I’m running to defeat Rand Paul. Together, we’re spreading our
message for bold, transformative change so we can finally help regular
people.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13249?refcode=em20211123-1258&t=1001&akid=1258%2E346206%2E36tLKt ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help power our
fight as we build the biggest grassroots voter outreach program Kentucky
has ever seen?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13249?refcode=em20211123-1258&t=1002&akid=1258%2E346206%2E36tLKt ]Charles Booker supporters holding up Booker for Kentucky signs

Every day, I hear stories just like my own, of folks struggling to make
ends meet.

Here’s a story one of our supporters recently shared:

“I started supporting Charles Booker for a U.S. Senate seat last year when
I observed how much he loved and served his community in Louisville, where
he has been a lifelong resident. His candidacy became more personal to me,
though, when he started speaking out on social media about financial
struggle throughout his life. Having survived homelessness, rationing
insulin for Type 1 Diabetes, and having to live paycheck-to-paycheck, I
knew that he understood the struggles of many Americans. On August 25th
this summer, he posted the tweet shown in this post, and reading it made
me cry. I cried because I had felt shame for living paycheck-to-paycheck
most of my adult life, but here was a candidate who knew what it was like
and was committed to helping people like me.”

Your stories — our stories — are what drives this campaign to fight for
meaningful change. Together, we have the power to change the future of
Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13249?refcode=em20211123-1258&t=1022&akid=1258%2E346206%2E36tLKt ]But this kind of deep organizing work requires significant resources
and funding. Please chip in $5 or anything you can today so
that we can sustain this work to replace Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13249?refcode=em20211123-1258&t=1023&akid=1258%2E346206%2E36tLKt ]Contribute $5

Thank you,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211123-1258-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1258_346206_36tLKt&akid=1258%2E346206%2E36tLKt

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1258%2E346206%2E36tLKt

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Astorino?=
subject: Cuomo Impeachment Report is Released
body:
Surprise! | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=26018b2148&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

A damning independent impeachment report on Andrew Cuomo was released by the State Assembly yesterday, and it "revealed" that Cuomo sexually abused numerous women, contributed to and covered up the deaths of more than 15,000 seniors in nursing homes, and used taxpayer resources to write a $5.1 million book of lies.

If you're the least bit surprised by any of this, and you're in the media or in elected office, then you are part of the problem.

The truth is, Albany's insular and corrupt culture enabled Cuomo for his 11 years as governor. He was corrupt from the very beginning and I called him out forcefully when I ran against him in 2014. Sadly, many top Republicans looked the other way and supported Cuomo.
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=ae93bfb286&e=3ca66fc65a)
---

[ SUPPORT TEAM ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=fb611d023a&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|
The corrupt Albany status quo needs to go, along with every single politician who enables it -- Democrat or Republican.

As governor, I will upend this status quo, root out the corruption, and bring transformative change to Albany that will benefit the lives of everyday New Yorkers - not just the well-connected insiders.

I'll start by passing a term limits law for all state lawmakers, and by replacing J-COPE with a new ethics commission with true independence and new freedoms to investigate potential wrong-doing wherever it may lead.

And unlike Gov. Hochul who pledges the most transparent administration but then turns around and suspends the state's open meetings laws, I will have the most transparent administration in New York history.

Let’s win this and put New York back on track.

[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=fe8c833402&e=3ca66fc65a)
Rob Astorino
Republican Candidate
Governor of New York

| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=08d6b9725f&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Senators Vow to Defund Vax Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn’t whine or fidget. They acte
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8bhg80ute95ujmuas6ohok3i1r8jnm5cc8ovj7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cti64o36c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onl6kqj4ob563j7ctr269ge4ob46irb1dphepor9pj666p66tr0cur6bcbje5p7eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr665qb6ob7mphmcdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| |
---
Fellow Patriot:

When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn’t whine or fidget. They acted:

▶︎ Within hours of the mandate’s announcement, Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) had drafted a letter telling Senate leadership that he would _**not vote for any government spending bills that funded the vaccine mandate.**_

▶︎ By the time Sen. Braun’s letter was released, a dozen other members had signed on.

▶︎ As more Republicans in the House and the Senate joined the defund fight, _**all 50 Senate Republicans**_ took the next step and triggered a process to force a December vote in the House and Senate to rescind Biden’s vaccine order. Now _**all Democrats**_ will have to go on record defending Biden’s un-American policy – or the mandate will be toast.

This is how you win a fight in Washington. One punch... then another... then another. Unlike the Left, conservatives can’t wait for the media or Hollywood or Big Tech to fight for us. We have to do it ourselves.

That can be daunting in a city hostile to conservative values. But as you know, and as Senate Conservatives Fund has been arguing for years, **COURAGE COUNTS**.

**[Please help us elect more courageous conservatives!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlmupc41t96mqqu83doattoli9tmcgppltegi3kg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cti64o36c5h2bs)**

When a federal appeals court ordered Biden to halt his vaccine mandate pending further litigation, the White House initially and smugly told federal agencies to ignore the court.

But Senate conservatives didn’t back down. And as more Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate!

Thanks to conservative leadership, for now, **THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE MANDATE**.

None of this would be happening if Senate conservatives answered Biden’s assault on our freedoms with empty tweets and press releases. **They are SENATORS, not just pundits.** And they acted like it!

On this defining vaccine mandate issue, conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning.

**[We need your help to support conservative leadership in the Senate so please make a contribution to SCF today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgsg3qe11c3qc5t52eoklbd9fipfe1eqa32kul08_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cti64o36c5h2bs)**

SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate. And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready to join the fight.

_The defunding vote is coming soon._

**[Please help us push the Senate to join conservatives in stopping Biden's vaccine mandate.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zekqi5c11v1m050kp0lfkpdh2rdva0r959rsuem0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cti64o36c5h2bs)**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH**
**COUNTDOWN**
|
---
|
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3jkd14n8ee4ivqq9j5gho2meon6llp2in9172h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cti64o36c5h2bs)
Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. name: Team Duckworth
subject: How Tammy got to where she is today →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Tammy is facing a tough re-election battle and needs your help to stay in the Senate
#
Growing up, this little girl learned that through hard work, she could break barriers and achieve anything she set her mind to.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945779/317733787/1188630671?refcode=pm_em_211123_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTU2ZDVkMS1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF_EtD3TnpOC1QSIVbKwZ9_D7nu027nW26esTwsVbsE=).
So after becoming a commissioned officer in the U.S. Military, she learned to fly a helicopter and became one of the first handful of women to fly combat missions in Operation Iraqi Freedom.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945780/317733788/1188630671?refcode=pm_em_211123_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTU2ZDVkMS1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF_EtD3TnpOC1QSIVbKwZ9_D7nu027nW26esTwsVbsE=)
Then her Blackhawk was shot down over Iraq, costing her both legs and partial use of her right arm. She spent a long, painful year in Walter Reed Hospital undergoing surgeries and intensive physical therapy to relearn how to walk on her new prosthetic legs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945781/317733789/1188630671?refcode=pm_em_211123_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTU2ZDVkMS1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF_EtD3TnpOC1QSIVbKwZ9_D7nu027nW26esTwsVbsE=)
But Tammy is a fighter, so she turned these experiences into an opportunity to become a champion for Veterans. She ran for Congress and eventually won a seat in the U.S. Senate, where she is still breaking barriers. In 2018, she became the first sitting Senator to give birth and bring a baby onto the Senate floor so she could care for her child and do her job at the same time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945782/317733790/1188630671?refcode=pm_em_211123_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTU2ZDVkMS1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF_EtD3TnpOC1QSIVbKwZ9_D7nu027nW26esTwsVbsE=)
Tammy has overcome so many obstacles and continues to be a fierce advocate for our troops, Veterans, and military families in the Senate. But Tammy is facing a tough re-election battle and needs your help to stay in the Senate. So please:
**[Can you split a contribution between Senator Patty Murray and our campaign so we can continue this important work? We are asking for $5 but any amount you can give will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945783/317733791/1188630671?refcode=pm_em_211123_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTU2ZDVkMS1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF_EtD3TnpOC1QSIVbKwZ9_D7nu027nW26esTwsVbsE=)**
Thank you for being on our team.
All our best,
Team Duckworth
** **
** **
** **
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945784/317733792/1188630671?refcode=pm_em_211123_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTU2ZDVkMS1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF_EtD3TnpOC1QSIVbKwZ9_D7nu027nW26esTwsVbsE=)****
** **
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/477f9b80-ba4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/9156d5d1-ba4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTU2ZDVkMS1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF_EtD3TnpOC1QSIVbKwZ9_D7nu027nW26esTwsVbsE=&id=115197541). name: Add Your Name
subject: We’re so close (to firing DeJoy)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Joe Biden just replaced two allies of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy on the postal board.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945786/317733957/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211123-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc0ZWVkZC1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KR2ensrjzIErDSj6qdQ7GydKO3ifxnFz-C1_lQZddI=)
---
| | | **Trump Megadonor Louis DeJoy in Jeopardy as Postmaster General After Biden Nominates Two New Board Members**

_-The Independent_
---
This is big news, Peter: Joe Biden just replaced two allies of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy on the postal board. It might not seem like much, but it’s the first step in **ousting DeJoy** from his position.

[_**Now we need to keep up the pressure. Will you sign our urgent petition to show your support for firing Postmaster General Louis DeJoy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945787/317733958/274120877?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc0ZWVkZC1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KR2ensrjzIErDSj6qdQ7GydKO3ifxnFz-C1_lQZddI=&emci=0c0329b1-804c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6874eedd-ba4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=30464261)
| [ADD MY NAME! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38945788/317733959/274120877?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc0ZWVkZC1iYTRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KR2ensrjzIErDSj6qdQ7GydKO3ifxnFz-C1_lQZddI=&emci=0c0329b1-804c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6874eedd-ba4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=30464261)
---
DeJoy’s tenure as the head of the USPS has been disastrous — especially for rural communities. **He raised prices, slowed delivery times, and even tried to sabotage the 2020 election by making it harder to vote by mail.**

Replacing DeJoy’s Trump-appointed allies on the USPS Board of Governors is long overdue. Biden’s change will give his appointees a majority on the board, and they have the power to get rid of DeJoy and replace him with someone who can get the USPS back on track and serve our communities effectively.

clean_body: Joe Biden just replaced two allies of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy on the postal board. | = | | | Trump Megadonor Louis DeJoy in Jeopardy as Postmaster General After Biden Nominates Two New Board Members -The Independent This is big news, Peter: Joe Biden just replaced two allies of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy on the postal board. It might not seem like much, but it’s the first step in ousting DeJoy from his position. | DeJoy’s tenure as the head of the USPS has been disastrous — especially for rural communities. He raised prices, slowed delivery times, and even tried to sabotage the 2020 election by making it harder to vote by mail. Replacing DeJoy’s Trump-appointed allies on the USPS Board of Governors is long overdue. Biden’s change will give his appointees a majority on the board, and they have the power to get rid of DeJoy and replace him with someone who can get the USPS back on track and serve our communities effectively. | Thank you, BACKROADS PAC * | | = Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Friends,

Reckless spending, trillion dollar bills, and inflation. I am sure you have heard a lot about these things lately. As we reach the beginning of the holiday season, I want to remind you that the Biden Administration is going to derail all of our goals **_[if we don't act now.](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=7c4b7c47d7754642aeb09dc685fbfdaf&_e=fbeLGHn54gMW-FbTqHmsXdntf5BznZFs4cTYKA3KqZnBOeP9lYDbNzhGl7rKia1fbfIJWVNzO6Y4-ziWb2f7yic98tBiqv8Fh0GrCmTK0K14I_2Qs--efKTYRoYX8_cEqiW3KGIIjOurNkRPMg4RceoJQBgyAFwkyHzsmfzwVVJjAmoPf3tTkAlGnsmn1czt4XEQ3VoCkSdkEsY1wJ3sxsyNQUQLkrh69_yOLjIpxycvmLUpWjII4d2Kipdj0ohgDP4fF8um5ozxRiocKClC9uRm2EcbgU4KRxu8jn5-9FGP8co_xRYULsbdCM4SjmKJJo5BYZB9gDmgEf8JoJ96phQraY-kUzaK1Oc2SB6cDa_qbHH7k0JP7eMHiE0NcRtnfq6PRPZDW-frEtXKWwMXq_-Sw39QqJfaSgedOyZadPYeQyFA0JUAywCpnTVp1Sy_cyN8_fUUboINVBxAew-uIwSKrDC_jDQZcaIFevv7YFq2YdkGvLJKdmL10p4hb-WCTiXivUigOE8eVeess_hY6A%3D%3D)_** | [**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=7c4b7c47d7754642aeb09dc685fbfdaf&_e=fbeLGHn54gMW-FbTqHmsXdntf5BznZFs4cTYKA3KqZnBOeP9lYDbNzhGl7rKia1fbfIJWVNzO6Y4-ziWb2f7yic98tBiqv8Fh0GrCmTK0K14I_2Qs--efKTYRoYX8_cEqiW3KGIIjOurNkRPMg4RceoJQBgyAFwkyHzsmfzwVVJjAmoPf3tTkAlGnsmn1czt4XEQ3VoCkSdkEsY1wJ3sxsyNQUQLkrh69_yOLjIpxycvmLUpWjII4d2Kipdj0ohgDP4fF8um5ozxRiocKClC9uRm2EcbgU4KRxu8jn5-9FGP8co_xRYULsbdCM4SjmKJ_hgYlFWgu7elpHF6BaATiUclwmO4W0JUpIrAHmViJwh6lefpFsr7NsnYxFAQuxHTaicqUN5l_QERGTcUGjTNtBuuOu6GX1RwA-9ywK6g13T1h3T6-wzxdIayN_q5j1qYHCvPf6uEWrB_6uIj_4OrKjM64ITx2R88CFpqxhyqPv3xJdz5H1y9bn2BARabnINIW1wALuYq-7BrP-GpgZl0Tg%3D%3D)

His entire message is "Build Back Better"...but it’s more like build back broke! The plan is ridiculous. He either does not see the impact of his actions or, as I see it, he just does not care. Joe needs to be called out and held accountable. I promise to fight back against reckless spending and speak up for the forgotten people of this country.

We need to put the work in NOW for conservative wins in 2022 and a Republican majority in the Senate again. subject: Prices soar, but Biden wants to spend MORE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Biden-flation’s NOT going to end after Thanksgiving. [](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=6fe09e3131b04994bc8f58b57ee5df59&_e=N0scYvlTRqafiJlimF44IiikO6UU1YZrpYtu9nn7V7_InTEZiIUF1YeMUwQXZMYn09jiRsdBk6lCqu7zUOpD0yabd-e9LHr1E1yrWyBDgJirnj86XaK9S_7SFhnON0M95m5k5FUfbkE1YHaW231VjgVUpmHE7BSwfVEDs4Rdf6IVIeSo03UCXTT3j7CAehyhbmXxyADuUMs74Nt-Ps_jc0PFOGJ_Z9EbGY66TTsrFmjwAev7StJQSkd0qCNTpyP1AhEOuZMDDKbDc0mpXKheXoa8FyClw4BmwB59JdPdT_F9Dvmx0gByW8mQ0hs5tEdP3snaCrPJ1ikH55sFsOrFkm-Hpq36-S0TEvWrJQ8_8QTnrQOdkF6cZVj9tAEuG5CN4Y_UpWVtaUaqTQ5x137KKk97tFrwT6mBF-SSfTwmnb4karxq9ymvIWrzJAH15OMwaGs2CxmkQmUCL6hO9ZyN7aZBZvqTcLQN45ggH_166Wo%3D) Have you seen this, friend? Economic experts EVERYWHERE are predicting that this year’s Thanksgiving will be the MOST EXPENSIVE of ALL TIME. **_But this inflation is NOT going to end after November 25th. _**
Biden’s _terrible_ economic leadership has caused inflation that’s on track to grow with **NO END IN SIGHT**. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Fighting Brandon’s Mandates…from Brandon, FL
body:
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df5ba6fe3ede441f942dd9b4b686cff2&_e=l1Av27PmOOXyNJ4rmpnzcmX49tx26CjVVuy7VM2PWeoqUi4erok62zrddRunlyPFV2nnph_WwMTAOwUyHT6fdaA6FN28xrQWhT7P0e3wdFkRNoyS9f9id9LIxBmvNUIQVpAciEWTrX68idYNsF8LpreV0NVC9fH871YIcMs9BSd4O07syn7BqcTbcdKbixdT1F0UpSMh4NBJl1H9Eu76aTRW2B68v1_uvvnVubvghGK8vTqRoCVOe3qhQA0EaPTtuME-1k7jotg4hQK5-5IysuSI5M9LjriWbifuoRtx3LJXsG6M9VIeAO-6Of4SXH5IxX_mzJ-2L60Tgo0OpTdzvyynYpZfoxP7QEKXD9SiWAnyPua4_TDAr6XssrqgQgT3HoKXnYg9FHWWV69G5KTZ8Q%3D%3D)
Peter --
When the American people don't immediately bend to the whims of Joe Biden, he doesn't get to impose his will through mandates and executive edicts. Biden and Fauci have gone from 15 days to slow the spread to 3 jabs to keep your job.
**Fortunately for all of us, the Constitution - and the State of Florida - are standing in Joe Biden's way.**
I called the Florida Legislature into Special Session to protect people's jobs and personal freedoms. _**And today, I signed four pieces of legislation from the Keep Florida Free agenda to PROTECT FREEDOM in Florida.**_
**[HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT TO PROTECT FREEDOM IN FLORIDA](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df5ba6fe3ede441f942dd9b4b686cff2&_e=l1Av27PmOOXyNJ4rmpnzcmX49tx26CjVVuy7VM2PWeoqUi4erok62zrddRunlyPFV2nnph_WwMTAOwUyHT6fdaA6FN28xrQWhT7P0e3wdFkRNoyS9f9id9LIxBmvNUIQVpAciEWTrX68idYNsF8LpreV0NVC9fH871YIcMs9BSd4O07syn7BqcTbcdKbixdTumto9EwfwWwo8TGQVtkkKFSUl8vj5lm9Ft4CwmJFFvoIE3QkxlxlPHzh2DYR9QGfp2e-oNnWoVPalj8JhgJBJXSNQZVvS2Alj8PtnrjtFrRQxbeev6J5bELhRxamFM9MZ7MnYPM9RTRACXI10l2lJPD8k9I_Br3WJIvbLc3bsyYpLpZtCIeagfIJ3TrHtzIIQkP2GZ5XgIR_KnjHYCLcPw%3D%3D)**
These bills ENSURE that the rights, liberties, and freedoms of all Floridians are protected against the whims of power-hungry politicians and incompetent government bureaucrats with a God complex.
**Signing these bills into law is a victory for:**
✅ Every worker in Florida who can go to sleep tonight knowing they can wake up tomorrow without the dread of having to decide between putting food on the table for their family or getting a jab in the arm.
✅ Every student who was harmed by being forced to wear a mask for hours on end while at school.
✅ Every parent who knows THEY are the ones who should be making medical decisions for their children, NOT the government.
✅ Every Floridian who has been unfairly burdened by the ideological, anti-science agendas of Democrats from local school boards all the way to the White House.
**[HELP ME FIGHT BACK AGAINST JOE BIDEN'S UNCONSTITUTIONAL MANDATES](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df5ba6fe3ede441f942dd9b4b686cff2&_e=l1Av27PmOOXyNJ4rmpnzcmX49tx26CjVVuy7VM2PWeoqUi4erok62zrddRunlyPFV2nnph_WwMTAOwUyHT6fdaA6FN28xrQWhT7P0e3wdFkRNoyS9f9id9LIxBmvNUIQVpAciEWTrX68idYNsF8LpreV0NVC9fH871YIcMs9BSd4O07syn7BqcTbcdKbixdTrVmQ3Xfnul2qAud42Uoxb3nA9Ggv0xF9CRXADhkPVjKLtrgoUob-POVsOYIFm3uUo4VAQhhqb8_g65XayHosT9HqyYcE6E33bi2H7rD4qgXWhhKSIa0UaicHBlaj0Tj3P79K_m76xG0T8pWj_M4YtsH_p4P_2vjGc9VRGlUh2xCcN7CYQqJVGerRf63dL8Oj2ZdwGSbSGvbAPAIuB70ssQ%3D%3D)**
What Joe Biden wants to do is not only unconstitutional, it is flat wrong. Had Florida not stepped in to defend freedom from government overreach, lockdowns, mandates, and business closures, we'd be living in a Faucian dystopia today.
I stepped in Biden and Fauci's way because defending your freedom is the right thing to do. I've been proud to stand next to parents, workers, and students as I fight for freedom.
**Leadership means doing all you can to stand by people. That is what we did today in Florida.**
Peter, the fight for freedom is upon us, but I can assure you I'm just getting started. **[Chip in $100, $50, or $25 to help me continue this uphill battle to protect our freedom and liberty in the great state of Florida.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df5ba6fe3ede441f942dd9b4b686cff2&_e=l1Av27PmOOXyNJ4rmpnzcmX49tx26CjVVuy7VM2PWeoqUi4erok62zrddRunlyPFV2nnph_WwMTAOwUyHT6fdaA6FN28xrQWhT7P0e3wdFkRNoyS9f9id9LIxBmvNUIQVpAciEWTrX68idYNsF8LpreV0NVC9fH871YIcMs9BSd4O07syn7BqcTbcdKbixdT1ul0t8BEq43ux0OKbMC3glYABT7YD_5Hhd3RvFLEwLmrlvbo2LAXVx3KmSHsURnfV4h0hDnbHH_HrOMoUwXGN1LqDQbuxmMZm2M7ZanI5DSojsk0L_rEMf7UwluCDZ9lP_Y5FI6KCN9NsLIY8gVe_obOYVDnlf6JQ7wFaS5UXInS-N1Ja1M8HV7-4BF-N5R2NnsbprOSiaj9TRI00Sd9Ig%3D%3D)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

clean_body: Peter -- When the American people don't immediately bend to the whims of Joe Biden, he doesn't get to impose his will through mandates and executive edicts. Biden and Fauci have gone from 15 days to slow the spread to 3 jabs to keep your job. Fortunately for all of us, the Constitution - and the State of Florida - are standing in Joe Biden's way. I called the Florida Legislature into Special Session to protect people's jobs and personal freedoms. And today, I signed four pieces of legislation from the Keep Florida Free agenda to PROTECT FREEDOM in Florida. These bills ENSURE that the rights, liberties, and freedoms of all Floridians are protected against the whims of power-hungry politicians and incompetent government bureaucrats with a God complex. Signing these bills into law is a victory for: ✅ Every worker in Florida who can go to sleep tonight knowing they can wake up tomorrow without the dread of having to decide between putting food on the table for their family or getting a jab in the arm. ✅ Every student who was harmed by being forced to wear a mask for hours on end while at school. ✅ Every parent who knows THEY are the ones who should be making medical decisions for their children, NOT the government. ✅ Every Floridian who has been unfairly burdened by the ideological, anti-science agendas of Democrats from local school boards all the way to the White House. What Joe Biden wants to do is not only unconstitutional, it is flat wrong. Had Florida not stepped in to defend freedom from government overreach, lockdowns, mandates, and business closures, we'd be living in a Faucian dystopia today. I stepped in Biden and Fauci's way because defending your freedom is the right thing to do. I've been proud to stand next to parents, workers, and students as I fight for freedom. Leadership means doing all you can to stand by people. That is what we did today in Florida. Peter, the fight for freedom is upon us, but I can assure you I'm just getting started. Thank you for your continued support, Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "FIGHT BACK" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 610 S. Boulevard, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Should Postmaster General DeJoy be fired?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,

I have news to report that will likely make you very angry – and you should be: Under Trump donor Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, "the U.S. Postal Service gave its top executives more in bonuses and perks last year than at any point in the past decade."

DeJoy, a former Republican donor, received more than $131,000 in extra income and perks such as memberships to two airline clubs, retirement counseling, and financial planning services beyond his $305,681 official salary.

All the while, Americans across the country – particularly in rural areas – have faced longer mail delivery wait times, INCREASED mail and stamp prices, and decimated services due to DeJoy's slash-and-burn mentality as postmaster general. It is no exaggeration to say, Friend, that the Postal Service is on life support while its leader is raking in hundreds of thousands of dollars.

Postmaster DeJoy has proven time and again he is ill-equipped to manage one of the most treasured public services in our nation. Particularly as millions of Americans are entrusting the USPS for packages around the holidays and even medications, DeJoy must relinquish his post. But in order to move the needle, we need grassroots activists like you to speak out by the thousands. I'm counting on you to add your voice by answering the below poll:

Should Trump donor Postmaster General Louis DeJoy be fired?

Yes
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-usps-1121?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1106-su-nd

No
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-usps-1121?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1106-su-nd

Thank you for taking action.

Dick

Contribute - https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1106-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500

Friend,

With the end of November fast approaching, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in your first contribution of $5, $15, or even $35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38946262/317745387/-209993060?refcode=em-112321-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjQ4ZWZmNi1iZjRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6P7yqxw_302eCctanfYSXT9UWO07wP-AGsj9_6geeo=)** toward my end-of-month deadline. But first, let me share some updates from the team. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop.**1\. Democrats advanced historic investments that will have a tremendous impact on the North State.** The Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework will not only strengthen roads, bridges, and public transit -- the state is dedicating more money for fire suppression, firefighters, and tanker aircraft. We still have a long way to go, but Democrats are stepping up.

**2\. Predictably, my opponent Doug LaMalfa voted against it._All of it._** Even farmers and their advocates are calling these initiatives a historic investment in rural communities. LaMalfa would rather toe the party line (or push unfounded conspiracy theories!)

**3\. We're still waiting for final district lines, but the draft maps from the California Redistricting Commission show we have the chance to speak to the voters Doug has never represented.** We need to educate new voters about the bad votes LaMalfa has taken, which means 2022 is our best shot yet at giving him the boot. The North State may be fed up with LaMalfa, but we need to get the word out to more Democrats, independents, and undecided voters that I'm the viable Democrat taking him on. That takes time and money, which means we can't come up short on any of our fundraising milestones.

**[If you were waiting for the best opportunity to chip in your very first contribution of $5, $15, or even $35, this is it. We need to educate new voters about the bad votes LaMalfa has taken, which means 2022 is our best shot yet at giving him the boot. name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Washington Examiner: States can provide Obamacare relief without repeal
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=077b5f0d92c94a0cb58508f37dc890ca&_e=M8LcdOC1tQhZb-aWMZf8mCpgEgXNSi51VoLxoUu4Erg0FweufiDPDxyyvhcOvH8qoCHy28p9Mxc0DWLmM2v9M1eIOetjf2yQ-0rwJJhPc5Vsilra3mbQcba0AyIeS1B9pEbzYxNmg6cv4RDlDeKn7AzJK2FYj-ei-adoNGKW8sRHcdekA16J4-n7TXayNLUzutOQOA8tiZqaPX2cBdq88rNWOyJ4T5miYMROKvxgysTWpQtBvu3OzpkL4aa1unDvEp8kg4p72w7qSkWX0GskgA%3D%3D) States can provide Obamacare relief without repeal By Bobby Jindal | |
---
The Affordable Care Act shifted power from state insurance commissioners and consumers to the federal government. This has resulted in less affordable care. After falsely promising people they could keep their health plans, President Barack Obama responded to the ensuing political backlash by letting people renew their "grandmothered" plans bought after the ACA was signed but before exchanges opened. Democrats responded to higher premiums by increasing subsidies and removing the upper-income limit, shifting costs to taxpayers.

Still, states can enact laws to provide alternative health benefit coverage. Legislators can provide relief from Obamacare’s onerous regulations without a federal repeal or court case. While Democrats pointed to these mandates as generous, many complained about having to pay higher premiums for coverage they did not want. Young men and older women criticized higher premiums for maternity benefits they did not need, for example...

While so many leaders were cowering to the BLM mob, Kyle Rittenhouse tried to help. **He tried to protect the businesses of Kenosha, WI, and he gave medical aid to the people rioting.**

That's not just my opinion. **_That's on video. You can see that with your own eyes._** The fact that Kyle was ever on trial is a complete miscarriage of justice. He was defending himself, and I'm glad that the jury saw the truth.

The Leftist media called Kyle a domestic terrorist for fighting back when he was under attack. They tried to intimidate the jurors from day one. And they made up a crime that fit their narrative.

**All of this was done with the express intent of denying Kyle a fair trial and destroying his life for defending himself from the violent mob progressives deliberately whipped up and supported in Kenosha.**

Fellow Conservative, the reason the Left wanted to demonize Kyle Rittenhouse is the same reason they support gun confiscation: **They want to end your right to defend yourself.**

**If you can't defend yourself, you'll have to depend on the government.**

We may have won this round, but the Left won't stop until they label everyone who dares to protect themselves and their family a domestic terrorist.

Wisconsin is already preparing for riots regarding the verdict. We cannot allow the Left to continue encouraging destructive riots and prevent people from defending themselves and their property.

In 2022 we need to elect Republicans who will stand up for our right to defend ourselves, and when I make it to Washington, D.C. I plan to do just that. [**Can you help me make it to the Senate in 2022 by making a $2 donation to my campaign today?**](f)

Friend, Did you catch the letter to the editor from one of our Republican neighbors published in _The Post Star_ last month? Here are the highlights:
* “My concern is that Elise Stefanik has moved so far to the right that she has lost sight of the middle, where the solutions are. _She is an obstruction, not an effective legislator**...I’m not paying her to be a partisan hack.**_ ”
* “The congresswoman also clearly advocates for justice to be served on Andrew Cuomo, **_but no mention of similar treatment of those who instigated and carried out the insurrection on Jan. 6_**. I guess those were her people.”
* “ _We really should consider filling that congressional seat with someone who can put the district before the politics._ ”

Bridie Farrell is the candidate who will put our district before politics. She grew up in a family of independents right here in the North Country. Bridie is the _only_ Democratic candidate in the race with experience working across the aisle to pass legislation, and the _only_ candidate who has called our community home for nearly 40 years. She’s the champion we need fighting for us in D.C. and finding solutions in the middle. clean_body: | = Friend, Did you catch the letter to the editor from one of our Republican neighbors published in The Post Star last month? Here are the highlights: “My concern is that Elise Stefanik has moved so far to the right that she has lost sight of the middle, where the solutions are. She is an obstruction, not an effective legislator...I’m not paying her to be a partisan hack. ” “The congresswoman also clearly advocates for justice to be served on Andrew Cuomo, but no mention of similar treatment of those who instigated and carried out the insurrection on Jan. 6. I guess those were her people.” * “ We really should consider filling that congressional seat with someone who can put the district before the politics. ” Bridie Farrell is the candidate who will put our district before politics. She grew up in a family of independents right here in the North Country. Bridie is the only Democratic candidate in the race with experience working across the aisle to pass legislation, and the only candidate who has called our community home for nearly 40 years. Donald J. Trump November 23rd, 2021
Whatever happened to the Rigged and Stolen Arizona Presidential Election that is being investigated, or maybe the words should properly be “looked at,” by Attorney General Mark Brnovich? When will the legislature vote to decertify? Hi,

Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up, and we need to make some headway toward our $10,000 goal. Hitting these goals is so, so important to growing our campaign and spreading the word about Bruno.

We’re going to need your support to elect new, quality leaders and push CA-23 towards a brighter future.

Right now, Kevin McCarthy is using his power to look out for himself and keep his role in the January 6 insurrection under wraps, and **it’s high time that we get a representative who will actually put the people first.

[Can you chip in $5, $25, or $50 to help us raise at least $5,000 of our $10,000 end-of-month goal before Thanksgiving?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoJUmEIvv2tpr47ZCn3v2NNnh460ecjevxW3Teaa_X2DLl2OZU_HGIynljpmnIN_gh2am9nyRdUMssCdqy8cTiOOMEgq9qfi7Dr6R42JFGWZESZDbqPR7EJqWV6fAai0fD87CnF9WrpmkKIEWquuM55wdOaltRPDooE5iOj9Bg_HGa6SZLOEIwlvDP1c9KagB_p_knpS0gNEd2ul1dQbLiS_KAznV28l5rulY8lbdYStY_FL2Iq8rMQ8geBSVAzKtwp8OoNHONuCEKuWo5St8vyemb-WIe1osjZGtBvZWD3Ne2C13vcrW-gCG-683BgsUnlWZloPyUxfOOcddWXNI6SA/3h9/cJXV_ryVSambieL-VjvvlQ/h1/4QERFWAokiIqnUZTm32DnBgnmhVHa7fosAWv2-QBC74)** name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom is in Mexico
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Anarchy in California](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioplTj861ZHT7EVpbnTL31kreLf9vy2ES9xnbIBdOv8IhA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_23a&n=1) With California in the throes of a “State of Emergency,” Gavin Newsom is vacationing in Mexico for a week. You can see why he’d want to get away. This last weekend, mobs of “smash and grab” looters wreaked havoc across the Bay Area. The new policy, apparently, is that either a vaccine card or a hammer is required to enter retail establishments. Newsom’s bold response to the anarchy: “We cannot allow this to continue. Period. Full stop.” He then lamented his PlumpJack winery has been robbed four times. But Newsom has only himself to blame: he helped pass Prop. 47, the so-called “Safe Neighborhoods and Schools Act." This was the measure that all but legalized retail theft. As a prosecutor, I saw the disastrous consequences. When I ran for the Legislature, I designed a “Prop. 47 Simulator” allowing voters to see those consequences by stepping into the shoes of a police officer. (Try it out [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/prop47?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_23a&n=2)) As crime predictably rose, our efforts to fix the law were snuffed out by Newsom’s allies at the Capitol. But Californians have had enough. When the Legislature returns, I am introducing a Constitutional Amendment to fully repeal Prop. 47. [Help me fight for sanity](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_23a&n=3) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyEK3-JfZXX-JR_drMXL5rH4W_dzN5bdHCoQE7EDo-QOQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_23a&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_23a&n=5)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_23a&n=6).

subject: H-I-L-A-R-I-O-U-S!!!

body:
Get our DCCC Guide to Thanksgiving with your Republican relatives! >>
| | | [Get our DCCC Guide to Thanksgiving with your Republican relatives! >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_-)
---

It's that time of year again... Thanksgiving!

The turkey is resting, pies are baking, and your blood might just be boiling!

Of course, it wouldn't be a true family gathering without some poorly informed political opinions from your Republican relatives.

You can't tell your pro-Trump aunt to stuff it -- so what do you say when she brings this to the table?
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)

**[Get the answers you need in our Talk Turkey Guide!>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

We know relatives can't help but stir the pot.

The best way to fight back is with cold, hard facts...

...And we've got you covered!

With our trusty guide, hopefully chatting with the MAGA crew in your family will be as easy as (sweet potato) pie.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Just some of the Build Back Better highlights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s important that we keep our eye on the ball and not let up until the Build Back Better Act is signed into law.
#
Peter, what Pramila fought for in the Build Back Better Act will help working people, families, and our communities in so many tangible ways. Here are just some of the highlights we saw in headlines across the country the last few days:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8705?refcode=em20211123-826&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=826%2E420207%2EuAiZrK)
That’s right, the Build Back Better Act guarantees affordable, high-quality childcare that finally limits costs for families. That’s on top of paid family leave and free universal preschool for all three-year-olds and four-year-olds.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8705?refcode=em20211123-826&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=826%2E420207%2EuAiZrK)
Pramila knew bold climate action needed to be in the Build Back Better Act, and it is. This bill is the largest effort to combat climate change in American history and it will launch major new initiatives to fight the climate crisis.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8705?refcode=em20211123-826&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=826%2E420207%2EuAiZrK)
In addition to these transformational policies, Pramila also helped win investments in affordable housing, lower prescription drug costs, an extension of the monthly Child Tax Credit, home and community based care, Medicare expansion, and much more. This will make our economy more equitable for everyday, working people in this country while creating millions of good-paying jobs.
But we know this legislation still faces unprecedented opposition from corporate PACs, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and fossil fuel companies as it heads to the Senate. **That’s why it’s so important that we keep our eye on the ball and not let up until the Build Back Better Act is signed into law.**
[**Can you help fuel our work to keep the pressure on and protect our progressive wins in the Build Back Better Act with a $3 donation today? We have to keep up our fight and finally deliver for working families. It’s time!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8705?refcode=em20211123-826&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=826%2E420207%2EuAiZrK)

Thousands of you have stepped up during our fight in the House and we’re so grateful. Now, let’s get this over the finish line.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Michael Bennet
subject: the honest-to-God truth:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Folks —
Look, I’m not here to fool you with fake astronomical goals or beg you for a donation because the “sky is falling!” That’s not how I do things.
**But I am here to give you the honest-to-God truth: At the pace we’re going, we won’t reach our critical fundraising goal this month.**
Last quarter, we reported raising less than other Senate frontliners. That makes our campaign vulnerable. And it can’t happen again or else Mitch McConnell could pounce on this race.
**So, I’m personally asking (not begging!) you to split a donation of $5 or whatever you can to help Mark Kelly and me catch up on our goals before our numbers go public.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Where Kyle went after trial?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Free State of Florida |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=adb8cb80e0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Like all of the America patriots, I cheered when Kyle Rittenhouse was judged innocent.

Kyle should never have been charged. There was never in this country a clearer case of self defense.

_We cheer the freedom to carry arms, and we cheer the freedom to defend oneself if attacked. Both of these freedoms were under attack by the Leftist media and the partisan prosecutors._

So where does one go when one is celebrating freedom? You know where!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e9e54a10dd&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area. This district was targeted by the NRCC- with Florida's rightward swing, this district is going to flip in 2022!**

For years now, Florida has been leading the way for freedom!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c95cb402b3&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Gov. DeSantis has made sure that Florida is right at the forefront for freedom. He has banned vaccine mandates and passport requirements; declared Biden's unconstitutional orders null in Florida; opened up supply chains so suppliers use Florida ports; and fought tyranny at every turn.

He's the best Governor in America. And that's why Republican registration has now surpassed Dem registration in Florida!

That's also why conservatives from around the country are flocking to Florida- including Tucker Carlson, who apparently has a home here!

_Kyle Rittenhouse was spotted eating at a Placida restaurant, according to a tweet from Republican Party of Florida Chair of Chairs Evan Power. Rittenhouse recently spoke with FOX News host Tucker Carlson, for an interview that will be reportedly be broadcast Monday night.

The tweet by Power shows Rittenhouse sitting at Smokin’ Jerry’s Tiki Hut Bar & Grill on Gasparilla Road in Charlotte County, south of the coastal community of Englewood in Southwest Florida, with at least six other patrons.

Florida GOP Chairman Joe Gruters confirmed that Rittenhouse was in the area this weekend, for a segment for Carlson.

“I don’t know who he’s staying with, other than he's doing the Tucker Carlson Show,” Gruters said Sunday night._

Of course, Kyle would go to Florida first. Not only are all the conservatives (like Tucker) in Florida, but Florida is where our freedoms are being defended all over!

In truth, it's probably the safest place for Kyle.

_**Here in Florida, we are doing things differently- and getting results. Fighting for our freedoms, we are beating Dems left and right. That's why I will win next year!**_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cc57198489&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Florida is turning red faster than you can say "not guilty". The whole makeup of our state has changed.

This is what a good Republican governor like DeSantis can do!

Gone are the RINOs Florida used to elect! Now we are fighting for the freedom of all Americans. **

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had. I am the Republican Soto does NOT want to face- largely because I will hold him accountable for his support of open borders, gun control, and free spending socialism. Will you help me win this seat?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b634ca4e3a&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto is the rare holdout left in Florida: a Socialist Democrat unwilling to break with Biden. And next year we will be replacing those in bunches._

Help me defend our country! Kyle stood for our freedoms. Help me join him on the front lines of the fight for freedom! [Help me get elected and put a stop on every bad idea Biden has!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ff010b20aa&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bb768282c4&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=55df3751c1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=076790b2e7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9f9e627f7f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=7e49910748) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=7e49910748).

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I can't believe what the Democrats are doing to America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I spoke for over EIGHT-AND-A-HALF HOURS to stop them from forcing it through in the dead of night.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=79d5b9b62e9f48f9976226845d2766fb&_e=xSB4vaUd1JjNraYvIjfGV6TTYZIQD68XOqAQxlw0mDVkvMkrGZe62xCom_l4eBgwRLMziiPtjZuJD_YlGgcPp2zggOMzA9lcHeSRggX5YtMJyoDJCydHvfN7uSAcrrZk0cStwUNq_6zILp6B9GhTMupuH3XhNBUcvtey9V-jbrSBKzT2dkasFFeCc4dUrEtdBG9X8mME9eGXbPsPvpIXasNO8AVQzdI_YRr0BvrBDb_ffKn3rCrluXX-BC2OrwD8I7aGnne-5M18qYTR6C7phNhEd5kjdrtF5n29xAod5HjoBGXvwo_2e1PUstimZe-27RBcgtdyrQGQYblPth0LTpGwiEuSleb1_AbGYKeNBaspKsZipulyAt-kAXH36G3GpiaylpceXOU8Yb-jAPeQ8BtHTdZaiFmUzjZfJTLPi5iNcFqh8rTnjRMumLxyCs43JNbALQRpW9Df9bgvm3_jQygLOB17yilzhbZq9og73zMQmv-w_CPviLLbs9NTEUlH90zpg3ATDf-Rx3TzNLh5KMSITV3UnRcAlOnj1bN1Nc8U81qn154JwfA0dourVABG) | **Official Message From GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy**
---|---
This is Kevin McCarthy.
Pelosi and her Democrats just rammed through the largest Socialist spending spree in American history!
**I can 't believe what they're doing to America. I spoke for over EIGHT-AND-A-HALF HOURS to stop them from forcing it through in the dead of night.**
Now you, the American People, can see _exactly_ what the Democrats are plotting: _raising your taxes, increasing inflation to record highs, and granting mass amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants._
Mark my words:

Pelosi and her Democrats just rammed through the largest Socialist spending spree in American history! I can 't believe what they're doing to America. I spoke for over EIGHT-AND-A-HALF HOURS to stop them from forcing it through in the dead of night. Now you, the American People, can see exactly what the Democrats are plotting: raising your taxes, increasing inflation to record highs, and granting mass amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants. Mark my words: I 'm asking every single Conservative Patriot to rise to the occasion and help us take back control of Congress. Before the end of the day: Will you help me fire each one of the Socialists who did this to our great country? The future of America is hanging in the balance. | | Dear Mr. Willis, By now, I hope you've heard the fantastic news that... **Captain Wesley Hunt has announced his candidacy for U.S. House in Texas _this election_!** While he fell just short of retaking a House seat from Democrats last election, his campaign is only going to gain steam moving forward! Now that Wesley is officially running, I'm sure you'll want to be among the first in America to... [ENDORSE WESLEY HUNT FOR U.S. HOUSE](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=2) With the Democrats gearing up to pour millions of dollars into attacking him (like last time), Wesley Hunt needs the support of as many patriotic conservatives like you as he can get. So please read the email below and [sign your personal endorsement to Wesley Hunt](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=3) so he'll know you have his back. [And I'm hoping I can also count on your continued support to help Wesley win this crucial U.S. House seat this election.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=4) Thank you, and God Bless. [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=5) |

| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, Fed up with corrupt, career politicians in Washington selling out our values and America's future for their own selfish gain... [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=6) ...a Black conservative Army veteran (and rising star) from Texas is taking matters into his own hands by running for Congress. This American hero is fighting to win a critical U.S. house seat... ...but he needs patriotic conservatives like you and me to have his back. [I'm hoping you'll join me in endorsing Captain Wesley Hunt for U.S. House _this election_...](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=7) ...but first let me explain why Democrats are terrified of Wesley Hunt. [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=8) As you know, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are hell bent on finishing off their scorched Earth campaign to transform the "Land of the Free" into a **socialist nightmare**... ...but their plan to destroy America hinges entirely on their ability to **scare** Black voters into supporting Democrats with the vicious **LIE** that all conservatives _like you and me_ are all **racists**. That's why they savagely attack Black conservatives _like Tim Scott, Ben Carson, and Wesley Hunt_ who **dare** to challenge their race-baiting LIES. But Democrats are freaking out... [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=9) ...now that Wesley Hunt has announced his candidacy for this critical U.S. House seat in Texas. Because if there's anything Democrats fear more than a popular Black conservative exposing the truth about the Liberal LIES to Black voters... ...it's an intelligent, successful, and fearless Black conservative & American hero like **Captain Wesley Hunt** leading the fight to reclaim Black voters from the Democrat Party. The Democrats are **terrified** of Wesley Hunt because recent polling shows he has a REALLY good shot at plucking this crucial U.S. House seat right out of Nancy Pelosi's hands... ...and they know Wesley Hunt can and will reclaim enough Black voters to win this important U.S. House seat _this election_. And they're terrified that, once elected, Wesley Hunt would have a national stage to speak the truth to millions of Black voters across the country -- _which he'll use to_ : **✔** **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies to the entire nation **✔** **RECLAIM** Black voters to the Republican Party **✔** **END** the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community The Democrats will do anything - anything - to keep their stranglehold on Black voters because... **...they know that if they lose**just 12%** of the Black vote nationwide, it'll be **mathematically impossible** for them to ever win another election.** That's why Democrats are so terrified of Wesley Hunt and will stop at nothing to destroy him! That's why I really need to know... [Will you endorse Wesley Hunt for Congress today?](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=10) Once I receive your endorsement, I'll send it directly to Wesley so he'll know he has the full support of patriotic conservatives like you. [Along with your endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help Wesley FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' vicious attacks!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=11) Your endorsement and financial support are crucial to: **✔** Recruit more conservatives like you to endorse Wesley Hunt **✔** Run advertising campaigns in Texas up through Election Day **✔** Propel Wesley to victory in this crucial U.S. House race With Democrats funneling tens of millions of dollars into an all-out assault on this American hero... **...it's up to patriots like you and me to help Wesley Hunt FIGHT BACK.** [So please sign your personal endorsement to Wesley Hunt today...](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=12) [...and make an urgent donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Wesley Hunt to victory!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=13) [Or if that's more than you can afford right now, then please give $15, $10, or even $5 as a symbol of your support.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?recruiter_id=61901&info=2021EA1302&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EndorseHunt&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1302&n=14) Thank you, and God Bless. | |
Alvin Williams
