name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Who is Danny Davis representing?
body:
#
Peter,
For too long, Congressman Danny Davis has been a representative for health insurance companies, the real estate industry, and big corporations instead of the people. So we weren’t surprised that Davis is the third-highest recipient of pro-business PAC money among Democrats in Congress.
**If getting corporate campaign contributions was a competition, he would get a bronze medal.🥉🥉🥉**
Kina Collins is primarying Davis to represent the people, not corporations, in Congress. **And while Kina hasn’t accepted a dime of corporate PAC money, 73% of Danny Davis’s campaign contributions have come from pro-Business PACs.**
In a political system in which corporate campaign contributions now mean backroom deals later, we need to elect candidates who reject money from corporate PACs. **[Will you split a $3 contribution between Kina Collins and Justice Democrats so we can send her and other Justice Democrats to fight for the people in Congress?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84517?refcode=em20211123-20640&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20640%2E1203867%2Eb9L5aV)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84517?refcode=em20211123-20640&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20640%2E1203867%2Eb9L5aV)**
Big Business PACs are bankrolling Danny Davis’ re-election because he has championed their interests in Congress, not the Chicagoans that elected him. And in one of the most unequal Congressional districts in the country, where the community struggles with unemployment, gun violence, and unsafe drinking water — that is unacceptable.
Kina is a working-class organizer running against a well-funded opponent, but unlike Danny Davis, she’ll never call up the special interests when fundraising slows down. **[Can you split a contribution between Kina Collins and Justice Democrats to support the fight ahead?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84517?refcode=em20211123-20640&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20640%2E1203867%2Eb9L5aV)
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=20640%2E1203867%2Eb9L5aV) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=20640%2E1203867%2Eb9L5aV) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211123-20640-footer&t=25&refcode2=20640_1203867_b9L5aV&akid=20640%2E1203867%2Eb9L5aV)**
---

JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

**Let’s look at the facts:**

Xi forced Biden to meet for a virtual summit in the middle of the night that only benefitted the Chinese.

After Biden claimed that things were ‘strictly business’ between them and that they were not ‘old friends’, Xi opened the summit by greeting Biden as an “old friend.”

The summit was completely pro-China and Biden didn’t get his way on even one agenda item.

Biden failed to hold China accountable for genocide, the Hong Kong abomination, purposefully intimidating Taiwan, and global predatory economic activities hurting American families.

**If you miss President Trump’s take-no-prisoners strategy with China, then we need to hear from you!** [**_Will you take our Biden-China survey so that we can address Biden’s attitude towards China in the Senate?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=46d7c407e43c4884a517360267ecc1e3&_e=8Q3YEY1LL2rDx_aGgOagPStWVkgXX3PChS5AYpo589f5W8a-OKF9cVoUgLSGX0xSe4E4rcIfvZWtd5pqSNPhUQHFxRzGm5jPURsGNznVPG8G3pu9pQBoWZjKNB1XS6G8-8Op7fyIKPPfClbrtYSfEV9YLXe3F0my02XGgBkmkcqiEHqo7cnZPzdNNvQdjTSwLfO_YdsoVzNwaextDoy-FM_IU2KbOMcoBcigFXKku1zaXYNTI2-yPUzuvqlSbElx7iu0MAlaHHg7vAq8Gi3Gubh6Qo15EqQZeJiW1dPCGFy0fo345ouS8NX6lmJlRGz-4HRGG0zPgfGsOWAgOU4j8R96P5UeZFNz-wx8DmhuAQ-Rt0SHwlhf1b1oxDJIgUxa20xP_y9YWnCzzjS2XYgJ3XYjcjwN2iUQN1JVAk5xVAGw4pyKPZtkuH1RIuZSkwdbugnqwEkCVA3no3Xgkbpbjw6EX9t0ObfiarzHY_Lbh7s%3D)

body:
Abbott and his allies are coming dangerously close to their goal: a Texas where people no longer get to choose the leaders who represent them.
#
Democracy is under threat in Texas. With their new voter suppression law and racially gerrymandered electoral map, Governor Greg Abbott and his allies are coming dangerously close to their goal: a Texas where people no longer get to choose the leaders who represent them.
To win this race on such an uneven playing field, we need to build nothing less than the most powerful grassroots campaign that Texas has ever seen.
Not every candidate could take on this challenge. But we know for a fact that Beto can. During his insurgent Senate run in 2018, he inspired people across the nation and turned out more Democratic voters in Texas than anyone in history.
[If anyone can beat Greg Abbott and win this fight, it’s Beto O’Rourke. But our very democracy is on the line, and we need your help. Will you pitch in right now to our campaign?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50119?refcode=ema20211123-163840&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163840%2E444211%2EScwCWO)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50119?refcode=ema20211123-163840&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=163840%2E444211%2EScwCWO)**
It’s been a tough year in Texas as we suffer the consequences of living in a state where our democracy is constantly and systematically undermined.
It’s a state where legislators passed the most egregious anti-abortion, anti-women’s health care law in the country, which places a $10,000 bounty on anyone who supports someone trying to exercise their basic right to control their own health and shape their own future.
It’s a state where anyone can carry a gun with no background check and no training, despite the tragic legacy of gun violence and mass shootings in Texas — from El Paso, to Sutherland Springs, to Midland-Odessa, to Santa Fe, and too many other Texas communities.
Texas is better than this. We can and should take better care of one another and build something better for ourselves and those who come after us. Beto is running this campaign because we believe we can channel our anger, hurt, and fear into something constructive that can help us live up to our state’s potential.
If we make sure we’re on the ground every day registering and connecting with voters — especially those who have traditionally been left out or written off — we can ultimately win Texas and elect a Governor who truly represents the people of this state. But only if all of us work together to make it happen. **That’s why, as Beto's campaign manager, I’m asking:** [Will you chip in today to help us do the hard work necessary to overcome GOP-led voter suppression in Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50119?refcode=ema20211123-163840&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=163840%2E444211%2EScwCWO)
Thank you for being a part of this,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211123-163840-footer&t=22&refcode2=163840_444211_ScwCWO&akid=163840%2E444211%2EScwCWO)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=163840%2E444211%2EScwCWO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=163840%2E444211%2EScwCWO)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Morgan Harper
subject: I’m the only Democrat with a 100% pro-choice record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The constitutional right to an abortion is under attack in Ohio, and I’m the only candidate in this Senate race who can say I have the track record to fight back against it.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211123-410-footer-ak&t=2&akid=410%2E90090%2E6LVtR3)
**The constitutional right to an abortion is under attack in Ohio, and I’m the only candidate in this Senate race who can say I have the track record to fight back against it.** Take a look at this headline from BuzzFeed News:
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15502?t=3&akid=410%2E90090%2E6LVtR3)
It’s horrific enough that this proposed law includes the ability for virtually anyone to act like a paid bounty hunter and file vigilante-style lawsuits against those who seek an abortion or even help someone looking to have one. **But it goes even further than the similar Texas ban, making it illegal at _any_ stage of a pregnancy.**
This should be a flashing red warning sign for anyone who believes in the right to choose. **But major corporations like Nationwide, Charter Communications, General Motors, Pfizer, and more are happy to fund the far-right radicals in the Ohio legislature who introduced this scheme.**
This campaign does not take a dollar from corporations or corporate PACs, unlike my opponent, Rep. Tim Ryan, who’s voted 72% of the time against a woman’s right to choose while pocketing millions in corporate donations from these anti-abortion donors.
**[We need to make sure abortion is protected at the federal level by electing a pro-choice Senator from Ohio who is accountable only to the people, not bought and sold by corporate interests. If you’re with me, chip in $5 to our campaign today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15502?t=4&akid=410%2E90090%2E6LVtR3)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15508?refcode=em20211123-410&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=410%2E90090%2E6LVtR3)**
**Unlike Tim Ryan, I’m the only Democrat running with a 100% pro-choice record.** With states like Ohio cracking down on our rights, we need to elect folks to the Senate who can enact federal changes to protect our constitutional right to choose.
We can’t keep relying on corrupt career politicians without a lifetime commitment to the right to choose. I’m proud to stand by organizers and advocates fighting for our rights, and I’ll continue to do so in Washington with your help. **[Can you chip in to our grassroots campaign today to help us win?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15502?t=24&akid=410%2E90090%2E6LVtR3)**
Thank you for your support,
Morgan Harper
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15502?t=25&akid=410%2E90090%2E6LVtR3)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211123-410-footer&t=26&refcode2=410_90090_6LVtR3&akid=410%2E90090%2E6LVtR3)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

subject: Happy Thanksgiving! Let’s Put Ohio First!
body:
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkE9v3CAQxT8Ne7NlD157ffAh6SaXqofkUCknhGFs0_AvgDfyty_eOD1UQoPm9-DBPDm0Yy_bkxqggrqugQJUlNZlj2NT9dXUUBgvQlLSVKb8o0xAy4VQpXDmtAw1SCqmfhQ170cYa9p1bQOtkN2E1aVtTnpYUvKR0AcCz3lFFGvA8lPZgHI3yeywLCYXitndMFgXMkZnCptbM-LOuSb0eU2GGZRqNYRe0XClCbQ7jG4NAjO0QjNuvFbTdkgit1zNNovfMxa5AFu49xtLC7fvcVY3ZWemMUXm18TcohybVIiJ4f7JLydnE9r09Urx8_fLh7ldt7enLDOrlczCfzDeIYFzQKG8ypfLiFaydc0CnE9hkP5Taa1i2-WE532ie7THCAPpHgnAomTM2z1FaLaHX6_LefPnQl-w4NY87Rr8yDVtHv8dPDzKIycg3fUvOh-hUw)

| | Friend,
As Thanksgiving approaches, it’s important that we are grateful for what we have. I’d like to thank you for your continued support of my candidacy.
Everyday, I fight to put Ohio First and restore our liberties. However, this campaign wouldn’t be possible without **you**.
I’m thankful for everyone who has shown up at events to listen to my plan for Ohio. I’m thankful for your financial support and the time you’ve volunteered. Most importantly, I’m thankful for your prayers.
Together, we can make this one of the last Thanksgivings that DeWine is governor. Please consider donating to my campaign today.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkEtv3SAQhX8Nd2fLHvxceJE2vbtkEandIgxjm4aXACfyvy--cbuohAbNd-DAHDl18yi7m5qggrqugQJUlNbliHNTjdXSUJgHISlpKlP-Viag5UKoUjhz26ZuHAfsaVuLhSIsMHAUzVLNWPX9QFu46WlLyUdCnwjc84oo9oDlp7IB5WmS2WVZLC4Uq_vAYF3IGJ0pbG7NjCfnmtD7ngwzKNVuCH1Gw5Um0J0wuj0IzNAKzbjxWi3HJYnccrXaLP6dscgF2Ma9P1jauH2Pq_pQdmUaU2R-T8xtyrFFhZgYnp_8cnI2oU1frxSv9_d9fjE_fy1ZZlYrmYX_YHxAAm1AobzKl8uIVrJ9zwK0tzBJ_6m0VrHrc8LrOdEj2muEifTfCMCmZMzbI0VojqeXt609fFvoAQtuzY9Tg--5psPjv4OXR3nlBKR__gMELqE0)
---

body:
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e4141baae0b74bcfb80629756fab3b44&_e=JYyugbqovOTdwtn1WdI92dDknp3o649wz3cg_D88_ff7wMFKzjf3K5HfBUD_IosFOyqGufg9uI-FxtOu2WJLlQ2deo_Ul6-BpT7qyOHrtF_4f189_UpBl4d4eJh2EQBPspERvJ4lBsEbiA0SGiLlPYVEjIqR70jtXXYtO8yijZ_Xy7k7x28v5sKroR9k7NnUMW3Dn2ILpm9w5kBJAdTpBSAf_6EalHQtM9JKBFRzv0SsG0mKxoWgr1EQdJKafZub5DZeaI1xu3NS761Wx4RS-Yvow2pk6fj6uzRVg80KysacbAMsraV7u3qv9GURGW6YC2CdUixTBZk-qIZNM5b4VnMcB4mAmJ1267GSPbXOFtzL1bQ5_GRvkc0S4r8Voenzm9cQ__hWPQr0J_Hnz5mBsg%3D%3D)
Friend --
When the American people don't immediately bend to the whims of Joe Biden, he doesn't get to impose his will through mandates and executive edicts. Biden and Fauci have gone from 15 days to slow the spread to 3 jabs to keep your job.
**Fortunately for all of us, the Constitution - and the State of Florida - are standing in Joe Biden's way.**
I called the Florida Legislature into Special Session to protect people's jobs and personal freedoms. _**And today, I signed four pieces of legislation from the Keep Florida Free agenda to PROTECT FREEDOM in Florida.**_
**[HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT TO PROTECT FREEDOM IN FLORIDA](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e4141baae0b74bcfb80629756fab3b44&_e=JYyugbqovOTdwtn1WdI92dDknp3o649wz3cg_D88_ff7wMFKzjf3K5HfBUD_IosFOyqGufg9uI-FxtOu2WJLlQ2deo_Ul6-BpT7qyOHrtF_4f189_UpBl4d4eJh2EQBPspERvJ4lBsEbiA0SGiLlPYVEjIqR70jtXXYtO8yijZ_Xy7k7x28v5sKroR9k7NnUVY2g8TwXiCpHzZzZ0rDbIum-jAMKUUJKz-0XPHTJIe9FDr9yru517UZO1_RIZtyUXATvsb1uvLRDGMK3M3s4k4PYoLZuTx6SSJHFemgA8eOwmordaYpmDe1y9ehOpymDzVOk9nVjV49ua-1NNfWiuZcVzLD6IHnbebR0xRXVg1U1Qalk44cikDR8zf16z8kScjwAkV0xiQFg7lDh36Xzuw%3D%3D)**
These bills ENSURE that the rights, liberties, and freedoms of all Floridians are protected against the whims of power-hungry politicians and incompetent government bureaucrats with a God complex.
**Signing these bills into law is a victory for:**
✅ Every worker in Florida who can go to sleep tonight knowing they can wake up tomorrow without the dread of having to decide between putting food on the table for their family or getting a jab in the arm.
✅ Every student who was harmed by being forced to wear a mask for hours on end while at school.
✅ Every parent who knows THEY are the ones who should be making medical decisions for their children, NOT the government.
✅ Every Floridian who has been unfairly burdened by the ideological, anti-science agendas of Democrats from local school boards all the way to the White House.
**[HELP ME FIGHT BACK AGAINST JOE BIDEN'S UNCONSTITUTIONAL MANDATES](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e4141baae0b74bcfb80629756fab3b44&_e=JYyugbqovOTdwtn1WdI92dDknp3o649wz3cg_D88_ff7wMFKzjf3K5HfBUD_IosFOyqGufg9uI-FxtOu2WJLlQ2deo_Ul6-BpT7qyOHrtF_4f189_UpBl4d4eJh2EQBPspERvJ4lBsEbiA0SGiLlPYVEjIqR70jtXXYtO8yijZ_Xy7k7x28v5sKroR9k7NnUHvV1hXeYjYxq5CvMKunxWO2OBOmabwkbm57yLFhoaCKnS8x6nsBLVxg7k5kt2KuFQFBWOgs1xO6-_CCActiUikIR18npb97KiI9CuWjOnx5DikQT2_YwVZKkV1FEIr6ZNWR_TDOvdI3g05-LAUMg4lk2aBl3XIrQR7FevEAAjqu1ijjbos4DX6bavqHtXEgtI3o_NcIZdYrvb9o-U5eH5Q%3D%3D)**
What Joe Biden wants to do is not only unconstitutional, it is flat wrong. Had Florida not stepped in to defend freedom from government overreach, lockdowns, mandates, and business closures, we'd be living in a Faucian dystopia today.
I stepped in Biden and Fauci's way because defending your freedom is the right thing to do. I've been proud to stand next to parents, workers, and students as I fight for freedom.
**Leadership means doing all you can to stand by people. That is what we did today in Florida.**
Friend, the fight for freedom is upon us, but I can assure you I'm just getting started. **[Chip in $100, $50, or $25 to help me continue this uphill battle to protect our freedom and liberty in the great state of Florida.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e4141baae0b74bcfb80629756fab3b44&_e=JYyugbqovOTdwtn1WdI92dDknp3o649wz3cg_D88_ff7wMFKzjf3K5HfBUD_IosFOyqGufg9uI-FxtOu2WJLlQ2deo_Ul6-BpT7qyOHrtF_4f189_UpBl4d4eJh2EQBPspERvJ4lBsEbiA0SGiLlPYVEjIqR70jtXXYtO8yijZ_Xy7k7x28v5sKroR9k7NnUs39zxSEe4vPWRXGJIt3L5yOoXjVHhlPpBARbCHs87qVWxGRwoaZ5KTOu0j0wJnP8go4HJBm4RtfFKY9eydl6VVSN9IniPfIGRTkulPr8mK4HxD07x0LVDH1K6J5HEyaAeiZjBHKMXLAST9uC7ZtZAZ8L7llTWeVcv8Ppr4o_f6uEHByAgbr-xe7SJvM-jNKJ3nhnto4iKX_BEI388VxMWw%3D%3D)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e4141baae0b74bcfb80629756fab3b44&_e=JYyugbqovOTdwtn1WdI92dDknp3o649wz3cg_D88_ff7wMFKzjf3K5HfBUD_IosFOyqGufg9uI-FxtOu2WJLlQ2deo_Ul6-BpT7qyOHrtF_4f189_UpBl4d4eJh2EQBPspERvJ4lBsEbiA0SGiLlPYVEjIqR70jtXXYtO8yijZ_Xy7k7x28v5sKroR9k7NnUny07OSAJUFObxtDiV4fYt8uEKM7ooxf3h3snS1PYJsvLQIv110AtY2rgIRdOUGxutH94wI1ghjea7ydIKPzq05TFSnm2DZ5AI-rNl8MTwMrRbATBdRpdb5xI-yIyRz9kFgi5LoxOTSx54F7FwNzbSMbfjY9INWMP8p9uWNF80IvYFDdJrRBM8kJVJGucKP7v1DoWy4juhoFDQiJVukjwkg%3D%3D "FIGHT BACK") [FIGHT BACK](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e4141baae0b74bcfb80629756fab3b44&_e=JYyugbqovOTdwtn1WdI92dDknp3o649wz3cg_D88_ff7wMFKzjf3K5HfBUD_IosFOyqGufg9uI-FxtOu2WJLlQ2deo_Ul6-BpT7qyOHrtF_4f189_UpBl4d4eJh2EQBPspERvJ4lBsEbiA0SGiLlPYVEjIqR70jtXXYtO8yijZ_Xy7k7x28v5sKroR9k7NnUAxtZ595v-5lYZqlRZUZ-zRwDP8g0GKDTn2Tdi2VVozDF-8dmkkMOQEsKo2KXHOvXl1MnJ4TIoMJb_P_-D8az4_JHWsbMgS9uyXKjSpHxrx5eSl6wY_5JKphUe-RIeD6keo5mfZWfdM-nDMOb10_PEUo7Qj3xSIF95--xv8rdVUyDwmPL0fxP3bRePlna-XAinTuTnUCSrxXuBFC3RhEpTw%3D%3D)

Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

clean_body: Our race in GA has been declared a “toss-up.” This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate! | ☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜ Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up Peter, BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in. Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic." If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message. In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters. Take a look for yourself: I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up. While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column. Therefore, we must increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game. While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Before Odessa was a civil servant, a community leader, and a champion for progressive change, she was a kid growing up in Nashville. _(A very stylish kid, we might add!)_
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi4n434socN9Hl2jfg8WLMAuSLeOf3I_-9pIlnyOaZdsrr5KFRFBCB-ANWQAQ56Y1RmFXjFkWznb9a1zTkFMBPnD_BfcZgrGVWSTQsW1U9Q5qR82qJdoKIPkjxiJYzlIggMMypNtOBMlqBtbZN0DpTogPd_sRxERVPF-2f8ib-L61oJd00tIEh0e8-oeWfpi2Hl23AIVWuZ-2FgfTOaCNI2KMRg5EFCmwpV69MVDHfXZR5mPI1wkANi1Ud5IiM0NL-Ga4-4eGPoPVHvxZeldoSXi_dEqKV-aaaU8a8_VrqgJS01FcFp1kikHHgznbG-jc7/3h9/o2vB2hoiTQCT0hnb_vyvag/h1/b2FW1mxwYVAHcmSyHT58YBfQy067HqImFpTz-v0lO_U) Odessa was raised in Nashville in a predominantly Black, working class community struggling with poverty, substance abuse, and violence due to political neglect and policy failure. With guidance from her family and mentors, Odessa followed in the footsteps of her father, becoming a civil servant. Today, she’s a proud mom, a union member, the Executive Director of Stand Up Nashville, and a candidate for Congress in TN-05. **** Odessa believes in affordable housing for everyone, a $15 federal minimum wage, good-paying union jobs through the Green New Deal —****[**_and if you do too, we’re humbly asking for your support today. clean_body: Before Odessa was a civil servant, a community leader, and a champion for progressive change, she was a kid growing up in Nashville. | | | Peter, Before Odessa was a civil servant, a community leader, and a champion for progressive change, she was a kid growing up in Nashville. (A very stylish kid, we might add!) Odessa was raised in Nashville in a predominantly Black, working class community struggling with poverty, substance abuse, and violence due to political neglect and policy failure. With guidance from her family and mentors, Odessa followed in the footsteps of her father, becoming a civil servant. Today, she’s a proud mom, a union member, the Executive Director of Stand Up Nashville, and a candidate for Congress in TN-05. ** Odessa believes in affordable housing for everyone, a $15 federal minimum wage, good-paying union jobs through the Green New Deal — Odessa is the only candidate in this race who’s personally experienced the ways the system failed her and her community and is committed to making change. But she needs our help — and your help, Peter — to get to Congress and deliver for working people across the country. We’ve set a goal to hit 500 contributions before the end of this month to make sure we have the resources we need to run a competitive campaign. ** Thanks for having our backs, Peter. We couldn’t do this without you! Together, Odessa Kelly HQ | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

body:
As you probably know, the Kansas Legislature met yesterday for a special session to defend Kansans from President Biden’s far-reaching and unconstitut Friend, As you probably know, the Kansas Legislature met yesterday for a special session to defend Kansans from President Biden’s far-reaching and unconstitutional vaccine mandates. I have opposed the Biden administration's illegal federal 'jab-or-job' mandates from the day he announced them. And that’s why I continue to fight in federal courts to invalidate these mandates entirely. The Legislature's actions yesterday are a welcome companion to our ongoing legal efforts. I commend Senate President Masterson, Speaker Ryckman and Republicans in the Legislature for their leadership and focused work in passing this bill strengthening protections for religious liberty and guarding Kansans’ jobs, **and if I were governor, I would sign it into law right away.** [**If you agree, I need you to join my team to continue the fight for medical freedom in our great state.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=148fe26815c841908562c1026167353e&_e=TjrVPJX7ln-Y6WrGaD-2oiNphrLEvDgx5CK_IEE0FRiU4JIvEpBzzmNap4BIzUXxm7fm157h3tRi0U6PBUULlCJ3LSEzewdM_Y5vu6oIDI7OO0IapCfY28GP5_Kvi0iOA_qNNseQloGzmCOEJ-oZY2R-QiV9bYwBlv-ncbBveJQPbXnFGbzTS0mkvDN85GkOI-kKprmc2qydECfvMPIFkdVFoPds0Gzna5xdHFi1qmuxJhsfRHVd8tL-3zqvMPPpBugJD1oDBdWk8JIy4P2LDHqx_J38Z404pgGMOQ21ukQ-4oOybs2fovh9rwpkGAYauj4RdVSjTG-NKnmPMG4g_bJheM8FN0_DPP8j3hBS2y5jSxQwtE3O0wetFPqPItwbLd7-0p33OGF2RDsx5dNMH4MgZrahMTI7Dve-J1BYUbveZV2GGdMJPha6ZSfcGrMzG3HhlpA4pdFEwMvhxm8aq6HOVIcMK2PrQYDnXI1SgL5cU7mrYy9OOVK2TLz2QzdPdo865hUy_LF1NS2NPVlhKw%3D%3D) I have opposed the Biden administration's illegal federal 'jab-or-job' mandates from the day he announced them. And that’s why I continue to fight in federal courts to invalidate these mandates entirely. The Legislature's actions yesterday are a welcome companion to our ongoing legal efforts. I commend Senate President Masterson, Speaker Ryckman and Republicans in the Legislature for their leadership and focused work in passing this bill strengthening protections for religious liberty and guarding Kansans’ jobs, and if I were governor, I would sign it into law right away. When I’m governor, I’ll fight every single day against the federal government’s attempts to micromanage our daily lives. When I’m governor, I’ll defend your right to make your own decisions for yourself and for your children. The fight we are engaged in now is a very important one. We must push back against these harmful and unprecedented federal mandates, and more importantly, we must NEVER give up our freedom. –Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Cynthia Mendes
subject: I’ve had to work multiple jobs to pay the rent. The minimum wage is way too low.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
I’ve worked multiple jobs to support myself and my daughter. I know the
stress of being one hospital bill or car accident away from financial
ruin. No one should have to live with that constant anxiety.

And while the state is on track to raise hourly minimum wages to $15 by
2025, we know that even $15 an hour isn’t enough to meet basic needs like
paying rent or putting food on the table.

In an economy that’s rigged against everyone but the wealthy elite, the
pandemic has exacerbated wealth inequality and left millions unprotected
and vulnerable — and often right on the brink of poverty.

The answer couldn’t be more simple: we need to pay people more. That’s why
Matt and I are going to implement a $19 minimum hourly wage in Rhode
Island when we win governing power.

A living wage has the power to end generational poverty, and will allow
families to put food on the table and pay the bills. In short, a living
wage means dignity.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/mab-em-living-wage-petition-211123/?t=1003&akid=258%2E43343%2E_WR2qs ]No one should be forced to live paycheck to paycheck or work two to
three jobs just to make ends meet. If you agree, add your name next to
ours calling on the Rhode Island legislature to act quickly and raise the
minimum wage.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/mab-em-living-wage-petition-211123/?t=1004&akid=258%2E43343%2E_WR2qs ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thanks for using your voice today,

— Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=258%2E43343%2E_WR2qs ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/446?t=1002&akid=258%2E43343%2E_WR2qs ]Privacy Policy

Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia

[4]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=258%2E43343%2E_WR2qs

name: Team Kaptur
subject: The GOP locks in One Party Rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
The GOP is completely uninterested in compromise or upholding the will of voters. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux2lKz7nizFp0a7fm5P9W_xjGj9WRoBCZW6pGyb0xfmi82TC3gGFtMebzdGHBxO7nJlgMIuY5ZcnZ6HWFa-4DESLroeNlRlME4jiPnHiFjzDxUoD-WplJJ7CNeg3ngWnnItZqJIMNiWLiCfjiJoEWVnNK99eChdxlpgGKvfp5T4gW8ZsZG9nEtAbMSWYwkhfv86Wd1QldsDd6vfCaz25ettAxcBFo4_OafqYoNpNHBayklV-3swQZkMa5ntKodqu30wENb49RRGvdUauHSSdCgwE5js56Jghn9675avoO0ZxMF6FP1fPL6JvAzLHMpvBlmzoq_-_Vu-EZbjeVmyUqBY2_d4O30A0kFEup7v0bMrT7q-wxtKvxWDIM2MokJp4E4m61S4GW0NkdZd3M-yKKiPpqJjLN2-3PZFlbjoVcC2it/3h9/unbpcKXtRrKHJxV8KFu1lA/h0/EWk9Di25_RfsU48fsaso_1tS5k8YAZ7LakjehFMIlP4)

| | Team,

Ohio’s GOP is uninterested in democracy. For months on end, Republicans have resorted to lies and conspiracy theories to justify their losses in last year’s election, and now, they have their revenge.

As midterms approach, they’ve seized the opportunity to gerrymander maps and deny the will of the people. These maps give the GOP a huge advantage and will make it nearly impossible to challenge Republicans over the next decade.

**On Saturday, Republican Governor Mike DeWine broke his promise to the people of Ohio and signed the latest gerrymandered map into law. Republicans now stand to win twelve of Ohio’s fifteen Congressional seats,_unless we stop them._**

Voters want to pick their elected officials at the ballot box, not have politicians in Columbus pick the voters they want. The people of this district will not go unheard. Democrat Marcy Kaptur is continuing the push for fairly drawn maps and representation in government. **Voter suppression has no place in Ohio,** and we won’t back down until every eligible voter has a fair chance at the ballot.

**[Republican gerrymandering attempts to silence voters across this state. Together, we must stop them! Will you pitch in $25 right now to help us mount the challenge we need to stop their voter suppression and ensure fair representation for the people of Ohio?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux2lKz7nizFp0a7fm5P9W_xjGj9WRoBCZW6pGyb0xfmi82TC3gGFtMebzdGHBxO7nJkRSecpsfhzhEYjXNG8uHFuDCkUuyNr4I4sretlFvtUCG6DL2VWQhTuaLwRdeP1RGn9nnDPR6MmhaDRtGSM8WetpTR-UcenlkI9OAaz4NI7y1F47firLBY78l7QGbEx8thyJ3SmzXrD709glvNbVTUkE5C9hHOVEGZXfGvn8fDrSHOBw-lWxZPt4n2L-8TmsZ1NeCASeuzR62eW-lXFuFjdAX7KzVknV2dxoXkop4UqvxSynji-3R7Nwz3sgycbw89rKRnrMW7F46ceczyp1X5AzVJDDP_173JcBkRDNgBz89dhlsYMtQQqgBTobokmm7k6e47Ar9D5mxgtl0FOZQo_FqD9hq7GCvdaN5k9liAnJ/3h9/unbpcKXtRrKHJxV8KFu1lA/h1/sd0nLgV9VvKZJ49dNUUQseSGKh84kBu8UrX2-02aY5Y)**

We have to act now,

\-- Team Kaptur

Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress?**

name: John Fetterman
subject: Can we call ya, Derek? ☎️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Gisele is basically everyone's favorite.
#
Derek,
I fully realize that Gisele is basically everyone's favorite. And I really do mean everyone... my parents included. 🙄
So I can't say I was *totally* surprised when Gisele's email to you earlier today led to a massive surge in online donations.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37675?refcode=em20211123-3580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)
_My face when I heard that everyone wants a phone call from Gisele instead of me^_
So, in the spirit of gratitude — and also in giving the team what you clearly want:
[**_Will you chip in your first $5 to get added to a list of folks that Gisele (and also me, fwiw) might just call to say thank you?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37675?refcode=em20211123-3580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)
We're both so deeply grateful for the support, especially before big moments like our upcoming end-of-month deadline. 🙏
— John
\--------Forwarded message--------
Sender: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Date: Tuesday, November 23, 2021
Subject: re: giving thanks
Derek,
[**_If you'd be willing to chip in any amount at all before the end of this month, would it be okay if John + I gave you a phone call?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37675?refcode=em20211123-3580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)__
**We'd both really like to say _thank you._ ❤️**
There is SO much to be grateful for when it comes to this team. From online donations to seeing so many yard signs as John and I campaign across PA. I mean, just *look* at this dreamy yard:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37675?refcode=em20211123-3580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)
It honestly never gets old for us — it's an absolute honor that you would put our name on your yard. 😭
Derek, with Thanksgiving coming up in just a couple days, John and I want to share how deeply grateful we are to have you on this team — and how humbled we are by your support in this race.
**That's why we'd *love* to give you a quick phone call to say thank you.**
[**_John and I are planning on personally calling a few grassroots donors who chip in before this month's fundraising deadline to say thank you. Will you chip in $5 or anything you're able to support our campaign before the holiday? We'd be so grateful for your support._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37675?refcode=em20211123-3580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37675?refcode=em20211123-3580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)**
With love,
Gisele
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Second Lady of Pennsylvania (SLOP)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211123-3580-footer&t=25&refcode2=3580_434096_NnH_Ka&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=3580%2E434096%2ENnH_Ka)

name: Christie
subject: re: special invitation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I wanted to follow up with you myself.
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5250?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211123-Christie-SenateFocusGroupRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211123-Christie-SenateFocusGroupRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2041%2E9716520%2ER3LxHe)
---
Hello -- Recent survey responses from you really stuck out to me, and I wanted to follow up myself.

As Executive Director of the DSCC, it’s my job to create a winning plan to help Democrats defend and expand our Senate majority -- and I need a few passionate supporters to help shape our strategy and ensure we don’t let Mitch McConnell take back the Senate.

**Input from this team made all the difference in the last election, so I'm kindly asking you to help us out again:**

name: Chairman Rick Scott
subject: Flipping the Senate is crucial
body:
President Biden's reckless orders continue to put Americans at harm from violent, convicted illegal aliens.

| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=423a0b78a2af4426a662368a3cb2fc4b&_e=kD0N9v0auV59L26RFuHN-M6C_mGVxWdm17a0mg3h_Ze2MfbyRbmX5p3ipw8eT2UmQ8GhzmMmXFA__1MPtd-qFPJh-LoKSEt4IXL5WVLLisjioWBW0OWW_a95qItmYnr_T_8b0earBRfnm-6YYxRvLWbEyKNlhk7aAMVwI7JNQDXDKDfIetAYnqAeIwh-TFdTx6ZVzjsDuU9ei-VtJxpE6AQqsEQPU5Rt5lRkGDY6drzwXqMYY5P71GH3FBH3ONxVfDmQOc5algZ2vdONpDfbCe0gUkgDWvN13MGrWpAhWPjz21BnTN44CcHMd1OJpRtZB62Wl0jo-woj1fhNgnWgRSTAYiyw5nMvuW5rCJJ5vOB0CsRITL0tf-nJpdoTqdg2wExFNbnUyLy4MokiT5dCzXCfVlSlAwZt36XB1rxbNxzFdDJn-LPA07iXZcHBxu0HryMd2WIvNDsKXUr3ab9mQRGyfsk6C4AYRs5AHjtU6U8V__7BiAKahGZANTTzih9FheYx0ULjhrrWKRqbs4uIVcsIpcprgOpZVnJnoXCUJGDuYs4uS_qR5tCUl4AL0-DBFxf-dOXiKwtIMrS-5OfzMJMBe0VQH7__M6qahs--n3cm1zpE1yYiu249u8ZSFmKfXeRP_GAda7VbGJF5zi88xqBAKkTS1pGfpuBXJRLjEBYCjQMUJzirR4ZyM0WCjdhcewYIto7tXxSKDcd07ZqExreGnPCPx4YEAz9uRURfC7Iy0lti6bOLrWAQJNBU5gkQ)

Fellow American,

I’m Senator Rick Scott from Florida - and for the next two years I have the honor of serving as the chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

In my job, I have one role: **[Take back the Senate from the far-Left Democrats and return some sanity to our country](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=423a0b78a2af4426a662368a3cb2fc4b&_e=kD0N9v0auV59L26RFuHN-M6C_mGVxWdm17a0mg3h_Ze2MfbyRbmX5p3ipw8eT2UmQ8GhzmMmXFA__1MPtd-qFPJh-LoKSEt4IXL5WVLLisjioWBW0OWW_a95qItmYnr_T_8b0earBRfnm-6YYxRvLWbEyKNlhk7aAMVwI7JNQDXDKDfIetAYnqAeIwh-TFdTx6ZVzjsDuU9ei-VtJxpE6AQqsEQPU5Rt5lRkGDY6drzwXqMYY5P71GH3FBH3ONxVfDmQOc5algZ2vdONpDfbCe0gUkgDWvN13MGrWpAhWPjz21BnTN44CcHMd1OJpRtZB62Wl0jo-woj1fhNgnWgRSTAYiyw5nMvuW5rCJJ5vOB0CsRITL0tf-nJpdoTqdg2wExFNbnUyLy4MokiT5dCzXCfVlSlAwZt36XB1rxbNxzFdDJn-LPA07iXZcHBxu0HryMd2WIvNDsKXUr3ab9mQRGyfsk6C4AYRs5AHjtU6U8V__7BiAKahGZANTTzih9FheYx0ULjhrrWKRqbs4uIVcsIpcprgOpZVnJnoXCUJGCxqzG8LHxVaYLDX7zhXuYfxk6f0pVKyhbFNU8VOrAJAAt8exRG8DCzOTgRFqY1_4KwaBC8ymzTG11uAtLLGqEHHQTYQS9_6OOCA8mBMDN0SoX51GXSMW78F7zn-xJp8Ajod4aBqAn2ERrr8OT2a37Ok8V0qe0oPrScPY73m1BQQxPB4Nu-EPQiKM149RS6HHY34WiZ1rhK-a0yXtXAp__b)**.

I’m writing to you today to let you know about a conversation I recently had with former President Donald Trump. **My main takeaway from our meeting was how invested he is in seeing Republicans retake the Senate majority next year**.

**I told him that my team is working night and day to build the support we need to make it happen.**

**[That’s why before November 30th my team and I have set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to pledge their support to our efforts; taking back the Senate will be an “all hands-on deck” effort.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=423a0b78a2af4426a662368a3cb2fc4b&_e=kD0N9v0auV59L26RFuHN-M6C_mGVxWdm17a0mg3h_Ze2MfbyRbmX5p3ipw8eT2UmQ8GhzmMmXFA__1MPtd-qFPJh-LoKSEt4IXL5WVLLisjioWBW0OWW_a95qItmYnr_T_8b0earBRfnm-6YYxRvLWbEyKNlhk7aAMVwI7JNQDXDKDfIetAYnqAeIwh-TFdTx6ZVzjsDuU9ei-VtJxpE6AQqsEQPU5Rt5lRkGDY6drzwXqMYY5P71GH3FBH3ONxVfDmQOc5algZ2vdONpDfbCe0gUkgDWvN13MGrWpAhWPjz21BnTN44CcHMd1OJpRtZB62Wl0jo-woj1fhNgnWgRSTAYiyw5nMvuW5rCJJ5vOB0CsRITL0tf-nJpdoTqdg2wExFNbnUyLy4MokiT5dCzXCfVlSlAwZt36XB1rxbNxzFdDJn-LPA07iXZcHBxu0HryMd2WIvNDsKXUr3ab9mQRGyfsk6C4AYRs5AHjtU6U8V__7BiAKahGZANTTzih9FheYx0ULjhrrWKRqbs4uIVcsIpcprgOpZVnJnoXCUJGDaXyGyk0rF-yOZ3v1OE8GLIPq8QMyqlRLRoYwbAbwA5hhYX3jzUB0nTUr2AABBPpTDIeK8pV-UO96rhDcN5nU9LOw-RoEYo8YMA89nbE1Sr4TEMnamFY26FZMJHgh4B3UEkFEflnHVzrqweH29_UxRQjAHQdQida2NGb3HfkaCbDGXQjpu3eS8Y2y9Av-rAp6ZBSaPO198nmQrb3BeAwx_)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=423a0b78a2af4426a662368a3cb2fc4b&_e=kD0N9v0auV59L26RFuHN-M6C_mGVxWdm17a0mg3h_Ze2MfbyRbmX5p3ipw8eT2UmQ8GhzmMmXFA__1MPtd-qFPJh-LoKSEt4IXL5WVLLisjioWBW0OWW_a95qItmYnr_T_8b0earBRfnm-6YYxRvLWbEyKNlhk7aAMVwI7JNQDXDKDfIetAYnqAeIwh-TFdTx6ZVzjsDuU9ei-VtJxpE6AQqsEQPU5Rt5lRkGDY6drzwXqMYY5P71GH3FBH3ONxVfDmQOc5algZ2vdONpDfbCe0gUkgDWvN13MGrWpAhWPjz21BnTN44CcHMd1OJpRtZB62Wl0jo-woj1fhNgnWgRSTAYiyw5nMvuW5rCJJ5vOB0CsRITL0tf-nJpdoTqdg2wExFNbnUyLy4MokiT5dCzXCfVlSlAwZt36XB1rxbNxzFdDJn-LPA07iXZcHBxu0HryMd2WIvNDsKXUr3ab9mQRGyfsk6C4AYRs5AHjtU6U8V__7BiAKahGZANTTzih9FheYx0ULjhrrWKRqbs4uIVcsIpcprgOpZVnJnoXCUJGAKWjGHtGP70nYyHi4sfRNR2U2BEYSAhNtjETVzsc3LEc-KACF6Vu_jtSR2D6dg3OVjpu2dc2zjnpOOZEeGgB0xZgTspCs_EXkSmDMIZDjCfi51MvD43I8F83wrS7WFAQ5o6josy0DbLPoRaWk5Cn4Nk6IG2mJ6cPH4CXzIodoUXicABNX4BPHiSofpfAaHtSHlnVoeBFU84vT7jPm60hAK)
It’s going to be a monumental task – Democrats are going to fight like hell to hold onto their 50-50 Senate majority; **Chuck Schumer is going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to paint Republicans in the worst possible light.**

Democrats will lie about Republicans’ records of accomplishment and they will smear us every chance they get.

Think about what is at stake _IF_ Republicans can’t flip the Senate next year:
1. Democrats will kill the filibuster, if they don’t do it sooner;
2. They’ll spend trillions on pet projects that we will never be able to pay off
3. And Democrats will federalize elections; creating a permanent Democrat majority.

**Republicans only need a net gain of ONE seat to win back the majority to take away the tie-breaking vote from Kamala Harris in the evenly divided Senate.**

**Victory is within reach – but we will come up short if we don’t have the support of every conservative from across the country.**

I’m passionate about our shared conservative beliefs and **[I’m asking you to add your name to our petition today pledging your support to our cause.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=423a0b78a2af4426a662368a3cb2fc4b&_e=kD0N9v0auV59L26RFuHN-M6C_mGVxWdm17a0mg3h_Ze2MfbyRbmX5p3ipw8eT2UmQ8GhzmMmXFA__1MPtd-qFPJh-LoKSEt4IXL5WVLLisjioWBW0OWW_a95qItmYnr_T_8b0earBRfnm-6YYxRvLWbEyKNlhk7aAMVwI7JNQDXDKDfIetAYnqAeIwh-TFdTx6ZVzjsDuU9ei-VtJxpE6AQqsEQPU5Rt5lRkGDY6drzwXqMYY5P71GH3FBH3ONxVfDmQOc5algZ2vdONpDfbCe0gUkgDWvN13MGrWpAhWPjz21BnTN44CcHMd1OJpRtZB62Wl0jo-woj1fhNgnWgRSTAYiyw5nMvuW5rCJJ5vOB0CsRITL0tf-nJpdoTqdg2wExFNbnUyLy4MokiT5dCzXCfVlSlAwZt36XB1rxbNxzFdDJn-LPA07iXZcHBxu0HryMd2WIvNDsKXUr3ab9mQRGyfsk6C4AYRs5AHjtU6U8V__7BiAKahGZANTTzih9FheYx0ULjhrrWKRqbs4uIVcsIpcprgOpZVnJnoXCUJGABnVg6SKavH3V8_u-IaPljgmu3b9Lkww7D43GESGFamwOfDA6uTeBK9gacjj_hNv5VIPY7Xt0Ad2hU4a30eibTlJptgZSzsOH4aXtowYcVMadG7HrOIMGPstnTohxhqCes5S0WhhsseJqQ2BGkzxBFM-iYcvonAk-Qwrrl7Xl25kP4nFNrxz6nSP1wVdLun3omNwic3lSs8PXJz9fjsKd6)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=423a0b78a2af4426a662368a3cb2fc4b&_e=kD0N9v0auV59L26RFuHN-M6C_mGVxWdm17a0mg3h_Ze2MfbyRbmX5p3ipw8eT2UmQ8GhzmMmXFA__1MPtd-qFPJh-LoKSEt4IXL5WVLLisjioWBW0OWW_a95qItmYnr_T_8b0earBRfnm-6YYxRvLWbEyKNlhk7aAMVwI7JNQDXDKDfIetAYnqAeIwh-TFdTx6ZVzjsDuU9ei-VtJxpE6AQqsEQPU5Rt5lRkGDY6drzwXqMYY5P71GH3FBH3ONxVfDmQOc5algZ2vdONpDfbCe0gUkgDWvN13MGrWpAhWPjz21BnTN44CcHMd1OJpRtZB62Wl0jo-woj1fhNgnWgRSTAYiyw5nMvuW5rCJJ5vOB0CsRITL0tf-nJpdoTqdg2wExFNbnUyLy4MokiT5dCzXCfVlSlAwZt36XB1rxbNxzFdDJn-LPA07iXZcHBxu0HryMd2WIvNDsKXUr3ab9mQRGyfsk6C4AYRs5AHjtU6U8V__7BiAKahGZANTTzih9FheYx0ULjhrrWKRqbs4uIVcsIpcprgOpZVnJnoXCUJGAL_3DEfVUjMxI38h0zvK7-MNgm0LSaKWD8UdifAx1Vh9HHsj2nZd6J3n81H-ZNE_P0sNlCUQgOKzZ0Z3cPxsphlu7NORe2CtaQCb91OCKJYPDIX7NNm-8H8voM-SjGoI-IuyIAmtdyrkfQAtlIVFRhSKQkh-qviKdKol4V5kJoZZ9fvbA2gXQNXxx1jMzjSOZJJgLhjx1NL-e7RmVN_tEW)
President Trump and I are counting on you. The future of our Republic is at stake.

Let's get this done!
Senator Rick Scott (R-FL)
NRSC Chairman

| [****SIGN OUR PETITION
TAKE BACK THE SENATE➔****](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=423a0b78a2af4426a662368a3cb2fc4b&_e=kD0N9v0auV59L26RFuHN-M6C_mGVxWdm17a0mg3h_Ze2MfbyRbmX5p3ipw8eT2UmQ8GhzmMmXFA__1MPtd-qFPJh-LoKSEt4IXL5WVLLisjioWBW0OWW_a95qItmYnr_T_8b0earBRfnm-6YYxRvLWbEyKNlhk7aAMVwI7JNQDXDKDfIetAYnqAeIwh-TFdTx6ZVzjsDuU9ei-VtJxpE6AQqsEQPU5Rt5lRkGDY6drzwXqMYY5P71GH3FBH3ONxVfDmQOc5algZ2vdONpDfbCe0gUkgDWvN13MGrWpAhWPjz21BnTN44CcHMd1OJpRtZB62Wl0jo-woj1fhNgnWgRSTAYiyw5nMvuW5rCJJ5vOB0CsRITL0tf-nJpdoTqdg2wExFNbnUyLy4MokiT5dCzXCfVlSlAwZt36XB1rxbNxzFdDJn-LPA07iXZcHBxu0HryMd2WIvNDsKXUr3ab9mQRGyfsk6C4AYRs5AHjtU6U8V__7BiAKahGZANTTzih9FheYx0ULjhrrWKRqbs4uIVcsIpcprgOpZVnJnoXCUJGD0jlXRBLF39QWHlxh4jBw-1DrAZAWBbovM5_Tl3SfDyA7aQ1Tc1LoSCRDlubWCPrvLZRF2cmdbnwPeq69jJNULbtI17vD5kqrKuobbMmLml_Vo97TSQBYWKdWHHJEkkRkd1GTyzwMhcOjJyKVWUfKqueFEB8stsFKRQOIl4EW3QX2JHzK2BNXqhydKJaAmA72G54BtF-19b6eT1X_zAMO2)

name: John McGuire
subject: Biden and his Cronies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McGuire for Virginia
body:
Elect leaders that work for the people, not their pockets!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=2a56bc81c29c489ebf9c414887eec7bb&_e=mXgK3xrsNJ0LSBFW6xjFm10skhT6u65_ameZrpI3XK4dBrhkLuC7up-TH-VBVCAOpnEDlH_3n0KKQEEWxAq6saGF7dWtQMGvE0hZNEZ1Ndb7jXioSu67ojT-3-YZ5tHTPhbIEfG1G7SBzAmbvpBfMfQr6cWTCs9kKVR6-n8XKfw1UU9Zy0xNRGsQSWiX3oh_L_uDj0r2WIRMErKl9PPDK0vRpSW2arOcC5JL_Vl0CtTGEvVaNAV1g6jBA1_6vb5IekYTNMkNIaFwRGmjBeRC1O2fzvzOVriLbboI46v_u5UzhfTMWU7wvLyjdSSvM7-7gj8-zJYVDLE407OK-qxecaa2fD8iKEuUu-8tVyJoc5UtZ4zV9DZk7k4ssGcA_M53iWsBbC_9FxBvFYeFjXYPudTmQhXr-foEhAV1IMhYsoSQ0BiEjkHE4SBaN81LMfFP8z0uSio5guU4eo6SRjA5VadIgqTgnKwjwpswMkIQn02T-vxv_xaKLloxmQnpM7ROiUVPPxMBm9PImYF4ZFHfzg%3D%3D)
Friend,

**Joe Biden and his Radical Left cronies continue to make it harder for the American people to succeed.**

At a time when the American economy is struggling to recover, Democrats are making it more difficult with their radical spending plans. **It’s clear that Biden is serving the needs of his party when he should be serving the American people like he was elected to do.** Biden continues to propose massive spending plans that harm the American economy and say that anyone who speaks out against him doesn’t know how the economy works.

_**Joe Biden is the master of ignorance as he chooses to avoid all the negative effects that his policies bring to the country because it will hurt his chances in the next election.**_

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re coming to you today to ask for your thoughts on what messages, strategies, and tactics will give us the best chance of passing the Build Back Better Act.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211123-2658-header&t=1&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)
We have some good news and some bad news.
**The good news** is that the House officially passed the Build Back Better Act, which includes the largest investment to combat climate change in U.S. history, lower prescription drug prices, universal Pre-K, the Civilian Climate Corps, and funding for high-speed rail — plus so much more.
**The bad news** is that with a razor-thin majority in the Senate, just one Democrat opposing BBB would stop it from becoming law.
**So, we’re coming to you today to ask for your thoughts on what messages, strategies, and tactics will give us the best chance of passing this bill in the Senate.**
[Will you take a minute to answer a few questions as part of our Build Back Better Survey?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/bbb-survey-nov-2021/?source=em20211123-2658-P&t=2&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx) Your input will be a huge help as we figure out our strategy to pass this bill.
**[Start the survey →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/bbb-survey-nov-2021/?source=em20211123-2658-P&t=3&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)**
**If we’ve learned anything from this process, it’s just how vital it is that we expand our majority in the 2022 midterm elections** and elect people who are dedicated to helping working people and support policies that will directly impact their lives.
But so many of the policies in this bill – from climate action to lower drug prices – simply can’t wait another year. Working people need relief now, and they need to see that Democrats are able to deliver on our promises.
[So, will you please take a few minutes (or less!!) of your time to participate in our Build Back Better Survey?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/bbb-survey-nov-2021/?source=em20211123-2658-P&t=4&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)
The more input we get, the more insight we’ll have from the ground about how we can best pressure the Senate to pass this bill once and for all.
Thank you for taking the time.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211123-2658-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=5&refcode2=2658_2526796_JGgvQx&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211123-2658-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=6&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2658%2E2526796%2EJGgvQx)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Mother Earth needs your help. After all that she’s given us -- literally everything we have -- don’t you think we should be taking better care of her? Well, Republicans have proven time and again that they don’t think so. In Congress, the GOP pushes legislation that helps accelerate the rate of climate change. I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=c7e1fefebe904ee0bdd1da20fa3b81e1&_e=OobnzujAck_Khxf7vvjCaHOxkved6JYsEzlPh3-icFPsIFOQJCHyg6o7e6YSbv0Z3C7Xq_eOKIlqdSbonTpqspCY2yvJE-mhqDYeBLseg2wPOl6a3LOajK7g_4unH8jgnLHAPvECFvBcxIAsBmBhH8j6iOa25JCHcjugrweyEGqMkZza_c6eEBn8tvlb8g6BBwVDfFORrrIuLNaehgm3qZUSTW8QdHdJrqnKfBbhFtQIQtyciOv6fUXWmeyI1U4aOXITnWBykJz6wEKZXGWXDxjxT4LSJcQbjDka4nYz1E4E7s3_-7az88T2FfG6PC5BGSuf-_9cuBAaGWYvAnP7SrhbmWFu9akZhFhbC7aRLMBGNM_BJac6Urvygl6t7CG9xyKyA_Bc1O-htXvOaauLhkfzX0hrrMeiyMGbY418enN4hE0UGj3dma26lefWUAmSk83fP4z6RZocVTJiqmxCoA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=c7e1fefebe904ee0bdd1da20fa3b81e1&_e=OobnzujAck_Khxf7vvjCaHOxkved6JYsEzlPh3-icFPsIFOQJCHyg6o7e6YSbv0Z3C7Xq_eOKIlqdSbonTpqspCY2yvJE-mhqDYeBLseg2wPOl6a3LOajK7g_4unH8jgnLHAPvECFvBcxIAsBmBhH8j6iOa25JCHcjugrweyEGqMkZza_c6eEBn8tvlb8g6BBwVDfFORrrIuLNaehgm3qZUSTW8QdHdJrqnKfBbhFtQIQtyciOv6fUXWmeyI1U4a3n8YGM8kTukd7dyhiiMUN0f3S1IDPFxLHgCfU_aF6mVUFEkvitl00ROpRMa0IIBi24phW4nQJpukG3KtqN6thVVTGoNi_WsZI3C0BuOJ4g8PvLGBAEIiX2qN1-g4yB-eiOTLJjFKGYN5ENNhTFMv1ekM94iL8XSdckKMBx2NRB-qaFPBMyF02ntMDEGgbFYB9VB_-BUQP_S61eQxFNR_TA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=c7e1fefebe904ee0bdd1da20fa3b81e1&_e=OobnzujAck_Khxf7vvjCaHOxkved6JYsEzlPh3-icFPsIFOQJCHyg6o7e6YSbv0Z3C7Xq_eOKIlqdSbonTpqspCY2yvJE-mhqDYeBLseg2wPOl6a3LOajK7g_4unH8jgnLHAPvECFvBcxIAsBmBhH8j6iOa25JCHcjugrweyEGqMkZza_c6eEBn8tvlb8g6BBwVDfFORrrIuLNaehgm3qZUSTW8QdHdJrqnKfBbhFtQIQtyciOv6fUXWmeyI1U4a6OJSkbf45IHVp-gjYZp-f-lItnzAGOS1RCOiZ8S13RiJhjC-3gS0_nE58p9wCWM0hjTQN8eSEBPhBWSkCWlYOb1zDchYCavzP-T4pNXtk5ToJ2YlmOWCyBf7aaexuZjjRJwN3f-qB9N_rR-ku2aCGG_bHcFBT0HQtjqPjEaKIZSsdL9FRTuchAq06k4SBg9j8dq83Hk217GCEqEVViCqng%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=c7e1fefebe904ee0bdd1da20fa3b81e1&_e=OobnzujAck_Khxf7vvjCaHOxkved6JYsEzlPh3-icFPsIFOQJCHyg6o7e6YSbv0Z3C7Xq_eOKIlqdSbonTpqspCY2yvJE-mhqDYeBLseg2wPOl6a3LOajK7g_4unH8jgnLHAPvECFvBcxIAsBmBhH8j6iOa25JCHcjugrweyEGqMkZza_c6eEBn8tvlb8g6BBwVDfFORrrIuLNaehgm3qZUSTW8QdHdJrqnKfBbhFtQIQtyciOv6fUXWmeyI1U4aAkAqiNPKfcGXBoankWWyRjBbucwxueuR3mDx5SnkH2D99F5o7peDti3t1HIeI9WqiQ-eeNXi6-kYJfb6S8O-a45hwKPPSFzvTteqHOlG5YwqVvDvxCk45IWYVkNXyr2c_geDYybpGHwmtoEX5I6M6X0gEFajJzbfPbZ5BoLfq8PwKfiVml_oi_Y1iSToS2le_T7Kc5ez1KHV4HUC26xsDA%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=c7e1fefebe904ee0bdd1da20fa3b81e1&_e=OobnzujAck_Khxf7vvjCaHOxkved6JYsEzlPh3-icFPsIFOQJCHyg6o7e6YSbv0Z3C7Xq_eOKIlqdSbonTpqspCY2yvJE-mhqDYeBLseg2wPOl6a3LOajK7g_4unH8jgnLHAPvECFvBcxIAsBmBhH8j6iOa25JCHcjugrweyEGqMkZza_c6eEBn8tvlb8g6BBwVDfFORrrIuLNaehgm3qZUSTW8QdHdJrqnKfBbhFtQIQtyciOv6fUXWmeyI1U4a7cTm3-Uf_SY2xZ2Crf0aBCA1XKCg7enojCj0TlGe1L_yJ7qcHJmFV9Ur2Kv5-sUftgtppHiwe8LxFn9cbayGPaiNEtkCRX0CT79if3L_SV6PxbMh2vZd0gWWyzT4WKL5g_ABZEqBE2ufi8y6ikVbpUNKXlivrB5fLsk5Hw_tmIW4AZoYiQ2vZKN5lOsMyalYbsqrc4XE-RbHEVfltboTHw%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=c7e1fefebe904ee0bdd1da20fa3b81e1&_e=OobnzujAck_Khxf7vvjCaHOxkved6JYsEzlPh3-icFPsIFOQJCHyg6o7e6YSbv0Z3C7Xq_eOKIlqdSbonTpqspCY2yvJE-mhqDYeBLseg2wPOl6a3LOajK7g_4unH8jgnLHAPvECFvBcxIAsBmBhH8j6iOa25JCHcjugrweyEGqMkZza_c6eEBn8tvlb8g6BBwVDfFORrrIuLNaehgm3qZUSTW8QdHdJrqnKfBbhFtQIQtyciOv6fUXWmeyI1U4aWS6S5GCsAXhbDHS7v9z8y2sj0C38pXcdOHfgZhpsHd_GB74rJFMoD8U50xki6MJF4VT8ryY-V5GKadgabFTmqx0dRP_qfcc_orw7moIfinshbkBNVDgkG8ayyCt8mFzD9kms0y6pOwpvYuOvWSM-kTA1YoH1OwNsMyUkTe12TskE5265eVJAGsHvpXcC_poORbSTPC2YKMJwtoVS75Qglw%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. Dear Peter,
We're racking up some serious wins against the Biden Administration.
In case you didn't see our last email, we just had a huge victory against the U.S. Treasury Department.__**Biden was trying to prohibit states from cutting taxes** if they accepted COVID-19 relief funds — **in response to our 13-state coalition, a District Court said no!**
That likely _**means lower taxes for you**_ — especially if you live in a red state.
The AGs also immediately sued against the unlawful **OSHA vaccine mandate** , and _**obtained a preliminary nationwide injunction (a "pause")**_ of that rule until we knock it down permanently.
On top of all that, we're preparing for **our big U.S. Supreme Court case** , which is said to be the _**most impactful energy and administrative law case before the high court in many years.**_
When we win that fight at SCOTUS, we will help secure American energy independence, affordable prices for consumers, and a reliable power grid.

clean_body: | | | | Unfortunately, our terrific work is also attracting the attention of radical far-left billionaires. Dear Peter, We're racking up some serious wins against the Biden Administration. In case you didn't see our last email, we just had a huge victory against the U.S. Treasury Department.Biden was trying to prohibit states from cutting taxes if they accepted COVID-19 relief funds — in response to our 13-state coalition, a District Court said no! That likely means lower taxes for you — especially if you live in a red state. The AGs also immediately sued against the unlawful OSHA vaccine mandate , and obtained a preliminary nationwide injunction (a "pause") of that rule until we knock it down permanently. On top of all that, we're preparing for our big U.S. Supreme Court case , which is said to be the most impactful energy and administrative law case before the high court in many years. When we win that fight at SCOTUS, we will help secure American energy independence, affordable prices for consumers, and a reliable power grid. Unfortunately, our terrific work is also attracting the attention of radical far-left billionaires. They are firmly opposed to our efforts and expected to pour in millions of dollars against our efforts. We need funds to beat these guys back. | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General P.S. I have told you about how important AGs are in defending America, and hope this helps make that point. We are the point of the spear protecting your freedoms and will not relent in our fights against the far-left! | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: My friend, Tim Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ][IMG]

Hello,

I know what it takes to win in Ohio.

You win Ohio by talking to workers — because whether you punch a clock,
swipe a badge, take home tips, or care for loved ones, ALL work has
dignity.

That’s why we have to elect Tim Ryan, and give Ohio another Democratic
Senator who will fight tirelessly for working people. I couldn’t have won
my competitive race in 2018 without grassroots support. So, I’m personally
asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6116?t=1007&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Will you make a donation to Tim Ryan’s campaign before midnight to help
us flip this seat blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? If we
want to win this race, we’ll need YOUR support.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6116?t=1008&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6117?t=1009&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6118?t=1010&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6119?t=1011&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6120?t=1012&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6116?t=1013&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Other Amount

One of Tim’s opponents — far-right extremist and Trump’s #1 fan Josh
Mandel — already tried and failed twice to unseat me. If anyone knows how
to beat Josh, it’s me.

And Tim’s other GOP opponents? They’re a bunch of millionaires who
couldn’t care less about working people. Billionaire tech giant Peter
Thiel is even funding a super PAC supporting JD Vance.

But here’s the good news: recent polling shows that no matter who Tim’s
opponent is, this race is a dead heat. We fought back against Trump’s best
efforts and overcame nasty GOP attacks to win re-election in 2018. Tim
will need that same grassroots power this time around.

There’s no question this race will be as tough as it gets and could come
down to a handful of votes. Tim’s team needs resources today — not just
next year — to lay the groundwork for victory. So, I’m personally asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6121?t=1014&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Make a contribution of $10 or more to help Tim build the resources he
needs to expand the Democratic Senate majority and give Ohioans two
pro-worker Senators on their side.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6116?t=1015&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6117?t=1016&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6118?t=1017&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6119?t=1018&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6120?t=1019&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6116?t=1020&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ]Other Amount

I’ve spent my entire career fighting for working people and their
families, because if you love this country, you fight for the people who
make it work. Tim is fighting to cut workers in on the deal and together,
we’ll do just that.

Thanks so much,

Sherrod

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1426%2E3611125%2E18Seti ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Hello, I know what it takes to win in Ohio. You win Ohio by talking to workers — because whether you punch a clock, swipe a badge, take home tips, or care for loved ones, ALL work has dignity. That’s why we have to elect Tim Ryan, and give Ohio another Democratic Senator who will fight tirelessly for working people. I couldn’t have won my competitive race in 2018 without grassroots support. So, I’m personally asking: [ ]Will you make a donation to Tim Ryan’s campaign before midnight to help us flip this seat blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? If we want to win this race, we’ll need YOUR support. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount One of Tim’s opponents — far-right extremist and Trump’s #1 fan Josh Mandel — already tried and failed twice to unseat me. If anyone knows how to beat Josh, it’s me. And Tim’s other GOP opponents? They’re a bunch of millionaires who couldn’t care less about working people. Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel is even funding a super PAC supporting JD Vance. But here’s the good news: recent polling shows that no matter who Tim’s opponent is, this race is a dead heat. We fought back against Trump’s best efforts and overcame nasty GOP attacks to win re-election in 2018. Tim will need that same grassroots power this time around. There’s no question this race will be as tough as it gets and could come down to a handful of votes. Tim’s team needs resources today — not just next year — to lay the groundwork for victory. So, I’m personally asking: [ ]Make a contribution of $10 or more to help Tim build the resources he needs to expand the Democratic Senate majority and give Ohioans two pro-worker Senators on their side. name: Morris Katz
subject: Your last chance to become a day one donor of Erica’s campaign for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey. It’s Morris, Erica’s
Campaign Manager. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the big news:

This morning, Erica officially launched her campaign to represent North
Carolina’s 2nd District — her home district — in Congress.

Already, folks are going all-in for the movement we’re building, and we
couldn’t be more excited. Dozens of local elected officials and community
leaders have endorsed our campaign, and people from across the district
and elsewhere are pitching in to show their support on day one.

We’d greatly appreciate your support before our launch day ends in just a
few hours. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27650?refcode=em20211123-653&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=653%2E3698%2ElZroP1 ]A donation of any amount will make a big impact and send a
powerful message about the energy behind our campaign. Will you chip in to
become a day one founding donor and be counted as one of Erica’s earliest
supporters?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27650?refcode=em20211123-653&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=653%2E3698%2ElZroP1 ]Become a founding donor

This is the only swing district in North Carolina, and it’s going to be
one of the most competitive in the country.

With such a narrow House majority, this is a race we can’t afford to lose.
To win this seat, we need a candidate who knows this community, and who
the community knows. That’s Erica.

And what we raise in these first 24 hours is critical to winning this
race. Every bit of support that comes in will set the foundation for the
rest of the campaign. On top of that, it will send a clear signal to
voters, the media, and potential opponents about the strength of our
movement.

So before the day is up, I want to ask you: [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27650?refcode=em20211123-653&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=653%2E3698%2ElZroP1 ]Will you make a
contribution right now to become a day one founding donor to elect Erica
Smith to Congress? Even $3 or $5 will make a significant difference.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/27650?refcode=em20211123-653&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=653%2E3698%2ElZroP1 ]Become a founding donor

Thank you for all you do. It means the world to Erica and our entire team.

More soon,

Morris Katz
Campaign Manager
Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211123-653-footer&t=1023&refcode2=653_3698_lZroP1&akid=653%2E3698%2ElZroP1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=653%2E3698%2ElZroP1

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
